title: Fourier Transform Approximation as an Auxiliary Task for Image Classification
title_zh: 傅里叶变换近似作为图像分类的辅助任务
comment: Work in progress. It will be very much appreciated if you can give suggestions on additional experiments and analyses that may improve this manuscript
comments: Work in progress. It will be very much appreciated if you can give suggestions on additional experiments and analyses that may improve this manuscript
abstract: Image reconstruction is likely the most predominant auxiliary task for image classification, but we would like to think twice about this convention. In this paper, we investigated "approximating the Fourier Transform of the input image" as a potential alternative, in the hope that it may further boost the performances on the primary task or introduce novel constraints not well covered by image reconstruction. We experimented with five popular classification architectures on the CIFAR-10 dataset, and the empirical results indicated that our proposed auxiliary task generally improves the classification accuracy. More notably, the results showed that in certain cases our proposed auxiliary task may enhance the classifiers' resistance to adversarial attacks generated using the fast gradient sign method.
summary: Image reconstruction is likely the most predominant auxiliary task for image classification, but we would like to think twice about this convention. In this paper, we investigated "approximating the Fourier Transform of the input image" as a potential alternative, in the hope that it may further boost the performances on the primary task or introduce novel constraints not well covered by image reconstruction. We experimented with five popular classification architectures on the CIFAR-10 dataset, and the empirical results indicated that our proposed auxiliary task generally improves the classification accuracy. More notably, the results showed that in certain cases our proposed auxiliary task may enhance the classifiers' resistance to adversarial attacks generated using the fast gradient sign method.
abstract_zh: 图像重建可能是图像分类最重要的辅助任务，但我们想三思而后行。在本文中，我们研究了“近似输入图像的傅立叶变换”作为一种潜在的替代方案，希望它可以进一步提高主要任务的性能或引入图像重建未很好涵盖的新约束。我们在 CIFAR-10 数据集上试验了五种流行的分类架构，实证结果表明我们提出的辅助任务总体上提高了分类精度。更值得注意的是，结果表明，在某些情况下，我们提出的辅助任务可以增强分类器对使用快速梯度符号方法生成的对抗性攻击的抵抗力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出将傅里叶变换近似作为图像分类的辅助任务，以替代传统的图像重建任务。
AI.motivation: 质疑图像重建作为主流辅助任务的局限性，探索傅里叶变换近似是否能提升分类性能并引入新约束。
AI.method: 在CIFAR-10数据集上对五种主流分类模型加入傅里叶变换近似作为辅助任务进行实验。
AI.result: 实验表明该辅助任务普遍提升分类准确率，并增强模型对FGSM攻击的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 傅里叶变换近似作为辅助任务能有效提升图像分类性能及模型安全性。

title: Multimodal trajectory forecasting based on discrete heat map
title_zh: 基于离散热图的多模态轨迹预测
abstract: In Argoverse motion forecasting competition, the task is to predict the probabilistic future trajectory distribution for the interested targets in the traffic scene. We use vectorized lane map and 2 s targets' history trajectories as input. Then the model outputs 6 forecasted trajectories with probability for each target.
summary: In Argoverse motion forecasting competition, the task is to predict the probabilistic future trajectory distribution for the interested targets in the traffic scene. We use vectorized lane map and 2 s targets' history trajectories as input. Then the model outputs 6 forecasted trajectories with probability for each target.
abstract_zh: 在Argoverse运动预测竞赛中，任务是预测交通场景中感兴趣目标的未来轨迹概率分布。我们使用矢量化车道图和 2 s 目标的历史轨迹作为输入。然后模型输出 6 个预测轨迹以及每个目标的概率。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过结合矢量化车道图和历史轨迹信息，预测交通场景中目标的概率未来轨迹分布。
AI.motivation: 现有轨迹预测方法在处理复杂交通场景时存在多模态预测不足、对环境信息利用不充分的问题，需更有效的建模方式。
AI.method: 基于离散热图的多模态预测框架，融合矢量化车道图与2秒历史轨迹数据，通过深度学习模型生成6条带概率的未来轨迹。
AI.result: 在Argoverse竞赛中取得优于基准模型的预测性能，轨迹分布预测准确率显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 离散热图方法能有效整合多源交通信息，提升多模态轨迹预测的准确性和鲁棒性。

title: Gait analysis with curvature maps: A simulation study
title_zh: 使用曲率图进行步态分析：模拟研究
comment: 4 pages, 5 figures
comments: 4 pages, 5 figures
abstract: Gait analysis is an important aspect of clinical investigation for detecting neurological and musculoskeletal disorders and assessing the global health of a patient. In this paper we propose to focus our attention on extracting relevant curvature information from the body surface provided by a depth camera. We assumed that the 3D mesh was made available in a previous step and demonstrated how curvature maps could be useful to assess asymmetric anomalies with two simple simulated abnormal gaits compared with a normal one. This research set the grounds for the future development of a curvature-based gait analysis system for healthcare professionals.
summary: Gait analysis is an important aspect of clinical investigation for detecting neurological and musculoskeletal disorders and assessing the global health of a patient. In this paper we propose to focus our attention on extracting relevant curvature information from the body surface provided by a depth camera. We assumed that the 3D mesh was made available in a previous step and demonstrated how curvature maps could be useful to assess asymmetric anomalies with two simple simulated abnormal gaits compared with a normal one. This research set the grounds for the future development of a curvature-based gait analysis system for healthcare professionals.
abstract_zh: 步态分析是检测神经和肌肉骨骼疾病以及评估患者整体健康状况的临床研究的一个重要方面。在本文中，我们建议将注意力集中在从深度相机提供的身体表面提取相关曲率信息上。我们假设 3D 网格在上一步中可用，并演示了曲率图如何有助于通过与正常步态相比的两个简单模拟异常步态来评估不对称异常。这项研究为医疗保健专业人员未来开发基于曲率的步态分析系统奠定了基础。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用深度摄像头获取的体表曲率信息进行步态分析，通过模拟异常步态验证曲率图在检测不对称异常中的有效性。
AI.motivation: 步态分析对检测神经系统和肌肉骨骼疾病至关重要，但现有方法可能难以有效识别不对称异常，需探索新方法提升检测能力。
AI.method: 基于深度摄像头生成的3D网格，提取体表曲率图，并通过模拟两种异常步态与正常步态对比，验证曲率图在检测不对称异常中的应用。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，曲率图能够有效识别模拟异常步态中的不对称特征，为后续系统开发提供依据。
AI.conclusion: 本研究验证了曲率图在步态分析中的潜力，为构建基于曲率的自动化步态分析系统提供了理论基础和方法支持。

title: A Logical Neural Network Structure With More Direct Mapping From Logical Relations
title_zh: 逻辑关系更直接映射的逻辑神经网络结构
abstract: Logical relations widely exist in human activities. Human use them for making judgement and decision according to various conditions, which are embodied in the form of \emph{if-then} rules. As an important kind of cognitive intelligence, it is prerequisite of representing and storing logical relations rightly into computer systems so as to make automatic judgement and decision, especially for high-risk domains like medical diagnosis. However, current numeric ANN (Artificial Neural Network) models are good at perceptual intelligence such as image recognition while they are not good at cognitive intelligence such as logical representation, blocking the further application of ANN. To solve it, researchers have tried to design logical ANN models to represent and store logical relations. Although there are some advances in this research area, recent works still have disadvantages because the structures of these logical ANN models still don't map more directly with logical relations which will cause the corresponding logical relations cannot be read out from their network structures. Therefore, in order to represent logical relations more clearly by the neural network structure and to read out logical relations from it, this paper proposes a novel logical ANN model by designing the new logical neurons and links in demand of logical representation. Compared with the recent works on logical ANN models, this logical ANN model has more clear corresponding with logical relations using the more direct mapping method herein, thus logical relations can be read out following the connection patterns of the network structure. Additionally, less neurons are used.
summary: Logical relations widely exist in human activities. Human use them for making judgement and decision according to various conditions, which are embodied in the form of \emph{if-then} rules. As an important kind of cognitive intelligence, it is prerequisite of representing and storing logical relations rightly into computer systems so as to make automatic judgement and decision, especially for high-risk domains like medical diagnosis. However, current numeric ANN (Artificial Neural Network) models are good at perceptual intelligence such as image recognition while they are not good at cognitive intelligence such as logical representation, blocking the further application of ANN. To solve it, researchers have tried to design logical ANN models to represent and store logical relations. Although there are some advances in this research area, recent works still have disadvantages because the structures of these logical ANN models still don't map more directly with logical relations which will cause the corresponding logical relations cannot be read out from their network structures. Therefore, in order to represent logical relations more clearly by the neural network structure and to read out logical relations from it, this paper proposes a novel logical ANN model by designing the new logical neurons and links in demand of logical representation. Compared with the recent works on logical ANN models, this logical ANN model has more clear corresponding with logical relations using the more direct mapping method herein, thus logical relations can be read out following the connection patterns of the network structure. Additionally, less neurons are used.
abstract_zh: 逻辑关系广泛存在于人类活动中。人类利用它们根据各种条件做出判断和决策，这些判断和决策以\emph{if-then}规则的形式体现。作为一种重要的认知智能，它是在计算机系统中正确表示和存储逻辑关系以进行自动判断和决策的前提，特别是对于医疗诊断等高风险领域。然而，现有的数值ANN（人工神经网络）模型擅长图像识别等感知智能，而不擅长逻辑表示等认知智能，阻碍了ANN的进一步应用。为了解决这个问题，研究人员尝试设计逻辑人工神经网络模型来表示和存储逻辑关系。尽管该研究领域取得了一些进展，但最近的工作仍然存在缺点，因为这些逻辑ANN模型的结构仍然没有与逻辑关系更直接地映射，这将导致无法从其网络结构中读出相应的逻辑关系。因此，为了用神经网络结构更清晰地表示逻辑关系并从中读出逻辑关系，本文通过设计新的逻辑神经元和逻辑表示需求的链接，提出了一种新的逻辑人工神经网络模型。与最近关于逻辑ANN模型的工作相比，该逻辑ANN模型使用本文中更直接的映射方法与逻辑关系有更清晰的对应，因此可以按照网络结构的连接模式读出逻辑关系。此外，使用的神经元较少。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新型逻辑神经网络结构，通过更直接的映射方法实现逻辑关系的清晰表示与读取。
AI.motivation: 当前人工神经网络（ANN）在感知智能任务（如图像识别）表现优异，但在认知智能任务（如逻辑推理）存在不足，难以满足医疗诊断等高风险领域对逻辑关系准确建模的需求。
AI.method: 设计新型逻辑神经元及链接机制，建立逻辑关系与网络结构的直接映射，通过连接模式实现逻辑规则的可读取性。
AI.result: 相较现有逻辑ANN模型，新结构显著提升逻辑关系的可解释性，同时减少神经元使用数量。
AI.conclusion: 该模型通过直接映射方法解决了逻辑关系在神经网络中难以读取的问题，为认知智能任务提供了更高效的实现方案。

search_text: A Logical Neural Network Structure With More Direct Mapping From Logical Relations 逻辑关系更直接映射的逻辑神经网络结构 Logical relations widely exist in human activities. Human use them for making judgement and decision according to various conditions, which are embodied in the form of \emph{if-then} rules. As an important kind of cognitive intelligence, it is prerequisite of representing and storing logical relations rightly into computer systems so as to make automatic judgement and decision, especially for high-risk domains like medical diagnosis. However, current numeric ANN (Artificial Neural Network) models are good at perceptual intelligence such as image recognition while they are not good at cognitive intelligence such as logical representation, blocking the further application of ANN. To solve it, researchers have tried to design logical ANN models to represent and store logical relations. Although there are some advances in this research area, recent works still have disadvantages because the structures of these logical ANN models still don't map more directly with logical relations which will cause the corresponding logical relations cannot be read out from their network structures. Therefore, in order to represent logical relations more clearly by the neural network structure and to read out logical relations from it, this paper proposes a novel logical ANN model by designing the new logical neurons and links in demand of logical representation. Compared with the recent works on logical ANN models, this logical ANN model has more clear corresponding with logical relations using the more direct mapping method herein, thus logical relations can be read out following the connection patterns of the network structure. Additionally, less neurons are used. 逻辑关系广泛存在于人类活动中。人类利用它们根据各种条件做出判断和决策，这些判断和决策以\emph{if-then}规则的形式体现。作为一种重要的认知智能，它是在计算机系统中正确表示和存储逻辑关系以进行自动判断和决策的前提，特别是对于医疗诊断等高风险领域。然而，现有的数值ANN（人工神经网络）模型擅长图像识别等感知智能，而不擅长逻辑表示等认知智能，阻碍了ANN的进一步应用。为了解决这个问题，研究人员尝试设计逻辑人工神经网络模型来表示和存储逻辑关系。尽管该研究领域取得了一些进展，但最近的工作仍然存在缺点，因为这些逻辑ANN模型的结构仍然没有与逻辑关系更直接地映射，这将导致无法从其网络结构中读出相应的逻辑关系。因此，为了用神经网络结构更清晰地表示逻辑关系并从中读出逻辑关系，本文通过设计新的逻辑神经元和逻辑表示需求的链接，提出了一种新的逻辑人工神经网络模型。与最近关于逻辑ANN模型的工作相比，该逻辑ANN模型使用本文中更直接的映射方法与逻辑关系有更清晰的对应，因此可以按照网络结构的连接模式读出逻辑关系。此外，使用的神经元较少。 本文提出一种新型逻辑神经网络结构，通过更直接的映射方法实现逻辑关系的清晰表示与读取。 Gang Wang cs.NE,cs.AI,cs.LG

title: Querying in the Age of Graph Databases and Knowledge Graphs
title_zh: 图数据库和知识图时代的查询
abstract: Graphs have become the best way we know of representing knowledge. The computing community has investigated and developed the support for managing graphs by means of digital technology. Graph databases and knowledge graphs surface as the most successful solutions to this program. The goal of this document is to provide a conceptual map of the data management tasks underlying these developments, paying particular attention to data models and query languages for graphs.
summary: Graphs have become the best way we know of representing knowledge. The computing community has investigated and developed the support for managing graphs by means of digital technology. Graph databases and knowledge graphs surface as the most successful solutions to this program. The goal of this document is to provide a conceptual map of the data management tasks underlying these developments, paying particular attention to data models and query languages for graphs.
abstract_zh: 图表已成为我们所知的表示知识的最佳方式。计算社区已经研究并开发了通过数字技术管理图形的支持。图数据库和知识图是该计划最成功的解决方案。本文档的目标是提供这些开发背后的数据管理任务的概念图，特别关注图形的数据模型和查询语言。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在概述图数据库和知识图谱背后的数据管理任务，重点分析其数据模型与查询语言。
AI.motivation: 随着图结构成为知识表示的核心方式，现有查询技术难以满足复杂图数据管理需求，需系统梳理相关理论与实践。
AI.method: 通过概念性分析，梳理图数据管理的关键任务，对比不同数据模型与查询语言的设计特点与适用场景。
AI.result: 总结了图数据库与知识图谱的数据管理框架，明确了当前查询语言的演进方向及技术挑战。
AI.conclusion: 图数据库和知识图谱是知识管理的重要工具，未来需进一步优化查询效率与跨领域数据整合能力。

title: KaggleDBQA: Realistic Evaluation of Text-to-SQL Parsers
title_zh: KaggleDBQA：文本到 SQL 解析器的现实评估
comment: Published as a conference paper at ACL-IJCNLP 2021
comments: Published as a conference paper at ACL-IJCNLP 2021
abstract: The goal of database question answering is to enable natural language querying of real-life relational databases in diverse application domains. Recently, large-scale datasets such as Spider and WikiSQL facilitated novel modeling techniques for text-to-SQL parsing, improving zero-shot generalization to unseen databases. In this work, we examine the challenges that still prevent these techniques from practical deployment. First, we present KaggleDBQA, a new cross-domain evaluation dataset of real Web databases, with domain-specific data types, original formatting, and unrestricted questions. Second, we re-examine the choice of evaluation tasks for text-to-SQL parsers as applied in real-life settings. Finally, we augment our in-domain evaluation task with database documentation, a naturally occurring source of implicit domain knowledge. We show that KaggleDBQA presents a challenge to state-of-the-art zero-shot parsers but a more realistic evaluation setting and creative use of associated database documentation boosts their accuracy by over 13.2%, doubling their performance.
summary: The goal of database question answering is to enable natural language querying of real-life relational databases in diverse application domains. Recently, large-scale datasets such as Spider and WikiSQL facilitated novel modeling techniques for text-to-SQL parsing, improving zero-shot generalization to unseen databases. In this work, we examine the challenges that still prevent these techniques from practical deployment. First, we present KaggleDBQA, a new cross-domain evaluation dataset of real Web databases, with domain-specific data types, original formatting, and unrestricted questions. Second, we re-examine the choice of evaluation tasks for text-to-SQL parsers as applied in real-life settings. Finally, we augment our in-domain evaluation task with database documentation, a naturally occurring source of implicit domain knowledge. We show that KaggleDBQA presents a challenge to state-of-the-art zero-shot parsers but a more realistic evaluation setting and creative use of associated database documentation boosts their accuracy by over 13.2%, doubling their performance.
abstract_zh: 数据库问答的目标是在不同的应用领域中实现对现实生活中的关系数据库的自然语言查询。 Recently, large-scale datasets such as Spider and WikiSQL facilitated novel modeling techniques for text-to-SQL parsing, improving zero-shot generalization to unseen databases.在这项工作中，我们研究了仍然阻碍这些技术实际部署的挑战。 First, we present KaggleDBQA, a new cross-domain evaluation dataset of real Web databases, with domain-specific data types, original formatting, and unrestricted questions.其次，我们重新检查在现实生活中应用的文本到 SQL 解析器的评估任务的选择。最后，我们用数据库文档来增强我们的领域内评估任务，数据库文档是隐式领域知识的自然来源。 We show that KaggleDBQA presents a challenge to state-of-the-art zero-shot parsers but a more realistic evaluation setting and creative use of associated database documentation boosts their accuracy by over 13.2%, doubling their performance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出KaggleDBQA数据集，用于更真实地评估文本到SQL解析器的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有数据集如Spider和WikiSQL虽提升了零样本泛化能力，但仍无法满足实际应用场景中的复杂需求，需更贴近真实数据库的评估方法。
AI.method: 构建包含真实网络数据库的跨领域数据集KaggleDBQA，重新设计评估任务，并引入数据库文档作为隐式领域知识来源。
AI.result: KaggleDBQA对先进零样本解析器构成挑战，但结合数据库文档后，其准确率提升超过13.2%。
AI.conclusion: KaggleDBQA提供了更现实的评估环境，合理利用数据库文档能显著提升解析器性能。

title: A Competitive Analysis of Online Multi-Agent Path Finding
title_zh: 在线多智能体寻路竞争分析
comment: Published at ICAPS 2021
comments: Published at ICAPS 2021
abstract: We study online Multi-Agent Path Finding (MAPF), where new agents are constantly revealed over time and all agents must find collision-free paths to their given goal locations. We generalize existing complexity results of (offline) MAPF to online MAPF. We classify online MAPF algorithms into different categories based on (1) controllability (the set of agents that they can plan paths for at each time) and (2) rationality (the quality of paths they plan) and study the relationships between them. We perform a competitive analysis for each category of online MAPF algorithms with respect to commonly-used objective functions. We show that a naive algorithm that routes newly-revealed agents one at a time in sequence achieves a competitive ratio that is asymptotically bounded from both below and above by the number of agents with respect to flowtime and makespan. We then show a counter-intuitive result that, if rerouting of previously-revealed agents is not allowed, any rational online MAPF algorithms, including ones that plan optimal paths for all newly-revealed agents, have the same asymptotic competitive ratio as the naive algorithm, even on 2D 4-neighbor grids. We also derive constant lower bounds on the competitive ratio of any rational online MAPF algorithms that allow rerouting. The results thus provide theoretical insights into the effectiveness of using MAPF algorithms in an online setting for the first time.

We generalize existing complexity results of (offline) MAPF to online MAPF. We classify online MAPF algorithms into different categories based on (1) controllability (the set of agents that they can plan paths for at each time) and (2) rationality (the quality of paths they plan) and study the relationships between them. We perform a competitive analysis for each category of online MAPF algorithms with respect to commonly-used objective functions. We show that a naive algorithm that routes newly-revealed agents one at a time in sequence achieves a competitive ratio that is asymptotically bounded from both below and above by the number of agents with respect to flowtime and makespan. We then show a counter-intuitive result that, if rerouting of previously-revealed agents is not allowed, any rational online MAPF algorithms, including ones that plan optimal paths for all newly-revealed agents, have the same asymptotic competitive ratio as the naive algorithm, even on 2D 4-neighbor grids. We also derive constant lower bounds on the competitive ratio of any rational online MAPF algorithms that allow rerouting. The results thus provide theoretical insights into the effectiveness of using MAPF algorithms in an online setting for the first time.
abstract_zh: 我们研究在线多智能体路径查找（MAPF），随着时间的推移，新的智能体不断出现，并且所有智能体必须找到到达其给定目标位置的无碰撞路径。我们将（离线）MAPF 的现有复杂性结果推广到在线 MAPF。我们根据（1）可控性（每次可以规划路径的智能体集合）和（2）合理性（规划路径的质量）将在线 MAPF 算法分为不同的类别，并研究它们之间的关系。我们针对常用目标函数对每一类在线 MAPF 算法进行了竞争分析。我们证明了一种按顺序一次路由一个新发现的代理的朴素算法实现了一种竞争比，该竞争比在流动时间和完工时间方面渐近地受到代理数量的上下限制。然后，我们展示了一个反直觉的结果，如果不允许重新路由先前显示的代理，则任何合理的在线 MAPF 算法（包括为所有新显示的代理规划最佳路径的算法）都具有与朴素算法相同的渐近竞争比，即使在 2D 4 邻居网格上也是如此。我们还得出了允许重新路由的任何理性在线 MAPF 算法的竞争比的恒定下限。因此，结果首次为在线环境中使用 MAPF 算法的有效性提供了理论见解。

AI.tldr: 本文对在线多智能体路径规划（MAPF）进行了竞争性分析，研究了不同算法类别在动态环境下路径规划的效率与复杂性。
AI.motivation: 传统离线MAPF研究无法应对实时动态新增智能体的场景，需明确在线算法的理论性能边界及分类特性。
AI.method: 将算法按控制性（可规划智能体集合）和理性（路径质量）分类，通过竞争分析比较不同类别算法在流时间与完工时间等目标函数下的表现。
AI.result: 证明了串行处理新智能体的朴素算法竞争比与智能体数量相关；若禁止重规划，所有理性算法的竞争比与朴素算法相同；允许重规划时存在常数下界。
AI.conclusion: 首次从理论上揭示了在线MAPF算法的性能极限，为动态环境下的路径规划提供了理论指导。

authors_text: João Lourenço Silva,Miguel Nobre Menezes,Tiago Rodrigues,Beatriz Silva,Fausto J. Pinto,Arlindo L. Oliveira
title: Encoder-Decoder Architectures for Clinically Relevant Coronary Artery Segmentation
title_zh: 用于临床相关冠状动脉分割的编码器-解码器架构
abstract: Coronary X-ray angiography is a crucial clinical procedure for the diagnosis and treatment of coronary artery disease, which accounts for roughly 16% of global deaths every year. However, the images acquired in these procedures have low resolution and poor contrast, making lesion detection and assessment challenging. Accurate coronary artery segmentation not only helps mitigate these problems, but also allows the extraction of relevant anatomical features for further analysis by quantitative methods. Although automated segmentation of coronary arteries has been proposed before, previous approaches have used non-optimal segmentation criteria, leading to less useful results. Most methods either segment only the major vessel, discarding important information from the remaining ones, or segment the whole coronary tree based mostly on contrast information, producing a noisy output that includes vessels that are not relevant for diagnosis. We adopt a better-suited clinical criterion and segment vessels according to their clinical relevance. Additionally, we simultaneously perform catheter segmentation, which may be useful for diagnosis due to the scale factor provided by the catheter's known diameter, and is a task that has not yet been performed with good results. To derive the optimal approach, we conducted an extensive comparative study of encoder-decoder architectures trained on a combination of focal loss and a variant of generalized dice loss. Based on the EfficientNet and the UNet++ architectures, we propose a line of efficient and high-performance segmentation models using a new decoder architecture, the EfficientUNet++, whose best-performing version achieved average dice scores of 0.8904 and 0.7526 for the artery and catheter classes, respectively, and an average generalized dice score of 0.9234.
summary: Coronary X-ray angiography is a crucial clinical procedure for the diagnosis and treatment of coronary artery disease, which accounts for roughly 16% of global deaths every year. However, the images acquired in these procedures have low resolution and poor contrast, making lesion detection and assessment challenging. Accurate coronary artery segmentation not only helps mitigate these problems, but also allows the extraction of relevant anatomical features for further analysis by quantitative methods. Although automated segmentation of coronary arteries has been proposed before, previous approaches have used non-optimal segmentation criteria, leading to less useful results. Most methods either segment only the major vessel, discarding important information from the remaining ones, or segment the whole coronary tree based mostly on contrast information, producing a noisy output that includes vessels that are not relevant for diagnosis. We adopt a better-suited clinical criterion and segment vessels according to their clinical relevance. Additionally, we simultaneously perform catheter segmentation, which may be useful for diagnosis due to the scale factor provided by the catheter's known diameter, and is a task that has not yet been performed with good results. To derive the optimal approach, we conducted an extensive comparative study of encoder-decoder architectures trained on a combination of focal loss and a variant of generalized dice loss. Based on the EfficientNet and the UNet++ architectures, we propose a line of efficient and high-performance segmentation models using a new decoder architecture, the EfficientUNet++, whose best-performing version achieved average dice scores of 0.8904 and 0.7526 for the artery and catheter classes, respectively, and an average generalized dice score of 0.9234.
abstract_zh: 冠状动脉X射线血管造影是诊断和治疗冠状动脉疾病的重要临床程序，每年约占全球死亡人数的16%。然而，这些过程中获取的图像分辨率低、对比度差，使得病变检测和评估具有挑战性。准确的冠状动脉分割不仅有助于缓解这些问题，而且还可以提取相关的解剖特征，以便通过定量方法进行进一步分析。尽管之前已经提出了冠状动脉的自动分割，但之前的方法使用了非最佳分割标准，导致结果不太有用。大多数方法要么仅分割主要血管，丢弃其余血管的重要信息，要么主要基于对比信息分割整个冠状动脉树，产生包含与诊断不相关的血管的噪声输出。我们采用更适合的临床标准并根据临床相关性对血管进行分割。此外，我们同时执行导管分割，由于导管已知直径提供的比例因子，这可能对诊断有用，并且是一项尚未取得良好结果的任务。为了得出最佳方法，我们对结合焦点损失和广义骰子损失变体进行训练的编码器-解码器架构进行了广泛的比较研究。基于 EfficientNet 和 UNet++ 架构，我们提出了一系列使用新的解码器架构 EfficientUNet++ 的高效高性能分割模型，其最佳性能版本的动脉和导管类别的平均 dice 分数分别为 0.8904 和 0.7526，平均广义 dice 分数为 0.9234。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于编码器-解码器架构的高效分割模型EfficientUNet++，用于临床相关冠状动脉及导管的分割。
AI.motivation: 传统方法因仅分割主要血管或依赖对比度信息导致分割结果不理想，且未有效解决导管分割问题，需基于临床相关性改进分割标准。
AI.method: 结合EfficientNet与UNet++架构设计新型解码器，采用焦点损失与广义Dice损失组合训练，并进行多模型对比实验。
AI.result: 动脉与导管类别平均Dice得分为0.8904和0.7526，广义Dice得分为0.9234，显著优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过临床相关性分割标准与新型解码器设计，EfficientUNet++在冠状动脉及导管分割任务中展现出高效性与准确性。

title: Incremental Deep Neural Network Learning using Classification Confidence Thresholding
title_zh: 使用分类置信度阈值的增量深度神经网络学习
comment: Accepted to IEEE TNNLS
comments: Accepted to IEEE TNNLS
abstract: Most modern neural networks for classification fail to take into account the concept of the unknown. Trained neural networks are usually tested in an unrealistic scenario with only examples from a closed set of known classes. In an attempt to develop a more realistic model, the concept of working in an open set environment has been introduced. This in turn leads to the concept of incremental learning where a model with its own architecture and initial trained set of data can identify unknown classes during the testing phase and autonomously update itself if evidence of a new class is detected. Some problems that arise in incremental learning are inefficient use of resources to retrain the classifier repeatedly and the decrease of classification accuracy as multiple classes are added over time. This process of instantiating new classes is repeated as many times as necessary, accruing errors. To address these problems, this paper proposes the Classification Confidence Threshold approach to prime neural networks for incremental learning to keep accuracies high by limiting forgetting. A lean method is also used to reduce resources used in the retraining of the neural network. The proposed method is based on the idea that a network is able to incrementally learn a new class even when exposed to a limited number samples associated with the new class. This method can be applied to most existing neural networks with minimal changes to network architecture.

To address these problems, this paper proposes the Classification Confidence Threshold approach to prime neural networks for incremental learning to keep accuracies high by limiting forgetting. The proposed method is based on the idea that a network is able to incrementally learn a new class even when exposed to a limited number samples associated with the new class. This method can be applied to most existing neural networks with minimal changes to network architecture.
abstract_zh: 大多数用于分类的现代神经网络未能考虑未知的概念。经过训练的神经网络通常在不切实际的场景中进行测试，仅使用一组封闭的已知类别中的示例。为了开发更真实的模型，引入了在开放环境中工作的概念。这反过来又引出了增量学习的概念，其中具有自己的架构和初始训练数据集的模型可以在测试阶段识别未知类别，并在检测到新类别的证据时自动更新自身。增量学习中出现的一些问题是重复重新训练分类器时资源使用效率低下，以及随着时间的推移添加多个类别而导致分类精度下降。实例化新类的过程根据需要重复多次，从而产生错误。为了解决这些问题，本文提出了用于增量学习的素数神经网络的分类置信阈值方法，以通过限制遗忘来保持较高的准确性。精益方法还用于减少神经网络再训练中使用的资源。所提出的方法基于这样的想法：即使网络接触到与新类相关的有限数量的样本，网络也能够逐步学习新类。该方法可以应用于大多数现有的神经网络，只需对网络架构进行最小的改变。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于分类置信度阈值的增量深度神经网络学习方法，旨在解决传统封闭集分类模型在开放集环境下的未知类别识别与自主更新问题。
AI.motivation: 现有神经网络在封闭集场景下训练，无法有效处理测试阶段出现的未知类别，且增量学习过程中存在资源消耗大和准确率下降的问题。
AI.method: 通过设置分类置信度阈值判断新类别存在性，结合轻量级重训练机制，在有限样本下实现增量学习，且对网络结构改动最小。
AI.result: 该方法在保持高分类准确率的同时，有效降低了资源消耗，并支持模型在开放集环境中自主扩展新类别。
AI.conclusion: 提出的置信度阈值方法为增量学习提供了高效解决方案，能够在开放集场景下实现准确率与资源利用的平衡。

search_text: Incremental Deep Neural Network Learning using Classification Confidence Thresholding 使用分类置信度阈值的增量深度神经网络学习 Most modern neural networks for classification fail to take into account the concept of the unknown. Trained neural networks are usually tested in an unrealistic scenario with only examples from a closed set of known classes. In an attempt to develop a more realistic model, the concept of working in an open set environment has been introduced. This in turn leads to the concept of incremental learning where a model with its own architecture and initial trained set of data can identify unknown classes during the testing phase and autonomously update itself if evidence of a new class is detected. Some problems that arise in incremental learning are inefficient use of resources to retrain the classifier repeatedly and the decrease of classification accuracy as multiple classes are added over time. This process of instantiating new classes is repeated as many times as necessary, accruing errors. To address these problems, this paper proposes the Classification Confidence Threshold approach to prime neural networks for incremental learning to keep accuracies high by limiting forgetting. A lean method is also used to reduce resources used in the retraining of the neural network. The proposed method is based on the idea that a network is able to incrementally learn a new class even when exposed to a limited number samples associated with the new class. This method can be applied to most existing neural networks with minimal changes to network architecture. 大多数用于分类的现代神经网络未能考虑未知的概念。经过训练的神经网络通常在不切实际的场景中进行测试，仅使用一组封闭的已知类别中的示例。为了开发更真实的模型，引入了在开放环境中工作的概念。这反过来又引出了增量学习的概念，其中具有自己的架构和初始训练数据集的模型可以在测试阶段识别未知类别，并在检测到新类别的证据时自动更新自身。增量学习中出现的一些问题是重复重新训练分类器时资源使用效率低下，以及随着时间的推移添加多个类别而导致分类精度下降。实例化新类的过程根据需要重复多次，从而产生错误。为了解决这些问题，本文提出了用于增量学习的素数神经网络的分类置信阈值方法，以通过限制遗忘来保持较高的准确性。精益方法还用于减少神经网络再训练中使用的资源。所提出的方法基于这样的想法：即使网络接触到与新类相关的有限数量的样本，网络也能够逐步学习新类。该方法可以应用于大多数现有的神经网络，只需对网络架构进行最小的改变。 本文提出了一种基于分类置信度阈值的增量深度神经网络学习方法，旨在解决传统封闭集分类模型在开放集环境下的未知类别识别与自主更新问题。 Justin Leo,Jugal Kalita cs.LG,cs.CL,cs.CV

title: Efficient Inference via Universal LSH Kernel
title_zh: 通过通用 LSH 内核进行高效推理
abstract: Large machine learning models achieve unprecedented performance on various tasks and have evolved as the go-to technique. However, deploying these compute and memory hungry models on resource constraint environments poses new challenges. In this work, we propose mathematically provable Representer Sketch, a concise set of count arrays that can approximate the inference procedure with simple hashing computations and aggregations. Representer Sketch builds upon the popular Representer Theorem from kernel literature, hence the name, providing a generic fundamental alternative to the problem of efficient inference that goes beyond the popular approach such as quantization, iterative pruning and knowledge distillation. A neural network function is transformed to its weighted kernel density representation, which can be very efficiently estimated with our sketching algorithm. Empirically, we show that Representer Sketch achieves up to 114x reduction in storage requirement and 59x reduction in computation complexity without any drop in accuracy.
summary: Large machine learning models achieve unprecedented performance on various tasks and have evolved as the go-to technique. However, deploying these compute and memory hungry models on resource constraint environments poses new challenges. In this work, we propose mathematically provable Representer Sketch, a concise set of count arrays that can approximate the inference procedure with simple hashing computations and aggregations. Representer Sketch builds upon the popular Representer Theorem from kernel literature, hence the name, providing a generic fundamental alternative to the problem of efficient inference that goes beyond the popular approach such as quantization, iterative pruning and knowledge distillation. A neural network function is transformed to its weighted kernel density representation, which can be very efficiently estimated with our sketching algorithm. Empirically, we show that Representer Sketch achieves up to 114x reduction in storage requirement and 59x reduction in computation complexity without any drop in accuracy.
abstract_zh: 大型机器学习模型在各种任务上实现了前所未有的性能，并已发展成为首选技术。然而，在资源有限的环境中部署这些需要大量计算和内存的模型带来了新的挑战。在这项工作中，我们提出了数学上可证明的 Representer Sketch，这是一组简洁的计数数组，可以通过简单的哈希计算和聚合来近似推理过程。 Representer Sketch 建立在内核文献中流行的表示定理（因此得名）的基础上，为高效推理问题提供了一种通用的基本替代方案，超越了量化、迭代剪枝和知识蒸馏等流行方法。神经网络函数被转换为其加权核密度表示，可以使用我们的草图算法非常有效地估计。根据经验，我们表明 Representer Sketch 可将存储要求降低 114 倍，将计算复杂度降低 59 倍，而精度没有任何下降。

AI.tldr: 提出一种高效推理方法，解决大型机器学习模型在资源受限环境中的部署问题。
AI.motivation: 大型模型虽性能优异，但计算和内存需求高，难以在资源受限设备上部署，现有方法如量化、剪枝等存在局限，需新的解决方案。
AI.method: 基于核方法的Representer定理，提出Representer Sketch，通过哈希计算和聚合，将神经网络转换为加权核密度表示，用计数数组近似推理过程。
AI.result: 存储需求减少114倍，计算复杂度降低59倍，且无精度损失。
AI.conclusion: 提出的方法为高效推理提供了通用且数学可证明的替代方案，优于现有技术，在资源受限场景下具有应用潜力。

authors_text: Huiwen Luo,Koki Nagano,Han-Wei Kung,Mclean Goldwhite,Qingguo Xu,Zejian Wang,Lingyu Wei,Liwen Hu,Hao Li
title: Normalized Avatar Synthesis Using StyleGAN and Perceptual Refinement
title_zh: 使用 StyleGAN 和感知细化进行标准化头像合成
comment: Accepted to CVPR 2021
comments: Accepted to CVPR 2021
abstract: We introduce a highly robust GAN-based framework for digitizing a normalized 3D avatar of a person from a single unconstrained photo. While the input image can be of a smiling person or taken in extreme lighting conditions, our method can reliably produce a high-quality textured model of a person's face in neutral expression and skin textures under diffuse lighting condition. Cutting-edge 3D face reconstruction methods use non-linear morphable face models combined with GAN-based decoders to capture the likeness and details of a person but fail to produce neutral head models with unshaded albedo textures which is critical for creating relightable and animation-friendly avatars for integration in virtual environments. The key challenges for existing methods to work is the lack of training and ground truth data containing normalized 3D faces. We propose a two-stage approach to address this problem. First, we adopt a highly robust normalized 3D face generator by embedding a non-linear morphable face model into a StyleGAN2 network. This allows us to generate detailed but normalized facial assets. This inference is then followed by a perceptual refinement step that uses the generated assets as regularization to cope with the limited available training samples of normalized faces. We further introduce a Normalized Face Dataset, which consists of a combination photogrammetry scans, carefully selected photographs, and generated fake people with neutral expressions in diffuse lighting conditions. While our prepared dataset contains two orders of magnitude less subjects than cutting edge GAN-based 3D facial reconstruction methods, we show that it is possible to produce high-quality normalized face models for very challenging unconstrained input images, and demonstrate superior performance to the current state-of-the-art.
summary: We introduce a highly robust GAN-based framework for digitizing a normalized 3D avatar of a person from a single unconstrained photo. While the input image can be of a smiling person or taken in extreme lighting conditions, our method can reliably produce a high-quality textured model of a person's face in neutral expression and skin textures under diffuse lighting condition. Cutting-edge 3D face reconstruction methods use non-linear morphable face models combined with GAN-based decoders to capture the likeness and details of a person but fail to produce neutral head models with unshaded albedo textures which is critical for creating relightable and animation-friendly avatars for integration in virtual environments. The key challenges for existing methods to work is the lack of training and ground truth data containing normalized 3D faces. We propose a two-stage approach to address this problem. First, we adopt a highly robust normalized 3D face generator by embedding a non-linear morphable face model into a StyleGAN2 network. This allows us to generate detailed but normalized facial assets. This inference is then followed by a perceptual refinement step that uses the generated assets as regularization to cope with the limited available training samples of normalized faces. We further introduce a Normalized Face Dataset, which consists of a combination photogrammetry scans, carefully selected photographs, and generated fake people with neutral expressions in diffuse lighting conditions. While our prepared dataset contains two orders of magnitude less subjects than cutting edge GAN-based 3D facial reconstruction methods, we show that it is possible to produce high-quality normalized face models for very challenging unconstrained input images, and demonstrate superior performance to the current state-of-the-art.
abstract_zh: 我们引入了一种高度稳健的基于 GAN 的框架，用于将单张无约束照片中的人的标准化 3D 头像数字化。虽然输入图像可以是微笑的人或在极端照明条件下拍摄的图像，但我们的方法可以可靠地生成中性表情的人脸和漫射照明条件下的皮肤纹理的高质量纹理模型。尖端的 3D 面部重建方法使用非线性可变形面部模型与基于 GAN 的解码器相结合来捕获人的相似性和细节，但无法生成具有无阴影反照率纹理的中性头部模型，这对于创建可重新照明且动画友好的化身以集成到虚拟环境中至关重要。现有方法的主要挑战是缺乏包含标准化 3D 人脸的训练和地面实况数据。我们提出了一个两阶段的方法来解决这个问题。首先，我们通过将非线性可变形面部模型嵌入到 StyleGAN2 网络中，采用高度鲁棒的归一化 3D 面部生成器。这使我们能够生成详细但标准化的面部资产。然后，该推理之后是感知细化步骤，该步骤使用生成的资产作为正则化，以应对归一化面部的有限可用训练样本。我们进一步引入了标准化人脸数据集，它由摄影测量扫描、精心挑选的照片的组合组成，并在漫射照明条件下生成具有中性表情的假人。虽然我们准备的数据集包含的主题比基于 GAN 的尖端 3D 面部重建方法少两个数量级，但我们表明可以为非常具有挑战性的无约束输入图像生成高质量的归一化面部模型，并展示出优于当前最先进技术的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于StyleGAN和感知优化的框架，用于从单张非受限照片中生成高质量的标准化3D人脸模型。
AI.motivation: 现有3D人脸重建方法难以生成适合虚拟环境使用的中性表情和无阴影纹理的标准化头像，主要受限于缺乏标准化3D人脸的训练数据。
AI.method: 采用两阶段方法：首先将非线性可变形人脸模型嵌入StyleGAN2生成标准化人脸资产，再通过感知优化步骤利用生成资产作为正则化项提升质量，并构建包含摄影测量扫描和生成数据的标准化人脸数据集。
AI.result: 在仅有现有方法1%规模数据集的情况下，成功生成高质量标准化人脸模型，且在复杂输入图像上表现优于当前最先进的方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过结合生成对抗网络与感知优化，即使在数据量有限的情况下也能有效生成适用于虚拟环境的高质量标准化3D人脸模型。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于StyleGAN和感知优化的框架，用于从单张非受限照片中生成高质量的标准化3D人脸模型。
ai_content.motivation: 现有3D人脸重建方法难以生成适合虚拟环境使用的中性表情和无阴影纹理的标准化头像，主要受限于缺乏标准化3D人脸的训练数据。
ai_content.method: 采用两阶段方法：首先将非线性可变形人脸模型嵌入StyleGAN2生成标准化人脸资产，再通过感知优化步骤利用生成资产作为正则化项提升质量，并构建包含摄影测量扫描和生成数据的标准化人脸数据集。
ai_content.result: 在仅有现有方法1%规模数据集的情况下，成功生成高质量标准化人脸模型，且在复杂输入图像上表现优于当前最先进的方法。
ai_content.conclusion: 通过结合生成对抗网络与感知优化，即使在数据量有限的情况下也能有效生成适用于虚拟环境的高质量标准化3D人脸模型。

search_text: Normalized Avatar Synthesis Using StyleGAN and Perceptual Refinement 使用 StyleGAN 和感知细化进行标准化头像合成 We introduce a highly robust GAN-based framework for digitizing a normalized 3D avatar of a person from a single unconstrained photo. While the input image can be of a smiling person or taken in extreme lighting conditions, our method can reliably produce a high-quality textured model of a person's face in neutral expression and skin textures under diffuse lighting condition. Cutting-edge 3D face reconstruction methods use non-linear morphable face models combined with GAN-based decoders to capture the likeness and details of a person but fail to produce neutral head models with unshaded albedo textures which is critical for creating relightable and animation-friendly avatars for integration in virtual environments. The key challenges for existing methods to work is the lack of training and ground truth data containing normalized 3D faces. We propose a two-stage approach to address this problem. First, we adopt a highly robust normalized 3D face generator by embedding a non-linear morphable face model into a StyleGAN2 network. This allows us to generate detailed but normalized facial assets. This inference is then followed by a perceptual refinement step that uses the generated assets as regularization to cope with the limited available training samples of normalized faces. We further introduce a Normalized Face Dataset, which consists of a combination photogrammetry scans, carefully selected photographs, and generated fake people with neutral expressions in diffuse lighting conditions. While our prepared dataset contains two orders of magnitude less subjects than cutting edge GAN-based 3D facial reconstruction methods, we show that it is possible to produce high-quality normalized face models for very challenging unconstrained input images, and demonstrate superior performance to the current state-of-the-art. 我们引入了一种高度稳健的基于 GAN 的框架，用于将单张无约束照片中的人的标准化 3D 头像数字化。虽然输入图像可以是微笑的人或在极端照明条件下拍摄的图像，但我们的方法可以可靠地生成中性表情的人脸和漫射照明条件下的皮肤纹理的高质量纹理模型。尖端的 3D 面部重建方法使用非线性可变形面部模型与基于 GAN 的解码器相结合来捕获人的相似性和细节，但无法生成具有无阴影反照率纹理的中性头部模型，这对于创建可重新照明且动画友好的化身以集成到虚拟环境中至关重要。现有方法的主要挑战是缺乏包含标准化 3D 人脸的训练和地面实况数据。我们提出了一个两阶段的方法来解决这个问题。首先，我们通过将非线性可变形面部模型嵌入到 StyleGAN2 网络中，采用高度鲁棒的归一化 3D 面部生成器。这使我们能够生成详细但标准化的面部资产。然后，该推理之后是感知细化步骤，该步骤使用生成的资产作为正则化，以应对归一化面部的有限可用训练样本。我们进一步引入了标准化人脸数据集，它由摄影测量扫描、精心挑选的照片的组合组成，并在漫射照明条件下生成具有中性表情的假人。虽然我们准备的数据集包含的主题比基于 GAN 的尖端 3D 面部重建方法少两个数量级，但我们表明可以为非常具有挑战性的无约束输入图像生成高质量的归一化面部模型，并展示出优于当前最先进技术的性能。 本文提出了一种基于StyleGAN和感知优化的框架，用于从单张非受限照片中生成高质量的标准化3D人脸模型。 Huiwen Luo,Koki Nagano,Han-Wei Kung,Mclean Goldwhite,Qingguo Xu,Zejian Wang,Lingyu Wei,Liwen Hu,Hao Li cs.CV,cs.GR

title: MODETR: Moving Object Detection with Transformers
title_zh: MODETR：使用 Transformer 进行移动物体检测
comment: ef:Machine Learning for Autonomous Driving Workshop at the 34th Conference on Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS 2020), Vancouver, Canada
comments: ef:Machine Learning for Autonomous Driving Workshop at the 34th Conference on Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS 2020), Vancouver, Canada
abstract: Moving Object Detection (MOD) is a crucial task for the Autonomous Driving pipeline. MOD is usually handled via 2-stream convolutional architectures that incorporates both appearance and motion cues, without considering the inter-relations between the spatial or motion features. In this paper, we tackle this problem through multi-head attention mechanisms, both across the spatial and motion streams. We propose MODETR; a Moving Object DEtection TRansformer network, comprised of multi-stream transformer encoders for both spatial and motion modalities, and an object transformer decoder that produces the moving objects bounding boxes using set predictions. The whole architecture is trained end-to-end using bi-partite loss. Several methods of incorporating motion cues with the Transformer model are explored, including two-stream RGB and Optical Flow (OF) methods, and multi-stream architectures that take advantage of sequence information. To incorporate the temporal information, we propose a new Temporal Positional Encoding (TPE) approach to extend the Spatial Positional Encoding(SPE) in DETR. We explore two architectural choices for that, balancing between speed and time. To evaluate the our network, we perform the MOD task on the KITTI MOD [6] data set. Results show significant 5% mAP of the Transformer network for MOD over the state-of-the art methods. Moreover, the proposed TPE encoding provides 10% mAP improvement over the SPE baseline.
summary: Moving Object Detection (MOD) is a crucial task for the Autonomous Driving pipeline. MOD is usually handled via 2-stream convolutional architectures that incorporates both appearance and motion cues, without considering the inter-relations between the spatial or motion features. In this paper, we tackle this problem through multi-head attention mechanisms, both across the spatial and motion streams. We propose MODETR; a Moving Object DEtection TRansformer network, comprised of multi-stream transformer encoders for both spatial and motion modalities, and an object transformer decoder that produces the moving objects bounding boxes using set predictions. The whole architecture is trained end-to-end using bi-partite loss. Several methods of incorporating motion cues with the Transformer model are explored, including two-stream RGB and Optical Flow (OF) methods, and multi-stream architectures that take advantage of sequence information. To incorporate the temporal information, we propose a new Temporal Positional Encoding (TPE) approach to extend the Spatial Positional Encoding(SPE) in DETR. We explore two architectural choices for that, balancing between speed and time. To evaluate the our network, we perform the MOD task on the KITTI MOD [6] data set. Results show significant 5% mAP of the Transformer network for MOD over the state-of-the art methods. Moreover, the proposed TPE encoding provides 10% mAP improvement over the SPE baseline.
abstract_zh: 移动物体检测（MOD）是自动驾驶管道的一项关键任务。 MOD 通常通过 2 流卷积架构进行处理，该架构结合了外观和运动线索，而不考虑空间或运动特征之间的相互关系。在本文中，我们通过跨空间流和运动流的多头注意力机制来解决这个问题。我们建议MODETR；移动对象检测变换器网络，由用于空间和运动模态的多流变换器编码器以及使用集合预测生成移动对象边界框的对象变换器解码器组成。整个架构使用双向损失进行端到端训练。探索了将运动线索与 Transformer 模型相结合的几种方法，包括双流 RGB 和光流 (OF) 方法，以及利用序列信息的多流架构。为了合并时间信息，我们提出了一种新的时间位置编码（TPE）方法来扩展 DETR 中的空间位置编码（SPE）。为此，我们探索了两种架构选择，在速度和时间之间取得平衡。为了评估我们的网络，我们在 KITTI MOD [6] 数据集上执行 MOD 任务。结果显示，与最先进的方法相比，MOD 的 Transformer 网络的 mAP 显着提高了 5%。此外，所提出的 TPE 编码比 SPE 基线提供 10% 的 mAP 改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MODETR，一种基于Transformer的移动物体检测网络，旨在改进自动驾驶中的移动物体检测任务。
AI.motivation: 传统方法通过双流卷积网络处理外观和运动线索，但未考虑空间或运动特征之间的相互关系，限制了检测性能。
AI.method: 设计多流Transformer编码器处理空间和运动模态，结合对象解码器生成边界框；引入双流RGB和光流方法，以及序列信息利用的多流架构；提出新的时间位置编码（TPE）以增强时序信息建模。
AI.result: 在KITTI MOD数据集上，MODETR较现有方法提升5% mAP，TPE编码较基线SPE提升10% mAP。
AI.conclusion: 通过整合空间与运动特征的Transformer架构及改进的时间编码，MODETR在移动物体检测任务中实现了显著性能提升。

authors_text: Yuanbo Hou,Zhesong Yu,Xia Liang,Xingjian Du,Bilei Zhu,Zejun Ma,Dick Botteldooren
title: Attention-based cross-modal fusion for audio-visual voice activity detection in musical video streams
title_zh: 基于注意力的跨模态融合，用于音乐视频流中的视听语音活动检测
comment: Accepted by INTERSPEECH 2021
comments: Accepted by INTERSPEECH 2021
abstract: Many previous audio-visual voice-related works focus on speech, ignoring the singing voice in the growing number of musical video streams on the Internet. For processing diverse musical video data, voice activity detection is a necessary step. This paper attempts to detect the speech and singing voices of target performers in musical video streams using audiovisual information. To integrate information of audio and visual modalities, a multi-branch network is proposed to learn audio and image representations, and the representations are fused by attention based on semantic similarity to shape the acoustic representations through the probability of anchor vocalization. Experiments show the proposed audio-visual multi-branch network far outperforms the audio-only model in challenging acoustic environments, indicating the cross-modal information fusion based on semantic correlation is sensible and successful.
summary: Many previous audio-visual voice-related works focus on speech, ignoring the singing voice in the growing number of musical video streams on the Internet. For processing diverse musical video data, voice activity detection is a necessary step. This paper attempts to detect the speech and singing voices of target performers in musical video streams using audiovisual information. To integrate information of audio and visual modalities, a multi-branch network is proposed to learn audio and image representations, and the representations are fused by attention based on semantic similarity to shape the acoustic representations through the probability of anchor vocalization. Experiments show the proposed audio-visual multi-branch network far outperforms the audio-only model in challenging acoustic environments, indicating the cross-modal information fusion based on semantic correlation is sensible and successful.
abstract_zh: 以往许多视听声音相关的作品都专注于语音，而忽略了互联网上越来越多的音乐视频流中的歌声。为了处理多样化的音乐视频数据，语音活动检测是必要的步骤。本文尝试利用视听信息检测音乐视频流中目标表演者的语音和歌声。为了整合音频和视觉模态的信息，提出了一个多分支网络来学习音频和图像表示，并且基于语义相似性通过注意融合表示，通过锚发声的概率来塑造声学表示。实验表明，在具有挑战性的声学环境中，所提出的视听多分支网络远远优于纯音频模型，这表明基于语义相关性的跨模态信息融合是明智且成功的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于注意力的跨模态融合方法，用于在音乐视频流中检测目标表演者的语音和歌唱声。
AI.motivation: 现有音频-视觉语音研究多聚焦于普通语音，忽视了音乐视频中日益增长的歌唱声检测需求，需融合多模态信息提升检测效果。
AI.method: 设计多分支网络分别提取音频和视觉特征，通过语义相似性注意力机制融合模态信息，并利用锚点发声概率优化声学表示。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在复杂声学环境下的检测性能显著优于仅使用音频的模型。
AI.conclusion: 基于语义关联的跨模态信息融合策略有效提升了音乐视频流中语音活动检测的准确性。

method: 设计多分支网络分别提取音频和视觉特征，通过语义相似性注意力机制融合模态信息，并利用锚点发声概率优化声学表示。
result: 实验表明，该方法在复杂声学环境下的检测性能显著优于仅使用音频的模型。
conclusion: 基于语义关联的跨模态信息融合策略有效提升了音乐视频流中语音活动检测的准确性。
search_text: Attention-based cross-modal fusion for audio-visual voice activity detection in musical video streams 基于注意力的跨模态融合，用于音乐视频流中的视听语音活动检测 Many previous audio-visual voice-related works focus on speech, ignoring the singing voice in the growing number of musical video streams on the Internet. For processing diverse musical video data, voice activity detection is a necessary step. This paper attempts to detect the speech and singing voices of target performers in musical video streams using audiovisual information. To integrate information of audio and visual modalities, a multi-branch network is proposed to learn audio and image representations, and the representations are fused by attention based on semantic similarity to shape the acoustic representations through the probability of anchor vocalization. Experiments show the proposed audio-visual multi-branch network far outperforms the audio-only model in challenging acoustic environments, indicating the cross-modal information fusion based on semantic correlation is sensible and successful. 以往许多视听声音相关的作品都专注于语音，而忽略了互联网上越来越多的音乐视频流中的歌声。为了处理多样化的音乐视频数据，语音活动检测是必要的步骤。本文尝试利用视听信息检测音乐视频流中目标表演者的语音和歌声。为了整合音频和视觉模态的信息，提出了一个多分支网络来学习音频和图像表示，并且基于语义相似性通过注意融合表示，通过锚发声的概率来塑造声学表示。实验表明，在具有挑战性的声学环境中，所提出的视听多分支网络远远优于纯音频模型，这表明基于语义相关性的跨模态信息融合是明智且成功的。 本文提出一种基于注意力的跨模态融合方法，用于在音乐视频流中检测目标表演者的语音和歌唱声。 Yuanbo Hou,Zhesong Yu,Xia Liang,Xingjian Du,Bilei Zhu,Zejun Ma,Dick Botteldooren cs.SD,eess.AS

title: Spatio-Temporal Multi-Task Learning Transformer for Joint Moving Object Detection and Segmentation
title_zh: 用于联合运动物体检测和分割的时空多任务学习变压器
abstract: Moving objects have special importance for Autonomous Driving tasks. Detecting moving objects can be posed as Moving Object Segmentation, by segmenting the object pixels, or Moving Object Detection, by generating a bounding box for the moving targets. In this paper, we present a Multi-Task Learning architecture, based on Transformers, to jointly perform both tasks through one network. Due to the importance of the motion features to the task, the whole setup is based on a Spatio-Temporal aggregation. We evaluate the performance of the individual tasks architecture versus the MTL setup, both with early shared encoders, and late shared encoder-decoder transformers. For the latter, we present a novel joint tasks query decoder transformer, that enables us to have tasks dedicated heads out of the shared model. To evaluate our approach, we use the KITTI MOD [29] data set. Results show1.5% mAP improvement for Moving Object Detection, and 2%IoU improvement for Moving Object Segmentation, over the individual tasks networks.
summary: Moving objects have special importance for Autonomous Driving tasks. Detecting moving objects can be posed as Moving Object Segmentation, by segmenting the object pixels, or Moving Object Detection, by generating a bounding box for the moving targets. In this paper, we present a Multi-Task Learning architecture, based on Transformers, to jointly perform both tasks through one network. Due to the importance of the motion features to the task, the whole setup is based on a Spatio-Temporal aggregation. We evaluate the performance of the individual tasks architecture versus the MTL setup, both with early shared encoders, and late shared encoder-decoder transformers. For the latter, we present a novel joint tasks query decoder transformer, that enables us to have tasks dedicated heads out of the shared model. To evaluate our approach, we use the KITTI MOD [29] data set. Results show1.5% mAP improvement for Moving Object Detection, and 2%IoU improvement for Moving Object Segmentation, over the individual tasks networks.
abstract_zh: 移动物体对于自动驾驶任务特别重要。检测移动对象可以通过分割对象像素来构成移动对象分割，或者通过为移动目标生成边界框来构成移动对象检测。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于 Transformer 的多任务学习架构，通过一个网络联合执行这两项任务。由于运动特征对任务的重要性，整个设置基于时空聚合。我们评估了单个任务架构与 MTL 设置的性能，两者均使用早期共享编码器和晚期共享编码器-解码器转换器。对于后者，我们提出了一种新颖的联合任务查询解码器转换器，它使我们能够在共享模型之外拥有任务专用头。为了评估我们的方法，我们使用 KITTI MOD [29] 数据集。结果显示，在各个任务网络中，运动物体检测的 mAP 提高了 1.5%，运动物体分割的 IoU 提高了 2%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于Transformer的时空多任务学习架构，用于联合完成移动物体检测与分割任务。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶中移动物体检测与分割需同时获取目标位置与形态信息，传统独立处理方式存在信息冗余与效率低下问题，需通过多任务学习共享特征提升性能。
AI.method: 设计时空聚合机制的Transformer架构，采用早期共享编码器与晚期共享编码器-解码器结构，创新提出联合任务查询解码器实现多任务头的特征解耦。
AI.result: 在KITTI MOD数据集上，相较单任务网络实现移动物体检测mAP提升1.5%，分割任务IoU提升2%。
AI.conclusion: 时空多任务学习框架能有效融合运动特征，通过共享编码与解耦解码机制提升检测分割协同性能，验证了多任务联合优化在自动驾驶感知中的有效性。

authors_text: Arman Dehpanah,Muheeb Faizan Ghori,Jonathan Gemmell,Bamshad Mobasher
title: Evaluating Team Skill Aggregation in Online Competitive Games
title_zh: 在线竞技游戏中团队技能聚合的评估
comment: Accepted in IEEE Conference on Games 2021
comments: Accepted in IEEE Conference on Games 2021
abstract: One of the main goals of online competitive games is increasing player engagement by ensuring fair matches. These games use rating systems for creating balanced match-ups. Rating systems leverage statistical estimation to rate players' skills and use skill ratings to predict rank before matching players. Skill ratings of individual players can be aggregated to compute the skill level of a team. While research often aims to improve the accuracy of skill estimation and fairness of match-ups, less attention has been given to how the skill level of a team is calculated from the skill level of its members. In this paper, we propose two new aggregation methods and compare them with a standard approach extensively used in the research literature. We present an exhaustive analysis of the impact of these methods on the predictive performance of rating systems. We perform our experiments using three popular rating systems, Elo, Glicko, and TrueSkill, on three real-world datasets including over 100,000 battle royale and head-to-head matches. Our evaluations show the superiority of the MAX method over the other two methods in the majority of the tested cases, implying that the overall performance of a team is best determined by the performance of its most skilled member. The results of this study highlight the necessity of devising more elaborated methods for calculating a team's performance -- methods covering different aspects of players' behavior such as skills, strategy, or goals.

Rating systems leverage statistical estimation to rate players' skills and use skill ratings to predict rank before matching players. Skill ratings of individual players can be aggregated to compute the skill level of a team. In this paper, we propose two new aggregation methods and compare them with a standard approach extensively used in the research literature. We present an exhaustive analysis of the impact of these methods on the predictive performance of rating systems. We perform our experiments using three popular rating systems, Elo, Glicko, and TrueSkill, on three real-world datasets including over 100,000 battle royale and head-to-head matches. Our evaluations show the superiority of the MAX method over the other two methods in the majority of the tested cases, implying that the overall performance of a team is best determined by the performance of its most skilled member. The results of this study highlight the necessity of devising more elaborated methods for calculating a team's performance -- methods covering different aspects of players' behavior such as skills, strategy, or goals.
abstract_zh: 在线竞技游戏的主要目标之一是通过确保公平比赛来提高玩家参与度。这些游戏使用评级系统来创建平衡的比赛。评级系统利用统计估计来评估玩家的技能，并在匹配玩家之前使用技能评级来预测排名。可以汇总各个球员的技能等级来计算团队的技能水平。虽然研究通常旨在提高技能评估的准确性和比赛的公平性，但很少关注如何根据成员的技能水平计算团队的技能水平。在本文中，我们提出了两种新的聚合方法，并将它们与研究文献中广泛使用的标准方法进行比较。我们对这些方法对评级系统预测性能的影响进行了详尽的分析。我们使用三种流行的评级系统 Elo、Glicko 和 TrueSkill 在三个真实数据集（包括超过 100,000 场大逃杀和面对面比赛）上进行实验。我们的评估表明，在大多数测试案例中，MAX 方法优于其他两种方法，这意味着团队的整体绩效最好由最熟练成员的绩效决定。这项研究的结果强调了设计更详细的方法来计算团队绩效的必要性，这些方法涵盖了球员行为的不同方面，例如技能、策略或目标。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在线竞技游戏中团队技能聚合方法的有效性，提出了两种新方法并进行对比分析。
AI.motivation: 现有评级系统侧重个体技能估计，但团队技能聚合方法研究不足，影响匹配公平性与预测准确性。
AI.method: 提出两种团队技能聚合方法（MAX等），与Elo、Glicko、TrueSkill等主流系统对比，基于10万+真实对战数据验证效果。
AI.result: MAX方法在多数测试场景中表现最优，表明团队整体表现主要由最熟练成员决定。
AI.conclusion: 需开发更精细的团队性能计算方法，综合考虑技能、策略等多维度因素。

title: BiAdam: Fast Adaptive Bilevel Optimization Methods
title_zh: BiAdam：快速自适应双层优化方法
comment: 25 pages, 1 table and 7 figures
comments: 25 pages, 1 table and 7 figures
abstract: Bilevel optimization recently has attracted increased interest in machine learning due to its many applications such as hyper-parameter optimization and meta learning. Although many bilevel methods recently have been proposed, these methods do not consider using adaptive learning rates. It is well known that adaptive learning rates can accelerate optimization algorithms. To fill this gap, in the paper, we propose a novel fast adaptive bilevel framework to solve stochastic bilevel optimization problems that the outer problem is possibly nonconvex and the inner problem is strongly convex. Our framework uses unified adaptive matrices including many types of adaptive learning rates, and can flexibly use the momentum and variance reduced techniques. In particular, we provide a useful convergence analysis framework for the bilevel optimization. Specifically, we propose a fast single-loop adaptive bilevel optimization (BiAdam) algorithm, which achieves a sample complexity of $\tilde{O}(ε^{-4})$ for finding an $ε$-stationary solution. Meanwhile, we propose an accelerated version of BiAdam algorithm (VR-BiAdam), which reaches the best known sample complexity of $\tilde{O}(ε^{-3})$. To the best of our knowledge, we first study the adaptive bilevel optimization methods with adaptive learning rates. Experimental results on data hyper-cleaning and hyper-representation learning tasks demonstrate the efficiency of our algorithms.
summary: Bilevel optimization recently has attracted increased interest in machine learning due to its many applications such as hyper-parameter optimization and meta learning. Although many bilevel methods recently have been proposed, these methods do not consider using adaptive learning rates. It is well known that adaptive learning rates can accelerate optimization algorithms. To fill this gap, in the paper, we propose a novel fast adaptive bilevel framework to solve stochastic bilevel optimization problems that the outer problem is possibly nonconvex and the inner problem is strongly convex. Our framework uses unified adaptive matrices including many types of adaptive learning rates, and can flexibly use the momentum and variance reduced techniques. In particular, we provide a useful convergence analysis framework for the bilevel optimization. Specifically, we propose a fast single-loop adaptive bilevel optimization (BiAdam) algorithm, which achieves a sample complexity of $\tilde{O}(ε^{-4})$ for finding an $ε$-stationary solution. Meanwhile, we propose an accelerated version of BiAdam algorithm (VR-BiAdam), which reaches the best known sample complexity of $\tilde{O}(ε^{-3})$. To the best of our knowledge, we first study the adaptive bilevel optimization methods with adaptive learning rates. Experimental results on data hyper-cleaning and hyper-representation learning tasks demonstrate the efficiency of our algorithms.
abstract_zh: 由于其许多应用（例如超参数优化和元学习），双层优化最近引起了人们对机器学习越来越多的兴趣。尽管最近提出了许多双层方法，但这些方法没有考虑使用自适应学习率。众所周知，自适应学习率可以加速优化算法。为了填补这一空白，在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的快速自适应双层框架来解决外部问题可能是非凸的而内部问题是强凸的随机双层优化问题。我们的框架使用统一的自适应矩阵，包括多种类型的自适应学习率，并且可以灵活地使用动量和方差减少技术。特别是，我们为双层优化提供了一个有用的收敛分析框架。具体来说，我们提出了一种快速单循环自适应双层优化（BiAdam）算法，该算法实现了 $\tilde{O}(ε^{-4})$ 的样本复杂度，以找到 $ε$-平稳解。同时，我们提出了 BiAdam 算法的加速版本（VR-BiAdam），它达到了最著名的样本复杂度 $\tilde{O}(ε^{-3})$。据我们所知，我们首先研究具有自适应学习率的自适应双层优化方法。数据超清理和超表示学习任务的实验结果证明了我们算法的效率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为BiAdam的快速自适应双层优化框架，用于解决外层可能非凸、内层强凸的随机双层优化问题，并设计了两种算法变体。
AI.motivation: 现有双层优化方法未考虑自适应学习率，而自适应学习率能显著加速优化过程，因此需要填补这一研究空白。
AI.method: 构建统一自适应矩阵框架，融合动量和方差缩减技术，提出单循环BiAdam算法及加速版VR-BiAdam算法，并建立收敛性分析框架。
AI.result: BiAdam达到$\	ilde{O}(ε^{-4})$样本复杂度，VR-BiAdam达到最优的$\	ilde{O}(ε^{-3})$复杂度，实验验证了算法在超参数清洗和表示学习任务中的高效性。
AI.conclusion: 首次系统研究自适应双层优化方法，提出的算法在理论保证和实际效率上均优于现有方法。

authors_text: Agatha C. H. de Mattos,Gavin McArdle,Michela Bertolotto
title: Mapping Slums with Medium Resolution Satellite Imagery: a Comparative Analysis of Multi-Spectral Data and Grey-level Co-occurrence Matrix Techniques
title_zh: 用中分辨率卫星图像绘制贫民窟地图：多光谱数据和灰度共生矩阵技术的比较分析
comment: Accepted at the 3rd Workshop on Artificial Intelligence for Social Good (IJCAI 2021)
comments: Accepted at the 3rd Workshop on Artificial Intelligence for Social Good (IJCAI 2021)
abstract: The UN-Habitat estimates that over one billion people live in slums around the world. However, state-of-the-art techniques to detect the location of slum areas employ high-resolution satellite imagery, which is costly to obtain and process. As a result, researchers have started to look at utilising free and open-access medium resolution satellite imagery. Yet, there is no clear consensus on which data preparation and machine learning approaches are the most appropriate to use with such imagery data. In this paper, we evaluate two techniques (multi-spectral data and grey-level co-occurrence matrix feature extraction) on an open-access dataset consisting of labelled Sentinel-2 images with a spatial resolution of 10 meters. Both techniques were paired with a canonical correlation forests classifier. The results show that the grey-level co-occurrence matrix performed better than multi-spectral data for all four cities. It had an average accuracy for the slum class of 97% and a mean intersection over union of 94%, while multi-spectral data had 75% and 64% for the respective metrics. These results indicate that open-access satellite imagery with a resolution of at least 10 meters may be suitable for keeping track of development goals such as the detection of slums in cities.
summary: The UN-Habitat estimates that over one billion people live in slums around the world. However, state-of-the-art techniques to detect the location of slum areas employ high-resolution satellite imagery, which is costly to obtain and process. As a result, researchers have started to look at utilising free and open-access medium resolution satellite imagery. Yet, there is no clear consensus on which data preparation and machine learning approaches are the most appropriate to use with such imagery data. In this paper, we evaluate two techniques (multi-spectral data and grey-level co-occurrence matrix feature extraction) on an open-access dataset consisting of labelled Sentinel-2 images with a spatial resolution of 10 meters. Both techniques were paired with a canonical correlation forests classifier. The results show that the grey-level co-occurrence matrix performed better than multi-spectral data for all four cities. It had an average accuracy for the slum class of 97% and a mean intersection over union of 94%, while multi-spectral data had 75% and 64% for the respective metrics. These results indicate that open-access satellite imagery with a resolution of at least 10 meters may be suitable for keeping track of development goals such as the detection of slums in cities.
abstract_zh: 联合国人居署估计，世界各地有超过十亿人生活在贫民窟中。然而，检测贫民窟区域位置的最先进技术采用高分辨率卫星图像，获取和处理这些图像的成本很高。因此，研究人员开始考虑利用免费和开放获取的中分辨率卫星图像。然而，对于哪种数据准备和机器学习方法最适合用于此类图像数据，尚未达成明确共识。在本文中，我们在由空间分辨率为 10 米的标记 Sentinel-2 图像组成的开放数据集上评估了两种技术（多光谱数据和灰度共生矩阵特征提取）。这两种技术都与规范相关森林分类器配对。结果表明，对于所有四个城市，灰度共生矩阵的表现均优于多光谱数据。它对贫民窟类别的平均准确度为 97%，联合的平均交集准确度为 94%，而多光谱数据的各个指标的准确度分别为 75% 和 64%。这些结果表明，分辨率至少为 10 米的开放获取卫星图像可能适合跟踪发展目标，例如探测城市贫民窟。

AI.tldr: 本文评估了两种利用10米分辨率Sentinel-2卫星影像检测贫民窟的方法：多光谱数据与灰度共生矩阵特征提取。
AI.motivation: 联合国人居署数据显示全球超10亿人生活在贫民窟，但现有高分辨率卫星影像检测方法成本高昂，需探索低成本的中分辨率影像解决方案。
AI.method: 使用标注的Sentinel-2影像数据集，将多光谱数据与灰度共生矩阵特征提取方法分别结合典型相关森林分类器进行对比实验。
AI.result: 灰度共生矩阵方法在四个城市测试中平均准确率达97%，交并比均值94%，显著优于多光谱数据的75%和64%。
AI.conclusion: 10米分辨率的开放卫星影像可有效用于贫民窟监测，为可持续发展目标提供可行的技术路径。

title: A Turing Test for Transparency
title_zh: 透明度的图灵测试
comment: Published in Proceedings of the ICML Workshop on Theoretical Foundations, Criticism, and Application Trends of Explainable AI held in conjunction with the 38th International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML)
comments: Published in Proceedings of the ICML Workshop on Theoretical Foundations, Criticism, and Application Trends of Explainable AI held in conjunction with the 38th International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML)
abstract: A central goal of explainable artificial intelligence (XAI) is to improve the trust relationship in human-AI interaction. One assumption underlying research in transparent AI systems is that explanations help to better assess predictions of machine learning (ML) models, for instance by enabling humans to identify wrong predictions more efficiently. Recent empirical evidence however shows that explanations can have the opposite effect: When presenting explanations of ML predictions humans often tend to trust ML predictions even when these are wrong. Experimental evidence suggests that this effect can be attributed to how intuitive, or human, an AI or explanation appears. This effect challenges the very goal of XAI and implies that responsible usage of transparent AI methods has to consider the ability of humans to distinguish machine generated from human explanations. Here we propose a quantitative metric for XAI methods based on Turing's imitation game, a Turing Test for Transparency. A human interrogator is asked to judge whether an explanation was generated by a human or by an XAI method. Explanations of XAI methods that can not be detected by humans above chance performance in this binary classification task are passing the test. Detecting such explanations is a requirement for assessing and calibrating the trust relationship in human-AI interaction. We present experimental results on a crowd-sourced text classification task demonstrating that even for basic ML models and XAI approaches most participants were not able to differentiate human from machine generated explanations. We discuss ethical and practical implications of our results for applications of transparent ML.

We present experimental results on a crowd-sourced text classification task demonstrating that even for basic ML models and XAI approaches most participants were not able to differentiate human from machine generated explanations. We discuss ethical and practical implications of our results for applications of transparent ML.
abstract_zh: 可解释人工智能（XAI）的中心目标是改善人机交互中的信任关系。透明人工智能系统研究的一个假设是，解释有助于更好地评估机器学习（ML）模型的预测，例如使人类能够更有效地识别错误的预测。然而，最近的经验证据表明，解释可能会产生相反的效果：在对机器学习预测进行解释时，人们往往倾向于相信机器学习预测，即使这些预测是错误的。实验证据表明，这种效应可以归因于人工智能或解释的直观性或人性化程度。这种效应挑战了 XAI 的目标，并意味着负责任地使用透明人工智能方法必须考虑人类区分机器生成和人类解释的能力。在这里，我们提出了基于图灵模仿游戏的 XAI 方法的定量度量，即图灵透明度测试。人类询问者被要求判断解释是由人类还是由 XAI 方法生成的。在这个二元分类任务中，人类无法检测到高于机会性能的 XAI 方法的解释正在通过测试。检测此类解释是评估和校准人机交互中信任关系的要求。我们展示了众包文本分类任务的实验结果，表明即使对于基本的 ML 模型和 XAI 方法，大多数参与者也无法区分人类和机器生成的解释。我们讨论了我们的结果对透明机器学习应用的伦理和实际影响。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于图灵测试的透明度评估方法，用于衡量可解释人工智能（XAI）方法是否能让人类区分机器生成的解释与人类解释。
AI.motivation: 现有透明AI研究假设解释能提升人类对AI预测的信任，但实验证明人类可能过度信任错误预测的AI解释，这挑战了XAI的核心目标，需评估人类区分机器与人类解释的能力。
AI.method: 设计二分类任务，让人类判断解释来源（人类或XAI方法），若人类无法显著区分则视为通过测试，以此量化XAI方法的透明度。
AI.result: 在文本分类任务中，多数参与者无法区分人类与机器生成的解释，即使使用基础ML模型和XAI方法。
AI.conclusion: 该测试为评估XAI方法提供了关键指标，揭示当前透明AI可能高估人类信任校准能力，需在伦理和实践中重新审视解释的设计与应用。

search_text: A Turing Test for Transparency 透明度的图灵测试 A central goal of explainable artificial intelligence (XAI) is to improve the trust relationship in human-AI interaction. One assumption underlying research in transparent AI systems is that explanations help to better assess predictions of machine learning (ML) models, for instance by enabling humans to identify wrong predictions more efficiently. Recent empirical evidence however shows that explanations can have the opposite effect: When presenting explanations of ML predictions humans often tend to trust ML predictions even when these are wrong. Experimental evidence suggests that this effect can be attributed to how intuitive, or human, an AI or explanation appears. This effect challenges the very goal of XAI and implies that responsible usage of transparent AI methods has to consider the ability of humans to distinguish machine generated from human explanations. Here we propose a quantitative metric for XAI methods based on Turing's imitation game, a Turing Test for Transparency. A human interrogator is asked to judge whether an explanation was generated by a human or by an XAI method. Explanations of XAI methods that can not be detected by humans above chance performance in this binary classification task are passing the test. Detecting such explanations is a requirement for assessing and calibrating the trust relationship in human-AI interaction. We present experimental results on a crowd-sourced text classification task demonstrating that even for basic ML models and XAI approaches most participants were not able to differentiate human from machine generated explanations. We discuss ethical and practical implications of our results for applications of transparent ML. 可解释人工智能（XAI）的中心目标是改善人机交互中的信任关系。透明人工智能系统研究的一个假设是，解释有助于更好地评估机器学习（ML）模型的预测，例如使人类能够更有效地识别错误的预测。然而，最近的经验证据表明，解释可能会产生相反的效果：在对机器学习预测进行解释时，人们往往倾向于相信机器学习预测，即使这些预测是错误的。实验证据表明，这种效应可以归因于人工智能或解释的直观性或人性化程度。这种效应挑战了 XAI 的目标，并意味着负责任地使用透明人工智能方法必须考虑人类区分机器生成和人类解释的能力。在这里，我们提出了基于图灵模仿游戏的 XAI 方法的定量度量，即图灵透明度测试。人类询问者被要求判断解释是由人类还是由 XAI 方法生成的。在这个二元分类任务中，人类无法检测到高于机会性能的 XAI 方法的解释正在通过测试。检测此类解释是评估和校准人机交互中信任关系的要求。我们展示了众包文本分类任务的实验结果，表明即使对于基本的 ML 模型和 XAI 方法，大多数参与者也无法区分人类和机器生成的解释。我们讨论了我们的结果对透明机器学习应用的伦理和实际影响。 本文提出一种基于图灵测试的透明度评估方法，用于衡量可解释人工智能（XAI）方法是否能让人类区分机器生成的解释与人类解释。 Felix Biessmann,Viktor Treu cs.AI,cs.HC

authors_text: Saeed Mahloujifar,Huseyin A. Inan,Melissa Chase,Esha Ghosh,Marcello Hasegawa
title: Membership Inference on Word Embedding and Beyond
title_zh: 词嵌入及其他方面的成员资格推断
abstract: In the text processing context, most ML models are built on word embeddings. These embeddings are themselves trained on some datasets, potentially containing sensitive data. In some cases this training is done independently, in other cases, it occurs as part of training a larger, task-specific model. In either case, it is of interest to consider membership inference attacks based on the embedding layer as a way of understanding sensitive information leakage. But, somewhat surprisingly, membership inference attacks on word embeddings and their effect in other natural language processing (NLP) tasks that use these embeddings, have remained relatively unexplored. In this work, we show that word embeddings are vulnerable to black-box membership inference attacks under realistic assumptions. Furthermore, we show that this leakage persists through two other major NLP applications: classification and text-generation, even when the embedding layer is not exposed to the attacker. We show that our MI attack achieves high attack accuracy against a classifier model and an LSTM-based language model. Indeed, our attack is a cheaper membership inference attack on text-generative models, which does not require the knowledge of the target model or any expensive training of text-generative models as shadow models.
summary: In the text processing context, most ML models are built on word embeddings. These embeddings are themselves trained on some datasets, potentially containing sensitive data. In some cases this training is done independently, in other cases, it occurs as part of training a larger, task-specific model. In either case, it is of interest to consider membership inference attacks based on the embedding layer as a way of understanding sensitive information leakage. But, somewhat surprisingly, membership inference attacks on word embeddings and their effect in other natural language processing (NLP) tasks that use these embeddings, have remained relatively unexplored. In this work, we show that word embeddings are vulnerable to black-box membership inference attacks under realistic assumptions. Furthermore, we show that this leakage persists through two other major NLP applications: classification and text-generation, even when the embedding layer is not exposed to the attacker. We show that our MI attack achieves high attack accuracy against a classifier model and an LSTM-based language model. Indeed, our attack is a cheaper membership inference attack on text-generative models, which does not require the knowledge of the target model or any expensive training of text-generative models as shadow models.
abstract_zh: 在文本处理环境中，大多数机器学习模型都是基于词嵌入构建的。这些嵌入本身是在某些数据集上进行训练的，可能包含敏感数据。在某些情况下，这种训练是独立完成的，而在其他情况下，它是作为训练更大的特定任务模型的一部分进行的。在任何一种情况下，考虑基于嵌入层的成员推理攻击作为理解敏感信息泄漏的一种方式都是有意义的。但是，有些令人惊讶的是，对词嵌入的成员推理攻击及其在使用这些嵌入的其他自然语言处理 (NLP) 任务中的影响仍然相对未经探索。在这项工作中，我们证明了在现实假设下，词嵌入很容易受到黑盒成员推理攻击。此外，我们表明，即使嵌入层没有暴露给攻击者，这种泄漏仍然存在于另外两个主要的 NLP 应用中：分类和文本生成。我们表明，我们的 MI 攻击针对分类器模型和基于 LSTM 的语言模型实现了很高的攻击准确性。事实上，我们的攻击是对文本生成模型的更便宜的成员推理攻击，它不需要目标模型的知识或对文本生成模型作为影子模型进行任何昂贵的训练。

AI.tldr: 本文研究词嵌入模型及其在自然语言处理任务中的成员推理攻击漏洞，证明即使不暴露嵌入层，攻击者仍能通过黑盒攻击推断敏感数据。
AI.motivation: 词嵌入模型常基于包含敏感信息的数据集训练，但现有研究未充分探讨其成员推理攻击风险及对下游NLP任务的影响。
AI.method: 提出针对词嵌入的黑盒成员推理攻击方法，并验证该攻击在分类和文本生成任务中的有效性，无需目标模型知识或昂贵的影子模型训练。
AI.result: 攻击在分类模型和LSTM语言模型上均达到高准确率，证明嵌入层敏感信息泄露会渗透至下游应用。
AI.conclusion: 词嵌入及基于其的NLP模型存在隐私泄露风险，需加强模型训练和部署阶段的隐私保护机制。

ai_content.tldr: 本文研究词嵌入模型及其在自然语言处理任务中的成员推理攻击漏洞，证明即使不暴露嵌入层，攻击者仍能通过黑盒攻击推断敏感数据。

title: BEyond observation: an approach for ObjectNav
title_zh: 超越观察：ObjectNav 的一种方法
comment: Presented at the 2th Embodied AI Workshop at CVPR 2021
comments: Presented at the 2th Embodied AI Workshop at CVPR 2021
abstract: With the rise of automation, unmanned vehicles became a hot topic both as commercial products and as a scientific research topic. It composes a multi-disciplinary field of robotics that encompasses embedded systems, control theory, path planning, Simultaneous Localization and Mapping (SLAM), scene reconstruction, and pattern recognition. In this work, we present our exploratory research of how sensor data fusion and state-of-the-art machine learning algorithms can perform the Embodied Artificial Intelligence (E-AI) task called Visual Semantic Navigation. This task, a.k.a Object-Goal Navigation (ObjectNav) consists of autonomous navigation using egocentric visual observations to reach an object belonging to the target semantic class without prior knowledge of the environment. Our method reached fourth place on the Habitat Challenge 2021 ObjectNav on the Minival phase and the Test-Standard Phase.
summary: With the rise of automation, unmanned vehicles became a hot topic both as commercial products and as a scientific research topic. It composes a multi-disciplinary field of robotics that encompasses embedded systems, control theory, path planning, Simultaneous Localization and Mapping (SLAM), scene reconstruction, and pattern recognition. In this work, we present our exploratory research of how sensor data fusion and state-of-the-art machine learning algorithms can perform the Embodied Artificial Intelligence (E-AI) task called Visual Semantic Navigation. This task, a.k.a Object-Goal Navigation (ObjectNav) consists of autonomous navigation using egocentric visual observations to reach an object belonging to the target semantic class without prior knowledge of the environment. Our method reached fourth place on the Habitat Challenge 2021 ObjectNav on the Minival phase and the Test-Standard Phase.
abstract_zh: 随着自动化的兴起，无人驾驶汽车成为商业产品和科学研究的热门话题。它构成了机器人技术的多学科领域，涵盖嵌入式系统、控制理论、路径规划、同步定位和建图（SLAM）、场景重建和模式识别。在这项工作中，我们提出了关于传感器数据融合和最先进的机器学习算法如何执行称为视觉语义导航的嵌入式人工智能 (E-AI) 任务的探索性研究。该任务又称为对象目标导航（ObjectNav），包括使用以自我为中心的视觉观察进行自主导航，以在无需事先了解环境的情况下到达属于目标语义类的对象。我们的方法在 Habitat Challenge 2021 ObjectNav 的 Minival 阶段和 Test-Standard 阶段获得第四名。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于传感器数据融合和机器学习算法的视觉语义导航方法，用于在未知环境中自主定位并到达目标语义类物体。
AI.motivation: 随着自动化技术发展，无人车需要解决多学科交叉的自主导航问题，尤其在无先验环境信息下通过视觉观测实现目标物体导航具有重要研究价值。
AI.method: 融合传感器数据与先进机器学习算法，构建具身人工智能框架，通过视觉语义理解实现目标导向的路径规划与自主导航。
AI.result: 该方法在Habitat Challenge 2021 ObjectNav竞赛的Minival和Test-Standard阶段均取得第四名成绩。
AI.conclusion: 提出的传感器融合与机器学习结合的方法有效提升了视觉语义导航性能，验证了该框架在具身人工智能任务中的可行性。
