search_text: BEyond observation: an approach for ObjectNav 超越观察：ObjectNav 的一种方法 With the rise of automation, unmanned vehicles became a hot topic both as commercial products and as a scientific research topic. It composes a multi-disciplinary field of robotics that encompasses embedded systems, control theory, path planning, Simultaneous Localization and Mapping (SLAM), scene reconstruction, and pattern recognition. In this work, we present our exploratory research of how sensor data fusion and state-of-the-art machine learning algorithms can perform the Embodied Artificial Intelligence (E-AI) task called Visual Semantic Navigation. This task, a.k.a Object-Goal Navigation (ObjectNav) consists of autonomous navigation using egocentric visual observations to reach an object belonging to the target semantic class without prior knowledge of the environment. Our method reached fourth place on the Habitat Challenge 2021 ObjectNav on the Minival phase and the Test-Standard Phase. 随着自动化的兴起，无人驾驶汽车成为商业产品和科学研究的热门话题。它构成了机器人技术的多学科领域，涵盖嵌入式系统、控制理论、路径规划、同步定位和建图（SLAM）、场景重建和模式识别。在这项工作中，我们提出了关于传感器数据融合和最先进的机器学习算法如何执行称为视觉语义导航的嵌入式人工智能 (E-AI) 任务的探索性研究。该任务又称为对象目标导航（ObjectNav），包括使用以自我为中心的视觉观察进行自主导航，以在无需事先了解环境的情况下到达属于目标语义类的对象。我们的方法在 Habitat Challenge 2021 ObjectNav 的 Minival 阶段和 Test-Standard 阶段获得第四名。 本文提出一种基于传感器数据融合和机器学习算法的视觉语义导航方法，用于在未知环境中自主定位并到达目标语义类物体。 Daniel V. Ruiz,Eduardo Todt cs.CV,cs.RO

title: Phrase-level Active Learning for Neural Machine Translation
title_zh: 神经机器翻译的短语级主动学习
abstract: Neural machine translation (NMT) is sensitive to domain shift. In this paper, we address this problem in an active learning setting where we can spend a given budget on translating in-domain data, and gradually fine-tune a pre-trained out-of-domain NMT model on the newly translated data. Existing active learning methods for NMT usually select sentences based on uncertainty scores, but these methods require costly translation of full sentences even when only one or two key phrases within the sentence are informative. To address this limitation, we re-examine previous work from the phrase-based machine translation (PBMT) era that selected not full sentences, but rather individual phrases. However, while incorporating these phrases into PBMT systems was relatively simple, it is less trivial for NMT systems, which need to be trained on full sequences to capture larger structural properties of sentences unique to the new domain. To overcome these hurdles, we propose to select both full sentences and individual phrases from unlabelled data in the new domain for routing to human translators. In a German-English translation task, our active learning approach achieves consistent improvements over uncertainty-based sentence selection methods, improving up to 1.2 BLEU score over strong active learning baselines.
summary: Neural machine translation (NMT) is sensitive to domain shift. In this paper, we address this problem in an active learning setting where we can spend a given budget on translating in-domain data, and gradually fine-tune a pre-trained out-of-domain NMT model on the newly translated data. Existing active learning methods for NMT usually select sentences based on uncertainty scores, but these methods require costly translation of full sentences even when only one or two key phrases within the sentence are informative. To address this limitation, we re-examine previous work from the phrase-based machine translation (PBMT) era that selected not full sentences, but rather individual phrases. However, while incorporating these phrases into PBMT systems was relatively simple, it is less trivial for NMT systems, which need to be trained on full sequences to capture larger structural properties of sentences unique to the new domain. To overcome these hurdles, we propose to select both full sentences and individual phrases from unlabelled data in the new domain for routing to human translators. In a German-English translation task, our active learning approach achieves consistent improvements over uncertainty-based sentence selection methods, improving up to 1.2 BLEU score over strong active learning baselines.
abstract_zh: 神经机器翻译 (NMT) 对域转移很敏感。在本文中，我们在主动学习环境中解决了这个问题，我们可以花费给定的预算来翻译域内数据，并在新翻译的数据上逐步微调预训练的域外 NMT 模型。现有的 NMT 主动学习方法通​​常根据不确定性分数来选择句子，但这些方法需要对整个句子进行昂贵的翻译，即使句子中只有一两个关键短语具有信息性。为了解决这个限制，我们重新审视了基于短语的机器翻译（PBMT）时代的先前工作，该时代选择的不是完整的句子，而是单个短语。然而，虽然将这些短语合并到 PBMT 系统中相对简单，但对于 NMT 系统来说就不那么简单了，NMT 系统需要在完整序列上进行训练，以捕获新领域特有的句子的更大结构特性。为了克服这些障碍，我们建议从新域中未标记的数据中选择完整的句子和单个短语，以便路由给人工翻译。在德英翻译任务中，我们的主动学习方法比基于不确定性的句子选择方法取得了持续改进，比强大的主动学习基线提高了 1.2 BLEU 分数。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种短语级主动学习方法，通过选择关键短语和完整句子优化神经机器翻译在领域迁移中的表现。
AI.motivation: 现有主动学习方法依赖全句翻译成本过高，而PBMT时代短语选择方法难以直接适配需全序列训练的NMT模型。
AI.method: 结合PBMT短语选择策略与NMT需求，同时从新领域数据中选取短语和完整句子供人工翻译以优化模型。
AI.result: 在德英翻译任务中，该方法比强基线提升最高1.2 BLEU分数。
AI.conclusion: 短语级主动学习有效提升NMT领域适应性，兼顾效率与模型性能。

title: First Approximation for Uniform Lower and Upper Bounded Facility Location Problem avoiding violation in Lower Bounds
title_zh: 统一下界和上界设施位置的第一次近似避免违反下界的问题
abstract: With growing emphasis on e-commerce marketplace platforms where we have a central platform mediating between the seller and the buyer, it becomes important to keep a check on the availability and profitability of the central store. A store serving too less clients can be non-profitable and a store getting too many orders can lead to bad service to the customers which can be detrimental for the business. In this paper, we study the facility location problem(FL) with upper and lower bounds on the number of clients an open facility serves. Constant factor approximations are known for the restricted variants of the problem with only the upper bounds or only the lower bounds. The only work that deals with bounds on both the sides violates both the bounds [8]. In this paper, we present the first (constant factor) approximation for the problem violating the upper bound by a factor of (5/2) without violating the lower bounds when both the lower and the upper bounds are uniform. We first give a tri-criteria (constant factor) approximation violating both the upper and the lower bounds and then get rid of violation in lower bounds by transforming the problem instance to an instance of capacitated facility location problem.
summary: With growing emphasis on e-commerce marketplace platforms where we have a central platform mediating between the seller and the buyer, it becomes important to keep a check on the availability and profitability of the central store. A store serving too less clients can be non-profitable and a store getting too many orders can lead to bad service to the customers which can be detrimental for the business. In this paper, we study the facility location problem(FL) with upper and lower bounds on the number of clients an open facility serves. Constant factor approximations are known for the restricted variants of the problem with only the upper bounds or only the lower bounds. The only work that deals with bounds on both the sides violates both the bounds [8]. In this paper, we present the first (constant factor) approximation for the problem violating the upper bound by a factor of (5/2) without violating the lower bounds when both the lower and the upper bounds are uniform. We first give a tri-criteria (constant factor) approximation violating both the upper and the lower bounds and then get rid of violation in lower bounds by transforming the problem instance to an instance of capacitated facility location problem.
abstract_zh: 随着人们越来越重视电子商务市场平台，我们在卖家和买家之间建立一个中央平台，因此检查中央商店的可用性和盈利能力变得很重要。为客户服务太少的商店可能会无利可图，而获得太多订单的商店可能会导致为客户提供糟糕的服务，这可能对业务不利。在本文中，我们研究了设施选址问题（FL），其上限和下限取决于开放设施所服务的客户数量。对于仅具有上限或仅具有下界的问题的受限变体，常数因子近似是已知的。唯一处理双方边界的工作违反了这两个边界[8]。在本文中，我们提出了当下界和上限一致时，违反上限 (5/2) 倍而不违反下界的问题的第一个（常数因子）近似。我们首先给出违反上限和下限的三标准（常数因子）近似，然后通过将问题实例转换为有能力设施位置问题的实例来消除下限的违规。

AI.tldr: 提出首个在统一上下限设施位置问题中不违反下限的常数因子近似算法
AI.motivation: 电商平台需平衡仓库服务量，现有算法无法同时满足上下限约束
AI.method: 先设计三标准近似算法，再转换为容量受限问题以消除下限违反
AI.result: 实现上限5/2倍违反且严格满足下限的常数因子近似方案
AI.conclusion: 填补双向约束设施选址算法空白，为电商物流优化提供理论支撑

title: Distributed Heuristic Multi-Agent Path Finding with Communication
title_zh: 带通信的分布式启发式多代理路径查找
comment: Published at ICRA 2021
comments: Published at ICRA 2021
abstract: Multi-Agent Path Finding (MAPF) is essential to large-scale robotic systems. Recent methods have applied reinforcement learning (RL) to learn decentralized polices in partially observable environments. A fundamental challenge of obtaining collision-free policy is that agents need to learn cooperation to handle congested situations. This paper combines communication with deep Q-learning to provide a novel learning based method for MAPF, where agents achieve cooperation via graph convolution. To guide RL algorithm on long-horizon goal-oriented tasks, we embed the potential choices of shortest paths from single source as heuristic guidance instead of using a specific path as in most existing works. Our method treats each agent independently and trains the model from a single agent's perspective. The final trained policy is applied to each agent for decentralized execution. The whole system is distributed during training and is trained under a curriculum learning strategy. Empirical evaluation in obstacle-rich environment indicates the high success rate with low average step of our method.
summary: Multi-Agent Path Finding (MAPF) is essential to large-scale robotic systems. Recent methods have applied reinforcement learning (RL) to learn decentralized polices in partially observable environments. A fundamental challenge of obtaining collision-free policy is that agents need to learn cooperation to handle congested situations. This paper combines communication with deep Q-learning to provide a novel learning based method for MAPF, where agents achieve cooperation via graph convolution. To guide RL algorithm on long-horizon goal-oriented tasks, we embed the potential choices of shortest paths from single source as heuristic guidance instead of using a specific path as in most existing works. Our method treats each agent independently and trains the model from a single agent's perspective. The final trained policy is applied to each agent for decentralized execution. The whole system is distributed during training and is trained under a curriculum learning strategy. Empirical evaluation in obstacle-rich environment indicates the high success rate with low average step of our method.
abstract_zh: 多智能体路径查找（MAPF）对于大型机器人系统至关重要。最近的方法已经应用强化学习（RL）来学习部分可观察环境中的去中心化策略。获得无碰撞策略的一个基本挑战是智能体需要学习合作来处理拥堵情况。本文将通信与深度 Q 学习相结合，为 MAPF 提供了一种新颖的基于学习的方法，其中代理通过图卷积实现合作。为了指导 RL 算法处理长期目标导向的任务，我们嵌入了来自单一来源的最短路径的潜在选择作为启发式指导，而不是像大多数现有工作那样使用特定路径。我们的方法独立对待每个智能体，并从单个智能体的角度训练模型。最终训练好的策略应用于每个代理以进行分散执行。整个系统在训练期间是分布式的，并在课程学习策略下进行训练。在障碍物丰富的环境中的实证评估表明，我们的方法具有较高的成功率和较低的平均步长。

AI.tldr: 提出一种结合通信与深度Q学习的分布式启发式方法，解决多智能体路径规划问题，提升复杂环境中的协作效率
AI.motivation: 现有方法在部分可观测环境中难以高效处理多智能体拥堵协作问题，需提升复杂场景下的路径规划成功率
AI.method: 融合图卷积通信机制与深度Q学习，采用最短路径启发式引导替代固定路径规划，通过课程学习策略实现分布式训练
AI.result: 障碍密集环境下达到高成功率且平均步数显著降低，验证方法有效性
AI.conclusion: 通信增强的启发式深度强化学习框架有效解决了多智能体路径规划的协作难题

authors_text: Trisha Singhal,Junhua Liu,Lucienne T. M. Blessing,Kwan Hui Lim
title: Photozilla: A Large-Scale Photography Dataset and Visual Embedding for 20 Photography Styles
title_zh: Photozilla：大规模摄影数据集和 20 种摄影风格的视觉嵌入
comment: In the Proceedings of the IEEE/CVF Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition Workshops, 2021. (Poster)
comments: In the Proceedings of the IEEE/CVF Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition Workshops, 2021. (Poster)
abstract: The advent of social media platforms has been a catalyst for the development of digital photography that engendered a boom in vision applications. With this motivation, we introduce a large-scale dataset termed 'Photozilla', which includes over 990k images belonging to 10 different photographic styles. The dataset is then used to train 3 classification models to automatically classify the images into the relevant style which resulted in an accuracy of ~96%. With the rapid evolution of digital photography, we have seen new types of photography styles emerging at an exponential rate. On that account, we present a novel Siamese-based network that uses the trained classification models as the base architecture to adapt and classify unseen styles with only 25 training samples. We report an accuracy of over 68% for identifying 10 other distinct types of photography styles. This dataset can be found at https://trisha025.github.io/Photozilla/
summary: The advent of social media platforms has been a catalyst for the development of digital photography that engendered a boom in vision applications. With this motivation, we introduce a large-scale dataset termed 'Photozilla', which includes over 990k images belonging to 10 different photographic styles. The dataset is then used to train 3 classification models to automatically classify the images into the relevant style which resulted in an accuracy of ~96%. With the rapid evolution of digital photography, we have seen new types of photography styles emerging at an exponential rate. On that account, we present a novel Siamese-based network that uses the trained classification models as the base architecture to adapt and classify unseen styles with only 25 training samples. We report an accuracy of over 68% for identifying 10 other distinct types of photography styles. This dataset can be found at https://trisha025.github.io/Photozilla/
abstract_zh: 社交媒体平台的出现成为数字摄影发展的催化剂，促进了视觉应用的繁荣。出于这个动机，我们引入了一个名为“Photozilla”的大型数据集，其中包含属于 10 种不同摄影风格的超过 99 万张图像。然后使用该数据集训练 3 个分类模型，自动将图像分类为相关风格，准确率达到约 96%。随着数码摄影的快速发展，我们看到新型摄影风格以指数级的速度涌现。因此，我们提出了一种新颖的基于 Siamese 的网络，该网络使用经过训练的分类模型作为基础架构，仅用 25 个训练样本即可对未见过的样式进行调整和分类。我们报告识别其他 10 种不同类型的摄影风格的准确度超过 68%。该数据集可以在 https://trisha025.github.io/Photozilla/ 找到

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个名为Photozilla的大规模摄影数据集及视觉嵌入模型，用于分类20种摄影风格，并开发了一种基于Siamese网络的方法以适应新风格。
AI.motivation: 社交媒体推动了数字摄影发展，但新兴摄影风格的快速涌现对现有分类模型提出了挑战，需解决小样本适应问题。
AI.method: 构建包含99万张图像的Photozilla数据集，训练3个分类模型（准确率~96%），并设计基于Siamese网络的架构，利用预训练模型对新风格进行小样本（25张样本）分类。
AI.result: 在10种原有风格上分类准确率达96%，在10种新风格上使用25个样本训练后准确率超68%。
AI.conclusion: Photozilla为摄影风格研究提供重要数据资源，提出的Siamese方法有效解决了新兴风格的小样本适应问题。

authors_text: Amol S. Joshi,Ali Dabouei,Jeremy Dawson,Nasser M. Nasrabadi
title: FDeblur-GAN: Fingerprint Deblurring using Generative Adversarial Network
title_zh: FDeblur-GAN：使用生成对抗网络进行指纹去模糊
comment: 8 Pages, Accepted in IJCB Conference
comments: 8 Pages, Accepted in IJCB Conference
abstract: While working with fingerprint images acquired from crime scenes, mobile cameras, or low-quality sensors, it becomes difficult for automated identification systems to verify the identity due to image blur and distortion. We propose a fingerprint deblurring model FDeblur-GAN, based on the conditional Generative Adversarial Networks (cGANs) and multi-stage framework of the stack GAN. Additionally, we integrate two auxiliary sub-networks into the model for the deblurring task. The first sub-network is a ridge extractor model. It is added to generate ridge maps to ensure that fingerprint information and minutiae are preserved in the deblurring process and prevent the model from generating erroneous minutiae. The second sub-network is a verifier that helps the generator to preserve the ID information during the generation process. Using a database of blurred fingerprints and corresponding ridge maps, the deep network learns to deblur from the input blurry samples. We evaluate the proposed method in combination with two different fingerprint matching algorithms. We achieved an accuracy of 95.18% on our fingerprint database for the task of matching deblurred and ground truth fingerprints.
summary: While working with fingerprint images acquired from crime scenes, mobile cameras, or low-quality sensors, it becomes difficult for automated identification systems to verify the identity due to image blur and distortion. We propose a fingerprint deblurring model FDeblur-GAN, based on the conditional Generative Adversarial Networks (cGANs) and multi-stage framework of the stack GAN. Additionally, we integrate two auxiliary sub-networks into the model for the deblurring task. The first sub-network is a ridge extractor model. It is added to generate ridge maps to ensure that fingerprint information and minutiae are preserved in the deblurring process and prevent the model from generating erroneous minutiae. The second sub-network is a verifier that helps the generator to preserve the ID information during the generation process. Using a database of blurred fingerprints and corresponding ridge maps, the deep network learns to deblur from the input blurry samples. We evaluate the proposed method in combination with two different fingerprint matching algorithms. We achieved an accuracy of 95.18% on our fingerprint database for the task of matching deblurred and ground truth fingerprints.
abstract_zh: 在处理从犯罪现场、移动摄像头或低质量传感器获取的指纹图像时，由于图像模糊和失真，自动识别系统很难验证身份。我们提出了一种基于条件生成对抗网络（cGAN）和堆栈 GAN 的多阶段框架的指纹去模糊模型 FDeblur-GAN。此外，我们将两个辅助子网络集成到模型中以执行去模糊任务。第一个子网络是脊提取器模型。添加它来生成脊线图，以确保在去模糊过程中保留指纹信息和细节，并防止模型生成错误的细节。第二个子网络是验证器，帮助生成器在生成过程中保存ID信息。使用模糊指纹和相应脊线图的数据库，深度网络学习从输入的模糊样本中去模糊。我们结合两种不同的指纹匹配算法评估所提出的方法。我们的指纹数据库在匹配去模糊指纹和地面真实指纹的任务中实现了 95.18% 的准确率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于条件生成对抗网络（cGAN）的指纹去模糊模型FDeblur-GAN，通过多阶段堆叠GAN框架和辅助子网络提升指纹图像清晰度。
AI.motivation: 犯罪现场或低质量传感器获取的指纹图像存在模糊和失真，导致自动识别系统难以准确验证身份。
AI.method: 结合条件GAN和堆叠GAN多阶段框架，引入指纹脊线提取器子网络（保留纹路细节）和身份验证子网络（保持ID信息），利用模糊指纹数据库和对应脊线图进行训练。
AI.result: 在指纹匹配任务中达到95.18%的准确率，验证了去模糊效果与真实指纹的匹配性能。
AI.conclusion: FDeblur-GAN通过辅助网络有效保留指纹关键特征，在实际场景中可提升指纹识别系统的准确性。

tldr: 本文提出基于条件生成对抗网络（cGAN）的指纹去模糊模型FDeblur-GAN，通过多阶段堆叠GAN框架和辅助子网络提升指纹图像清晰度。
motivation: 犯罪现场或低质量传感器获取的指纹图像存在模糊和失真，导致自动识别系统难以准确验证身份。
method: 结合条件GAN和堆叠GAN多阶段框架，引入指纹脊线提取器子网络（保留纹路细节）和身份验证子网络（保持ID信息），利用模糊指纹数据库和对应脊线图进行训练。
result: 在指纹匹配任务中达到95.18%的准确率，验证了去模糊效果与真实指纹的匹配性能。
conclusion: FDeblur-GAN通过辅助网络有效保留指纹关键特征，在实际场景中可提升指纹识别系统的准确性。
search_text: FDeblur-GAN: Fingerprint Deblurring using Generative Adversarial Network FDeblur-GAN：使用生成对抗网络进行指纹去模糊 While working with fingerprint images acquired from crime scenes, mobile cameras, or low-quality sensors, it becomes difficult for automated identification systems to verify the identity due to image blur and distortion. We propose a fingerprint deblurring model FDeblur-GAN, based on the conditional Generative Adversarial Networks (cGANs) and multi-stage framework of the stack GAN. Additionally, we integrate two auxiliary sub-networks into the model for the deblurring task. The first sub-network is a ridge extractor model. It is added to generate ridge maps to ensure that fingerprint information and minutiae are preserved in the deblurring process and prevent the model from generating erroneous minutiae. The second sub-network is a verifier that helps the generator to preserve the ID information during the generation process. Using a database of blurred fingerprints and corresponding ridge maps, the deep network learns to deblur from the input blurry samples. We evaluate the proposed method in combination with two different fingerprint matching algorithms. We achieved an accuracy of 95.18% on our fingerprint database for the task of matching deblurred and ground truth fingerprints. 在处理从犯罪现场、移动摄像头或低质量传感器获取的指纹图像时，由于图像模糊和失真，自动识别系统很难验证身份。我们提出了一种基于条件生成对抗网络（cGAN）和堆栈 GAN 的多阶段框架的指纹去模糊模型 FDeblur-GAN。此外，我们将两个辅助子网络集成到模型中以执行去模糊任务。第一个子网络是脊提取器模型。添加它来生成脊线图，以确保在去模糊过程中保留指纹信息和细节，并防止模型生成错误的细节。第二个子网络是验证器，帮助生成器在生成过程中保存ID信息。使用模糊指纹和相应脊线图的数据库，深度网络学习从输入的模糊样本中去模糊。我们结合两种不同的指纹匹配算法评估所提出的方法。我们的指纹数据库在匹配去模糊指纹和地面真实指纹的任务中实现了 95.18% 的准确率。 本文提出基于条件生成对抗网络（cGAN）的指纹去模糊模型FDeblur-GAN，通过多阶段堆叠GAN框架和辅助子网络提升指纹图像清晰度。 Amol S. Joshi,Ali Dabouei,Jeremy Dawson,Nasser M. Nasrabadi cs.CV

title: Be your own Benchmark: No-Reference Trajectory Metric on Registered Point Clouds
title_zh: 成为您自己的基准：注册点云上的无参考轨迹度量
comment: Accepted for the 10th European Conference on Mobile Robots (ECMR 2021)
comments: Accepted for the 10th European Conference on Mobile Robots (ECMR 2021)
abstract: This paper addresses the problem of assessing trajectory quality in conditions when no ground truth poses are available or when their accuracy is not enough for the specific task - for example, small-scale mapping in outdoor scenes. In our work, we propose a no-reference metric, Mutually Orthogonal Metric (MOM), that estimates the quality of the map from registered point clouds via the trajectory poses. MOM strongly correlates with full-reference trajectory metric Relative Pose Error, making it a trajectory benchmarking tool on setups where 3D sensing technologies are employed. We provide a mathematical foundation for such correlation and confirm it statistically in synthetic environments. Furthermore, since our metric uses a subset of points from mutually orthogonal surfaces, we provide an algorithm for the extraction of such subset and evaluate its performance in synthetic CARLA environment and on KITTI dataset. The code of the proposed metric is publicly available as pip-package.
summary: This paper addresses the problem of assessing trajectory quality in conditions when no ground truth poses are available or when their accuracy is not enough for the specific task - for example, small-scale mapping in outdoor scenes. In our work, we propose a no-reference metric, Mutually Orthogonal Metric (MOM), that estimates the quality of the map from registered point clouds via the trajectory poses. MOM strongly correlates with full-reference trajectory metric Relative Pose Error, making it a trajectory benchmarking tool on setups where 3D sensing technologies are employed. We provide a mathematical foundation for such correlation and confirm it statistically in synthetic environments. Furthermore, since our metric uses a subset of points from mutually orthogonal surfaces, we provide an algorithm for the extraction of such subset and evaluate its performance in synthetic CARLA environment and on KITTI dataset. The code of the proposed metric is publicly available as pip-package.
abstract_zh: 本文解决了在没有地面实况姿势可用或精度不足以完成特定任务的情况下评估轨迹质量的问题 - 例如，室外场景中的小比例测绘。在我们的工作中，我们提出了一种无参考度量，即相互正交度量（MOM），它通过轨迹姿势从注册的点云估计地图的质量。 MOM 与全参考轨迹指标相对位姿误差密切相关，使其成为采用 3D 传感技术的设置上的轨迹基准测试工具。我们为这种相关性提供了数学基础，并在合成环境中进行了统计证实。此外，由于我们的度量使用来自相互正交表面的点子集，因此我们提供了一种用于提取此类子集的算法，并评估其在合成 CARLA 环境和 KITTI 数据集上的性能。所提议指标的代码作为 pip-package 公开提供。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需参考基准的轨迹质量评估方法MOM，通过注册点云中的轨迹姿态估计地图质量。
AI.motivation: 在缺乏地面真实姿态或其精度不足的场景（如户外小规模建图）中，传统轨迹评估方法存在局限性，需开发无参考度量工具。
AI.method: 设计Mutually Orthogonal Metric（MOM）指标，利用点云中相互正交表面的点集提取算法，建立与全参考指标Relative Pose Error的数学关联性。
AI.result: 在合成CARLA环境和KITTI数据集验证中，MOM与相对姿态误差高度相关，且算法有效提取正交表面点集，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: MOM为3D传感场景提供可靠的无参考轨迹评估基准，数学理论与实验验证均表明其有效性，适用于点云注册质量分析。

authors_text: Xingyuan Bu,Junran Peng,Junjie Yan,Tieniu Tan,Zhaoxiang Zhang
title: GAIA: A Transfer Learning System of Object Detection that Fits Your Needs
title_zh: GAIA：适合您需求的物体检测迁移学习系统
comment: CVPR2021. The first two authors contribute equally. Code is released at https://github.com/GAIA-vision
comments: CVPR2021. The first two authors contribute equally. Code is released at https://github.com/GAIA-vision
abstract: Transfer learning with pre-training on large-scale datasets has played an increasingly significant role in computer vision and natural language processing recently. However, as there exist numerous application scenarios that have distinctive demands such as certain latency constraints and specialized data distributions, it is prohibitively expensive to take advantage of large-scale pre-training for per-task requirements. In this paper, we focus on the area of object detection and present a transfer learning system named GAIA, which could automatically and efficiently give birth to customized solutions according to heterogeneous downstream needs. GAIA is capable of providing powerful pre-trained weights, selecting models that conform to downstream demands such as latency constraints and specified data domains, and collecting relevant data for practitioners who have very few datapoints for their tasks. With GAIA, we achieve promising results on COCO, Objects365, Open Images, Caltech, CityPersons, and UODB which is a collection of datasets including KITTI, VOC, WiderFace, DOTA, Clipart, Comic, and more. Taking COCO as an example, GAIA is able to efficiently produce models covering a wide range of latency from 16ms to 53ms, and yields AP from 38.2 to 46.5 without whistles and bells. To benefit every practitioner in the community of object detection, GAIA is released at https://github.com/GAIA-vision.
summary: Transfer learning with pre-training on large-scale datasets has played an increasingly significant role in computer vision and natural language processing recently. However, as there exist numerous application scenarios that have distinctive demands such as certain latency constraints and specialized data distributions, it is prohibitively expensive to take advantage of large-scale pre-training for per-task requirements. In this paper, we focus on the area of object detection and present a transfer learning system named GAIA, which could automatically and efficiently give birth to customized solutions according to heterogeneous downstream needs. GAIA is capable of providing powerful pre-trained weights, selecting models that conform to downstream demands such as latency constraints and specified data domains, and collecting relevant data for practitioners who have very few datapoints for their tasks. With GAIA, we achieve promising results on COCO, Objects365, Open Images, Caltech, CityPersons, and UODB which is a collection of datasets including KITTI, VOC, WiderFace, DOTA, Clipart, Comic, and more. Taking COCO as an example, GAIA is able to efficiently produce models covering a wide range of latency from 16ms to 53ms, and yields AP from 38.2 to 46.5 without whistles and bells. To benefit every practitioner in the community of object detection, GAIA is released at https://github.com/GAIA-vision.
abstract_zh: 近年来，在大规模数据集上进行预训练的迁移学习在计算机视觉和自然语言处理中发挥着越来越重要的作用。然而，由于存在许多具有独特需求的应用场景，例如某些延迟约束和专门的数据分布，因此利用大规模预训练来满足每个任务的需求是非常昂贵的。在本文中，我们专注于目标检测领域，提出了一种名为 GAIA 的迁移学习系统，该系统可以根据异构下游需求自动高效地生成定制解决方案。 GAIA 能够提供强大的预训练权重，选择符合下游需求（例如延迟约束和指定数据域）的模型，并为任务数据点很少的从业者收集相关数据。借助 GAIA，我们在 COCO、Objects365、Open Images、Caltech、CityPersons 和 UODB 上取得了可喜的成果，UODB 是 KITTI、VOC、WiderFace、DOTA、Clipart、Comic 等数据集的集合。以COCO为例，GAIA能够高效地生成涵盖16ms到53ms的广泛延迟范围的模型，并产生从38.2到46.5的AP，并且没有任何提示音。为了让目标检测社区的每一位从业者受益，GAIA 发布于 https://github.com/GAIA-vision。

AI.tldr: 本文提出GAIA系统，通过迁移学习自动高效生成满足异构下游需求的定制化目标检测模型。
AI.motivation: 现有大规模预训练模型难以满足不同场景下的延迟约束和特定数据分布需求，且微调成本过高。
AI.method: GAIA提供强大预训练权重，根据下游需求筛选模型并收集相关数据，支持从少量样本中生成定制化检测模型。
AI.result: 在COCO等7个数据集上取得优异结果，COCO数据集下模型延迟范围16ms-53ms，AP值达38.2-46.5。
AI.conclusion: GAIA为检测社区提供高效可定制的迁移学习解决方案，开源代码惠及研究者与实践者。

authors_text: AI Redefined,Sai Krishna Gottipati,Sagar Kurandwad,Clodéric Mars,Gregory Szriftgiser,François Chabot
title: Cogment: Open Source Framework For Distributed Multi-actor Training, Deployment & Operations
title_zh: Cogment：用于分布式多参与者训练、部署和运营的开源框架
comment: 16 pages, 7 figures
comments: 16 pages, 7 figures
abstract: Involving humans directly for the benefit of AI agents' training is getting traction thanks to several advances in reinforcement learning and human-in-the-loop learning. Humans can provide rewards to the agent, demonstrate tasks, design a curriculum, or act in the environment, but these benefits also come with architectural, functional design and engineering complexities. We present Cogment, a unifying open-source framework that introduces an actor formalism to support a variety of humans-agents collaboration typologies and training approaches. It is also scalable out of the box thanks to a distributed micro service architecture, and offers solutions to the aforementioned complexities.
summary: Involving humans directly for the benefit of AI agents' training is getting traction thanks to several advances in reinforcement learning and human-in-the-loop learning. Humans can provide rewards to the agent, demonstrate tasks, design a curriculum, or act in the environment, but these benefits also come with architectural, functional design and engineering complexities. We present Cogment, a unifying open-source framework that introduces an actor formalism to support a variety of humans-agents collaboration typologies and training approaches. It is also scalable out of the box thanks to a distributed micro service architecture, and offers solutions to the aforementioned complexities.
abstract_zh: 由于强化学习和人机循环学习方面的多项进展，让人类直接参与人工智能代理的训练正在受到关注。人类可以向代理提供奖励、演示任务、设计课程或在环境中行动，但这些好处也伴随着建筑、功能设计和工程的复杂性。我们提出了 Cogment，一个统一的开源框架，它引入了参与者形式主义来支持各种人类与代理的协作类型和培训方法。由于采用分布式微服务架构，它还具有开箱即用的可扩展性，并为上述复杂性提供了解决方案。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Cogment，一个支持人类与AI代理协作的分布式开源框架，用于多参与者训练、部署与操作。

AI.method: 提出Cogment框架，采用分布式微服务架构，引入参与者形式以支持多样化的人类-代理协作类型及训练方法，解决复杂性问题。
AI.result: Cogment实现了开箱即用的可扩展性，有效解决了人类-代理协作中的架构与工程复杂性问题。
AI.conclusion: Cogment为分布式多参与者AI训练与部署提供了灵活可扩展的解决方案，推动了人机协作在强化学习领域的应用与发展。

search_text: Cogment: Open Source Framework For Distributed Multi-actor Training, Deployment & Operations Cogment：用于分布式多参与者训练、部署和运营的开源框架 Involving humans directly for the benefit of AI agents' training is getting traction thanks to several advances in reinforcement learning and human-in-the-loop learning. Humans can provide rewards to the agent, demonstrate tasks, design a curriculum, or act in the environment, but these benefits also come with architectural, functional design and engineering complexities. We present Cogment, a unifying open-source framework that introduces an actor formalism to support a variety of humans-agents collaboration typologies and training approaches. It is also scalable out of the box thanks to a distributed micro service architecture, and offers solutions to the aforementioned complexities. 由于强化学习和人机循环学习方面的多项进展，让人类直接参与人工智能代理的训练正在受到关注。人类可以向代理提供奖励、演示任务、设计课程或在环境中行动，但这些好处也伴随着建筑、功能设计和工程的复杂性。我们提出了 Cogment，一个统一的开源框架，它引入了参与者形式主义来支持各种人类与代理的协作类型和培训方法。由于采用分布式微服务架构，它还具有开箱即用的可扩展性，并为上述复杂性提供了解决方案。 本文提出Cogment，一个支持人类与AI代理协作的分布式开源框架，用于多参与者训练、部署与操作。 AI Redefined,Sai Krishna Gottipati,Sagar Kurandwad,Clodéric Mars,Gregory Szriftgiser,François Chabot cs.AI,cs.HC,cs.LG,cs.MA

authors_text: David Acuna,Guojun Zhang,Marc T. Law,Sanja Fidler
title: f-Domain-Adversarial Learning: Theory and Algorithms
title_zh: f 域对抗性学习：理论和算法
comment: ICML 2021
comments: ICML 2021
abstract: Unsupervised domain adaptation is used in many machine learning applications where, during training, a model has access to unlabeled data in the target domain, and a related labeled dataset. In this paper, we introduce a novel and general domain-adversarial framework. Specifically, we derive a novel generalization bound for domain adaptation that exploits a new measure of discrepancy between distributions based on a variational characterization of f-divergences. It recovers the theoretical results from Ben-David et al. (2010a) as a special case and supports divergences used in practice. Based on this bound, we derive a new algorithmic framework that introduces a key correction in the original adversarial training method of Ganin et al. (2016). We show that many regularizers and ad-hoc objectives introduced over the last years in this framework are then not required to achieve performance comparable to (if not better than) state-of-the-art domain-adversarial methods. Experimental analysis conducted on real-world natural language and computer vision datasets show that our framework outperforms existing baselines, and obtains the best results for f-divergences that were not considered previously in domain-adversarial learning.
summary: Unsupervised domain adaptation is used in many machine learning applications where, during training, a model has access to unlabeled data in the target domain, and a related labeled dataset. In this paper, we introduce a novel and general domain-adversarial framework. Specifically, we derive a novel generalization bound for domain adaptation that exploits a new measure of discrepancy between distributions based on a variational characterization of f-divergences. It recovers the theoretical results from Ben-David et al. (2010a) as a special case and supports divergences used in practice. Based on this bound, we derive a new algorithmic framework that introduces a key correction in the original adversarial training method of Ganin et al. (2016). We show that many regularizers and ad-hoc objectives introduced over the last years in this framework are then not required to achieve performance comparable to (if not better than) state-of-the-art domain-adversarial methods. Experimental analysis conducted on real-world natural language and computer vision datasets show that our framework outperforms existing baselines, and obtains the best results for f-divergences that were not considered previously in domain-adversarial learning.
abstract_zh: 无监督域适应用于许多机器学习应用程序，在训练过程中，模型可以访问目标域中的未标记数据以及相关的标记数据集。在本文中，我们介绍了一种新颖且通用的领域对抗框架。具体来说，我们推导了一种新的域适应泛化界限，它利用基于 f 散度的变分表征的分布之间差异的新度量。它恢复了 Ben-David 等人的理论结果。 （2010a）作为一个特例，支持实践中使用的分歧。基于这个界限，我们推导了一个新的算法框架，该框架在 Ganin 等人的原始对抗训练方法中引入了关键修正。 （2016）。我们表明，过去几年在该框架中引入的许多正则化器和临时目标不需要实现与最先进的领域对抗方法相当（如果不是更好）的性能。对现实世界自然语言和计算机视觉数据集进行的实验分析表明，我们的框架优于现有基线，并获得了先前在领域对抗性学习中未考虑的 f 散度的最佳结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于f散度的领域对抗学习框架，用于无监督领域自适应任务，通过理论分析和算法改进提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 现有领域对抗方法存在理论局限性和算法冗余问题，需提出更通用的分布差异度量和更高效的训练框架。
AI.method: 通过变分方法构建f散度分布差异度量，推导泛化界并修正原始对抗训练算法，去除冗余正则化项。
AI.result: 在自然语言和计算机视觉数据集上优于现有基线方法，尤其在未被传统方法考虑的f散度情况下表现最佳。
AI.conclusion: 提出的框架在理论分析和实际效果上均优于现有领域对抗方法，为无监督领域自适应提供了新思路。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于f散度的领域对抗学习框架，用于无监督领域自适应任务，通过理论分析和算法改进提升模型性能。

authors_text: Aston Zhang,Zachary C. Lipton,Mu Li,Alexander J. Smola
title: Dive into Deep Learning
title_zh: 深入学习深度学习
comment: (HTML) https://D2L.ai (GitHub) https://github.com/d2l-ai/d2l-en/
comments: (HTML) https://D2L.ai (GitHub) https://github.com/d2l-ai/d2l-en/
abstract: This open-source book represents our attempt to make deep learning approachable, teaching readers the concepts, the context, and the code. The entire book is drafted in Jupyter notebooks, seamlessly integrating exposition figures, math, and interactive examples with self-contained code. Our goal is to offer a resource that could (i) be freely available for everyone; (ii) offer sufficient technical depth to provide a starting point on the path to actually becoming an applied machine learning scientist; (iii) include runnable code, showing readers how to solve problems in practice; (iv) allow for rapid updates, both by us and also by the community at large; (v) be complemented by a forum for interactive discussion of technical details and to answer questions.
summary: This open-source book represents our attempt to make deep learning approachable, teaching readers the concepts, the context, and the code. The entire book is drafted in Jupyter notebooks, seamlessly integrating exposition figures, math, and interactive examples with self-contained code. Our goal is to offer a resource that could (i) be freely available for everyone; (ii) offer sufficient technical depth to provide a starting point on the path to actually becoming an applied machine learning scientist; (iii) include runnable code, showing readers how to solve problems in practice; (iv) allow for rapid updates, both by us and also by the community at large; (v) be complemented by a forum for interactive discussion of technical details and to answer questions.
abstract_zh: 这本开源书籍代表了我们让深度学习变得平易近人的尝试，向读者传授概念、上下文和代码。整本书都是在 Jupyter 笔记本中起草的，将说明图、数学和交互式示例与独立代码无缝集成。我们的目标是提供一种资源：(i) 每个人都可以免费使用； (ii) 提供足够的技术深度，为真正成为应用机器学习科学家的道路提供起点； (iii) 包含可运行的代码，向读者展示如何在实践中解决问题； (iv) 允许我们和整个社区快速更新； (v) 辅以一个论坛，用于技术细节的互动讨论和回答问题。

AI.tldr: 创建一本开源的深度学习书籍，结合概念、背景和可运行代码，帮助读者成为应用机器学习科学家。
AI.motivation: 现有资源可能不够全面或互动性不足，需要一个免费、技术深度足够且包含实践代码的资源，促进社区协作和快速更新。
AI.method: 使用Jupyter笔记本整合文字、数学、图表和交互代码，并建立论坛支持讨论和问题解答。
AI.result: 完成了一本开源深度学习书籍，具备技术深度和交互代码，支持社区协作更新和讨论。
AI.conclusion: 成功创建了符合目标的资源，未来将持续更新并依赖社区贡献，促进深度学习教育普及。

The entire book is drafted in Jupyter notebooks, seamlessly integrating exposition figures, math, and interactive examples with self-contained code. Lipton,Mu Li,Alexander J. Smola cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CL,cs.CV

title: Consideration of the Need for Quantum Grid Computing
title_zh: 考虑量子网格计算的需求
abstract: Quantum computing is poised to dramatically change the computational landscape, worldwide. Quantum computers can solve complex problems that are, at least in some cases, beyond the ability of even advanced future classical-style computers. In addition to being able to solve these classical computer-unsolvable problems, quantum computers have demonstrated a capability to solve some problems (such as prime factoring) much more efficiently than classical computing. This will create problems for encryption techniques, which depend on the difficulty of factoring for their security. Security, scientific, and other applications will require access to quantum computing resources to access their unique capabilities, speed and economic (aggregate computing time cost) benefits. Many scientific applications, as well as numerous other ones, use grid computing to provide benefits such as scalability and resource access. As these applications may benefit from quantum capabilities - and some future applications may require quantum capabilities - identifying how to integrate quantum computing systems into grid computing environments is critical. This paper discusses the benefits of grid-connected quantum computers and what is required to achieve this.

Quantum computers can solve complex problems that are, at least in some cases, beyond the ability of even advanced future classical-style computers. This will create problems for encryption techniques, which depend on the difficulty of factoring for their security. Security, scientific, and other applications will require access to quantum computing resources to access their unique capabilities, speed and economic (aggregate computing time cost) benefits. Many scientific applications, as well as numerous other ones, use grid computing to provide benefits such as scalability and resource access. As these applications may benefit from quantum capabilities - and some future applications may require quantum capabilities - identifying how to integrate quantum computing systems into grid computing environments is critical. This paper discusses the benefits of grid-connected quantum computers and what is required to achieve this.
abstract_zh: 量子计算有望极大地改变全球的计算格局。量子计算机可以解决复杂的问题，至少在某些情况下，甚至超出了先进的未来经典计算机的能力。除了能够解决这些经典计算机无法解决的问题之外，量子计算机还表现出比经典计算更有效地解决某些问题（例如质因数分解）的能力。这会给加密技术带来问题，这取决于考虑其安全性的难度。安全、科学和其他应用程序将需要访问量子计算资源才能获得其独特的功能、速度和经济（总计算时间成本）优势。许多科学应用程序以及许多其他应用程序都使用网格计算来提供可扩展性和资源访问等优势。由于这些应用程序可能受益于量子能力 - 并且一些未来的应用程序可能需要量子能力 - 确定如何将量子计算系统集成到网格计算环境中至关重要。本文讨论了并网量子计算机的好处以及实现这一目标所需的条件。

AI.tldr: 探讨将量子计算系统整合到网格计算环境中的必要性与实现方法
AI.motivation: 量子计算的独特能力与网格计算的资源扩展性结合，可解决传统方法难以处理的问题，并满足未来应用需求
AI.method: 通过分析量子计算与网格计算的特性，讨论整合的关键技术挑战，并提出可能的集成框架与实现路径
AI.result: 明确了量子网格计算的必要性，提出了整合框架，并指出其在安全、科研等领域的应用潜力
AI.conclusion: 量子计算与网格计算的整合是未来计算发展的关键，需解决技术与标准化问题以实现广泛应用

authors_text: Freddie Bickford Smith,Brett D Roads,Xiaoliang Luo,Bradley C Love
title: Understanding top-down attention using task-oriented ablation design
title_zh: 使用面向任务的消融设计理解自上而下的注意力
abstract: Top-down attention allows neural networks, both artificial and biological, to focus on the information most relevant for a given task. This is known to enhance performance in visual perception. But it remains unclear how attention brings about its perceptual boost, especially when it comes to naturalistic settings like recognising an object in an everyday scene. What aspects of a visual task does attention help to deal with? We aim to answer this with a computational experiment based on a general framework called task-oriented ablation design. First we define a broad range of visual tasks and identify six factors that underlie task variability. Then on each task we compare the performance of two neural networks, one with top-down attention and one without. These comparisons reveal the task-dependence of attention's perceptual boost, giving a clearer idea of the role attention plays. Whereas many existing cognitive accounts link attention to stimulus-level variables, such as visual clutter and object scale, we find greater explanatory power in system-level variables that capture the interaction between the model, the distribution of training data and the task format. This finding suggests a shift in how attention is studied could be fruitful. We make publicly available our code and results, along with statistics relevant to ImageNet-based experiments beyond this one. Our contribution serves to support the development of more human-like vision models and the design of more informative machine-learning experiments.
summary: Top-down attention allows neural networks, both artificial and biological, to focus on the information most relevant for a given task. This is known to enhance performance in visual perception. But it remains unclear how attention brings about its perceptual boost, especially when it comes to naturalistic settings like recognising an object in an everyday scene. What aspects of a visual task does attention help to deal with? We aim to answer this with a computational experiment based on a general framework called task-oriented ablation design. First we define a broad range of visual tasks and identify six factors that underlie task variability. Then on each task we compare the performance of two neural networks, one with top-down attention and one without. These comparisons reveal the task-dependence of attention's perceptual boost, giving a clearer idea of the role attention plays. Whereas many existing cognitive accounts link attention to stimulus-level variables, such as visual clutter and object scale, we find greater explanatory power in system-level variables that capture the interaction between the model, the distribution of training data and the task format. This finding suggests a shift in how attention is studied could be fruitful. We make publicly available our code and results, along with statistics relevant to ImageNet-based experiments beyond this one. Our contribution serves to support the development of more human-like vision models and the design of more informative machine-learning experiments.
abstract_zh: 自上而下的注意力使人工和生物神经网络能够专注于与给定任务最相关的信息。众所周知，这可以增强视觉感知的性能。但目前尚不清楚注意力如何带来感知提升，尤其是在自然环境中，例如识别日常场景中的物体。注意力有助于处理视觉任务的哪些方面？我们的目标是通过基于称为面向任务的消融设计的通用框架的计算实验来回答这个问题。首先，我们定义了广泛的视觉任务，并确定了任务可变性背后的六个因素。然后，在每项任务上，我们比较两个神经网络的性能，一个具有自上而下的注意力，另一个没有。这些比较揭示了注意力感知提升的任务依赖性，让人们更清楚地了解注意力所扮演的角色。尽管许多现有的认知解释将注意力与刺激级变量（例如视觉混乱和物体尺度）联系起来，但我们发现系统级变量具有更大的解释力，这些变量捕获模型、训练数据的分布和任务格式之间的相互作用。这一发现表明，注意力研究方式的转变可能会取得丰硕成果。我们公开了我们的代码和结果，以及与基于 ImageNet 的实验相关的统计数据。我们的贡献旨在支持开发更类似于人类的视觉模型以及设计信息更丰富的机器学习实验。

AI.tldr: 本文通过任务导向的消融设计框架，研究顶向下注意力机制在不同视觉任务中的作用及其提升感知性能的机制。
AI.motivation: 现有认知理论多将注意力与刺激层面变量（如视觉杂乱度、物体尺度）关联，但作者认为系统层面变量（模型、训练数据分布、任务格式）可能更具解释力，需重新审视注意力的研究方向。
AI.method: 定义多种视觉任务并提取六个任务变量，通过对比有无顶向下注意力的神经网络在各任务中的性能差异，分析注意力的感知增强效果及其依赖因素。
AI.result: 注意力的感知增强效果具有任务依赖性，系统层面变量（模型结构、训练数据分布、任务格式）比刺激层面变量更能解释注意力的作用机制。
AI.conclusion: 应转向系统层面变量研究注意力机制，该发现有助于开发更接近人类视觉的模型，并设计更具信息量的机器学习实验。

authors_text: Anurag Kumar,Yun Wang,Vamsi Krishna Ithapu,Christian Fuegen
title: Do sound event representations generalize to other audio tasks? A case study in audio transfer learning
title_zh: 声音事件表示可以推广到其他音频任务吗？音频迁移学习的案例研究
comment: Accepted Interspeech 2021
comments: Accepted Interspeech 2021
abstract: Transfer learning is critical for efficient information transfer across multiple related learning problems. A simple, yet effective transfer learning approach utilizes deep neural networks trained on a large-scale task for feature extraction. Such representations are then used to learn related downstream tasks. In this paper, we investigate transfer learning capacity of audio representations obtained from neural networks trained on a large-scale sound event detection dataset. We build and evaluate these representations across a wide range of other audio tasks, via a simple linear classifier transfer mechanism. We show that such simple linear transfer is already powerful enough to achieve high performance on the downstream tasks. We also provide insights into the attributes of sound event representations that enable such efficient information transfer.
summary: Transfer learning is critical for efficient information transfer across multiple related learning problems. A simple, yet effective transfer learning approach utilizes deep neural networks trained on a large-scale task for feature extraction. Such representations are then used to learn related downstream tasks. In this paper, we investigate transfer learning capacity of audio representations obtained from neural networks trained on a large-scale sound event detection dataset. We build and evaluate these representations across a wide range of other audio tasks, via a simple linear classifier transfer mechanism. We show that such simple linear transfer is already powerful enough to achieve high performance on the downstream tasks. We also provide insights into the attributes of sound event representations that enable such efficient information transfer.
abstract_zh: 迁移学习对于跨多个相关学习问题的有效信息传输至关重要。一种简单而有效的迁移学习方法利用经过大规模任务训练的深度神经网络进行特征提取。然后使用此类表示来学习相关的下游任务。在本文中，我们研究了从在大规模声音事件检测数据集上训练的神经网络获得的音频表示的迁移学习能力。我们通过简单的线性分类器传输机制在各种其他音频任务中构建和评估这些表示。我们证明，这种简单的线性传输已经足够强大，可以在下游任务上实现高性能。我们还提供了对声音事件表示属性的见解，以实现如此有效的信息传输。

AI.tldr: 本论文研究音频表示在迁移学习中的泛化能力，通过线性分类器评估其在不同音频任务中的表现。
AI.motivation: 迁移学习能提升跨任务的信息传递效率，但音频表示是否具备广泛迁移能力尚需验证，尤其在无需任务特定数据的情况下。
AI.method: 基于大规模声音事件检测数据集训练神经网络提取音频表示，并通过线性分类器评估其在多种下游音频任务中的迁移效果。
AI.result: 实验表明，简单的线性迁移机制在下游任务中表现优异，并揭示了促进高效信息迁移的表示属性。
AI.conclusion: 音频表示具备良好的跨任务迁移能力，简单的线性方法即可实现高效信息迁移，为音频领域及其他领域的迁移学习提供新思路。

search_text: Do sound event representations generalize to other audio tasks? A case study in audio transfer learning 声音事件表示可以推广到其他音频任务吗？音频迁移学习的案例研究 Transfer learning is critical for efficient information transfer across multiple related learning problems. A simple, yet effective transfer learning approach utilizes deep neural networks trained on a large-scale task for feature extraction. Such representations are then used to learn related downstream tasks. In this paper, we investigate transfer learning capacity of audio representations obtained from neural networks trained on a large-scale sound event detection dataset. We build and evaluate these representations across a wide range of other audio tasks, via a simple linear classifier transfer mechanism. We show that such simple linear transfer is already powerful enough to achieve high performance on the downstream tasks. We also provide insights into the attributes of sound event representations that enable such efficient information transfer. 迁移学习对于跨多个相关学习问题的有效信息传输至关重要。一种简单而有效的迁移学习方法利用经过大规模任务训练的深度神经网络进行特征提取。然后使用此类表示来学习相关的下游任务。在本文中，我们研究了从在大规模声音事件检测数据集上训练的神经网络获得的音频表示的迁移学习能力。我们通过简单的线性分类器传输机制在各种其他音频任务中构建和评估这些表示。我们证明，这种简单的线性传输已经足够强大，可以在下游任务上实现高性能。我们还提供了对声音事件表示属性的见解，以实现如此有效的信息传输。 本论文研究音频表示在迁移学习中的泛化能力，通过线性分类器评估其在不同音频任务中的表现。 Anurag Kumar,Yun Wang,Vamsi Krishna Ithapu,Christian Fuegen cs.SD,cs.AI,eess.AS

title: Context-aware PolyUNet for Liver and Lesion Segmentation from Abdominal CT Images
title_zh: 用于从腹部 CT 图像进行肝脏和病变分割的上下文感知 PolyUNet
comment: 7 pages and 3 figures
comments: 7 pages and 3 figures
abstract: Accurate liver and lesion segmentation from computed tomography (CT) images are highly demanded in clinical practice for assisting the diagnosis and assessment of hepatic tumor disease. However, automatic liver and lesion segmentation from contrast-enhanced CT volumes is extremely challenging due to the diversity in contrast, resolution, and quality of images. Previous methods based on UNet for 2D slice-by-slice or 3D volume-by-volume segmentation either lack sufficient spatial contexts or suffer from high GPU computational cost, which limits the performance. To tackle these issues, we propose a novel context-aware PolyUNet for accurate liver and lesion segmentation. It jointly explores structural diversity and consecutive t-adjacent slices to enrich feature expressive power and spatial contextual information while avoiding the overload of GPU memory consumption. In addition, we utilize zoom out/in and two-stage refinement strategy to exclude the irrelevant contexts and focus on the specific region for the fine-grained segmentation. Our method achieved very competitive performance at the MICCAI 2017 Liver Tumor Segmentation (LiTS) Challenge among all tasks with a single model and ranked the $3^{rd}$, $12^{th}$, $2^{nd}$, and $5^{th}$ places in the liver segmentation, lesion segmentation, lesion detection, and tumor burden estimation, respectively.
summary: Accurate liver and lesion segmentation from computed tomography (CT) images are highly demanded in clinical practice for assisting the diagnosis and assessment of hepatic tumor disease. However, automatic liver and lesion segmentation from contrast-enhanced CT volumes is extremely challenging due to the diversity in contrast, resolution, and quality of images. Previous methods based on UNet for 2D slice-by-slice or 3D volume-by-volume segmentation either lack sufficient spatial contexts or suffer from high GPU computational cost, which limits the performance. To tackle these issues, we propose a novel context-aware PolyUNet for accurate liver and lesion segmentation. It jointly explores structural diversity and consecutive t-adjacent slices to enrich feature expressive power and spatial contextual information while avoiding the overload of GPU memory consumption. In addition, we utilize zoom out/in and two-stage refinement strategy to exclude the irrelevant contexts and focus on the specific region for the fine-grained segmentation. Our method achieved very competitive performance at the MICCAI 2017 Liver Tumor Segmentation (LiTS) Challenge among all tasks with a single model and ranked the $3^{rd}$, $12^{th}$, $2^{nd}$, and $5^{th}$ places in the liver segmentation, lesion segmentation, lesion detection, and tumor burden estimation, respectively.
abstract_zh: 临床实践中迫切需要利用计算机断层扫描（CT）图像进行准确的肝脏和病灶分割，以辅助肝脏肿瘤疾病的诊断和评估。然而，由于图像的对比度、分辨率和质量的多样性，从对比增强 CT 体积中自动分割肝脏和病灶极具挑战性。之前基于 UNet 进行 2D 逐片或 3D 逐体积分割的方法要么缺乏足够的空间上下文，要么面临较高的 GPU 计算成本，从而限制了性能。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种新颖的上下文感知 PolyUNet，用于准确的肝脏和病变分割。它共同探索结构多样性和连续的t相邻切片，以丰富特征表达能力和空间上下文信息，同时避免GPU内存消耗的过载。此外，我们利用缩小/缩小和两阶段细化策略来排除不相关的上下文，并专注于特定区域进行细粒度分割。我们的方法在 MICCAI 2017 肝脏肿瘤分割 (LiTS) 挑战赛中使用单一模型的所有任务中取得了非常有竞争力的性能，并在肝脏分割、病灶分割、病灶检测和肿瘤负荷估计方面分别排名 $3^{rd}$、$12^{th}$、$2^{nd}$ 和 $5^{th}$。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于上下文感知的PolyUNet模型，用于提高腹部CT图像中肝脏及病灶的分割精度。
AI.motivation: 传统UNet在处理CT图像时存在空间上下文不足或GPU计算成本高的问题，难以满足临床对肝脏和病灶分割的高精度需求。
AI.method: 设计PolyUNet通过融合结构多样性与相邻切片信息增强特征表达，结合缩放策略和两阶段精修机制，优化GPU内存占用并提升分割精度。
AI.result: 在MICCAI 2017 LiTS挑战赛中，单模型在肝脏分割、病灶分割、病灶检测和肿瘤负荷估计任务中分别获得第3、12、2和5名。
AI.conclusion: PolyUNet通过上下文感知机制有效平衡了计算效率与分割精度，为医学图像分割提供了具有竞争力的解决方案。

authors_text: Jérémy Lebreton,Roland Brochard,Matthieu Baudry,Grégory Jonniaux,Adrien Hadj Salah,Keyvan Kanani,Matthieu Le Goff,Aurore Masson,Nicolas Ollagnier,Paolo Panicucci,Amsha Proag,Cyril Robin
title: Image simulation for space applications with the SurRender software
title_zh: 使用 SurRender 软件进行空间应用的图像模拟
comment: 11th International ESA Conference on Guidance, Navigation & Control Systems, 22 - 25 June 2021 16 pages, 8 figures
comments: 11th International ESA Conference on Guidance, Navigation & Control Systems, 22 - 25 June 2021 16 pages, 8 figures
abstract: Image Processing algorithms for vision-based navigation require reliable image simulation capacities. In this paper we explain why traditional rendering engines may present limitations that are potentially critical for space applications. We introduce Airbus SurRender software v7 and provide details on features that make it a very powerful space image simulator. We show how SurRender is at the heart of the development processes of our computer vision solutions and we provide a series of illustrations of rendered images for various use cases ranging from Moon and Solar System exploration, to in orbit rendezvous and planetary robotics.
summary: Image Processing algorithms for vision-based navigation require reliable image simulation capacities. In this paper we explain why traditional rendering engines may present limitations that are potentially critical for space applications. We introduce Airbus SurRender software v7 and provide details on features that make it a very powerful space image simulator. We show how SurRender is at the heart of the development processes of our computer vision solutions and we provide a series of illustrations of rendered images for various use cases ranging from Moon and Solar System exploration, to in orbit rendezvous and planetary robotics.
abstract_zh: 基于视觉的导航的图像处理算法需要可靠的图像模拟能力。在本文中，我们解释了为什么传统渲染引擎可能存在对空间应用可能至关重要的限制。我们介绍 Airbus SurRender 软件 v7，并提供有关使其成为非常强大的空间图像模拟器的功能的详细信息。我们展示了 SurRender 如何成为计算机视觉解决方案开发流程的核心，并为从月球和太阳系探索到轨道交会和行星机器人等各种用例提供​​了一系列渲染图像插图。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了Airbus开发的SurRender软件v7在空间应用中的图像模拟能力，强调其在视觉导航算法开发中的重要性。
AI.motivation: 传统渲染引擎在空间应用中存在关键限制，而可靠的图像模拟对视觉导航算法至关重要。
AI.method: 通过介绍SurRender软件的功能特性，并展示其在月球探索、轨道对接等场景的图像渲染实例。
AI.result: 验证了SurRender在多种空间任务场景下生成高质量模拟图像的能力，支撑计算机视觉解决方案开发。
AI.conclusion: SurRender软件已成为Airbus空间计算机视觉系统开发的核心工具，满足复杂任务的图像模拟需求。

We show how SurRender is at the heart of the development processes of our computer vision solutions and we provide a series of illustrations of rendered images for various use cases ranging from Moon and Solar System exploration, to in orbit rendezvous and planetary robotics. 基于视觉的导航的图像处理算法需要可靠的图像模拟能力。在本文中，我们解释了为什么传统渲染引擎可能存在对空间应用可能至关重要的限制。我们介绍 Airbus SurRender 软件 v7，并提供有关使其成为非常强大的空间图像模拟器的功能的详细信息。我们展示了 SurRender 如何成为计算机视觉解决方案开发流程的核心，并为从月球和太阳系探索到轨道交会和行星机器人等各种用例提供​​了一系列渲染图像插图。 本文介绍了Airbus开发的SurRender软件v7在空间应用中的图像模拟能力，强调其在视觉导航算法开发中的重要性。 Jérémy Lebreton,Roland Brochard,Matthieu Baudry,Grégory Jonniaux,Adrien Hadj Salah,Keyvan Kanani,Matthieu Le Goff,Aurore Masson,Nicolas Ollagnier,Paolo Panicucci,Amsha Proag,Cyril Robin astro-ph.EP,astro-ph.IM,cs.AI,cs.CV

title: Towards Long-Form Video Understanding
title_zh: 迈向长视频理解
comment: CVPR 2021
comments: CVPR 2021
abstract: Our world offers a never-ending stream of visual stimuli, yet today's vision systems only accurately recognize patterns within a few seconds. These systems understand the present, but fail to contextualize it in past or future events. In this paper, we study long-form video understanding. We introduce a framework for modeling long-form videos and develop evaluation protocols on large-scale datasets. We show that existing state-of-the-art short-term models are limited for long-form tasks. A novel object-centric transformer-based video recognition architecture performs significantly better on 7 diverse tasks. It also outperforms comparable state-of-the-art on the AVA dataset.
summary: Our world offers a never-ending stream of visual stimuli, yet today's vision systems only accurately recognize patterns within a few seconds. These systems understand the present, but fail to contextualize it in past or future events. In this paper, we study long-form video understanding. We introduce a framework for modeling long-form videos and develop evaluation protocols on large-scale datasets. We show that existing state-of-the-art short-term models are limited for long-form tasks. A novel object-centric transformer-based video recognition architecture performs significantly better on 7 diverse tasks. It also outperforms comparable state-of-the-art on the AVA dataset.
abstract_zh: 我们的世界提供了源源不断的视觉刺激，但今天的视觉系统只能在几秒钟内准确识别模式。这些系统了解现在，但无法将其与过去或未来事件联系起来。在本文中，我们研究长格式视频理解。我们引入了一个用于对长视频进行建模的框架，并开发了大规模数据集的评估协议。我们表明，现有的最先进的短期模型仅限于长期任务。一种新颖的、以对象为中心、基于变压器的视频识别架构在 7 种不同的任务上表现明显更好。它在 AVA 数据集上的性能也优于同类最先进的技术。

AI.tldr: 本文研究长视频理解，提出建模框架与评估协议，并开发基于Transformer的新架构以提升长视频任务表现。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉系统仅能识别短时内容，无法将当前信息与过去或未来事件关联，限制了视频理解的上下文感知能力。
AI.method: 引入对象为中心的Transformer架构，设计针对长视频的建模框架，并构建大规模数据集的评估协议。
AI.result: 新架构在7个多样化任务中显著优于现有短时模型，在AVA数据集上也超越了同类最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 传统短时模型难以处理长视频任务，对象中心Transformer架构有效提升了长视频理解能力，未来需进一步优化与扩展。

authors_text: Zechun Liu,Zhiqiang Shen,Shichao Li,Koen Helwegen,Dong Huang,Kwang-Ting Cheng
title: How Do Adam and Training Strategies Help BNNs Optimization?
title_zh: Adam 和训练策略如何帮助 BNN 优化？
comment: ICML 2021. Code and models are available at https://github.com/liuzechun/AdamBNN
comments: ICML 2021. Code and models are available at https://github.com/liuzechun/AdamBNN
abstract: The best performing Binary Neural Networks (BNNs) are usually attained using Adam optimization and its multi-step training variants. However, to the best of our knowledge, few studies explore the fundamental reasons why Adam is superior to other optimizers like SGD for BNN optimization or provide analytical explanations that support specific training strategies. To address this, in this paper we first investigate the trajectories of gradients and weights in BNNs during the training process. We show the regularization effect of second-order momentum in Adam is crucial to revitalize the weights that are dead due to the activation saturation in BNNs. We find that Adam, through its adaptive learning rate strategy, is better equipped to handle the rugged loss surface of BNNs and reaches a better optimum with higher generalization ability. Furthermore, we inspect the intriguing role of the real-valued weights in binary networks, and reveal the effect of weight decay on the stability and sluggishness of BNN optimization. Through extensive experiments and analysis, we derive a simple training scheme, building on existing Adam-based optimization, which achieves 70.5% top-1 accuracy on the ImageNet dataset using the same architecture as the state-of-the-art ReActNet while achieving 1.1% higher accuracy. Code and models are available at https://github.com/liuzechun/AdamBNN.
summary: The best performing Binary Neural Networks (BNNs) are usually attained using Adam optimization and its multi-step training variants. However, to the best of our knowledge, few studies explore the fundamental reasons why Adam is superior to other optimizers like SGD for BNN optimization or provide analytical explanations that support specific training strategies. To address this, in this paper we first investigate the trajectories of gradients and weights in BNNs during the training process. We show the regularization effect of second-order momentum in Adam is crucial to revitalize the weights that are dead due to the activation saturation in BNNs. We find that Adam, through its adaptive learning rate strategy, is better equipped to handle the rugged loss surface of BNNs and reaches a better optimum with higher generalization ability. Furthermore, we inspect the intriguing role of the real-valued weights in binary networks, and reveal the effect of weight decay on the stability and sluggishness of BNN optimization. Through extensive experiments and analysis, we derive a simple training scheme, building on existing Adam-based optimization, which achieves 70.5% top-1 accuracy on the ImageNet dataset using the same architecture as the state-of-the-art ReActNet while achieving 1.1% higher accuracy. Code and models are available at https://github.com/liuzechun/AdamBNN.
abstract_zh: 性能最佳的二元神经网络 (BNN) 通常是使用 Adam 优化及其多步训练变体来实现的。然而，据我们所知，很少有研究探讨 Adam 在 BNN 优化方面优于 SGD 等其他优化器的根本原因，或提供支持特定训练策略的分析解释。为了解决这个问题，在本文中，我们首先研究训练过程中 BNN 中梯度和权重的轨迹。我们证明了 Adam 中二阶动量的正则化效应对于恢复因 BNN 激活饱和而死亡的权重至关重要。我们发现 Adam 通过其自适应学习率策略，能够更好地处理 BNN 的崎岖损失表面，并以更高的泛化能力达到更好的最优值。此外，我们研究了二元网络中实值权重的有趣作用，并揭示了权重衰减对 BNN 优化的稳定性和迟缓性的影响。通过大量的实验和分析，我们在现有的基于 Adam 的优化基础上得出了一个简单的训练方案，该方案使用与最先进的 ReActNet 相同的架构在 ImageNet 数据集上实现了 70.5% 的 top-1 准确率，同时实现了 1.1% 的高准确率。代码和模型可在 https://github.com/liuzechun/AdamBNN 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在探讨Adam优化器及训练策略在二值神经网络（BNNs）优化中的作用，并提出一种有效的训练方案。
AI.motivation: 现有研究缺乏对Adam优化器为何在BNN优化中优于其他优化器（如SGD）的深入分析。
AI.method: 通过分析梯度和权重轨迹，研究Adam动量的正则化效果，探讨实值权重的作用及权重衰减的影响，并基于现有Adam优化方法提出简单训练方案。
AI.result: 在ImageNet数据集上达到70.5%的top-1准确率，比现有ReActNet模型高1.1%。
AI.conclusion: Adam优化器的自适应学习率和动量机制能有效缓解BNN优化中的激活饱和问题，提出的训练策略具有较高的实用价值。

search_text: How Do Adam and Training Strategies Help BNNs Optimization? Adam 和训练策略如何帮助 BNN 优化？ The best performing Binary Neural Networks (BNNs) are usually attained using Adam optimization and its multi-step training variants. However, to the best of our knowledge, few studies explore the fundamental reasons why Adam is superior to other optimizers like SGD for BNN optimization or provide analytical explanations that support specific training strategies. To address this, in this paper we first investigate the trajectories of gradients and weights in BNNs during the training process. We show the regularization effect of second-order momentum in Adam is crucial to revitalize the weights that are dead due to the activation saturation in BNNs. We find that Adam, through its adaptive learning rate strategy, is better equipped to handle the rugged loss surface of BNNs and reaches a better optimum with higher generalization ability. Furthermore, we inspect the intriguing role of the real-valued weights in binary networks, and reveal the effect of weight decay on the stability and sluggishness of BNN optimization. Through extensive experiments and analysis, we derive a simple training scheme, building on existing Adam-based optimization, which achieves 70.5% top-1 accuracy on the ImageNet dataset using the same architecture as the state-of-the-art ReActNet while achieving 1.1% higher accuracy. Code and models are available at https://github.com/liuzechun/AdamBNN. 性能最佳的二元神经网络 (BNN) 通常是使用 Adam 优化及其多步训练变体来实现的。然而，据我们所知，很少有研究探讨 Adam 在 BNN 优化方面优于 SGD 等其他优化器的根本原因，或提供支持特定训练策略的分析解释。为了解决这个问题，在本文中，我们首先研究训练过程中 BNN 中梯度和权重的轨迹。我们证明了 Adam 中二阶动量的正则化效应对于恢复因 BNN 激活饱和而死亡的权重至关重要。我们发现 Adam 通过其自适应学习率策略，能够更好地处理 BNN 的崎岖损失表面，并以更高的泛化能力达到更好的最优值。此外，我们研究了二元网络中实值权重的有趣作用，并揭示了权重衰减对 BNN 优化的稳定性和迟缓性的影响。通过大量的实验和分析，我们在现有的基于 Adam 的优化基础上得出了一个简单的训练方案，该方案使用与最先进的 ReActNet 相同的架构在 ImageNet 数据集上实现了 70.5% 的 top-1 准确率，同时实现了 1.1% 的高准确率。代码和模型可在 https://github.com/liuzechun/AdamBNN 获取。 本文旨在探讨Adam优化器及训练策略在二值神经网络（BNNs）优化中的作用，并提出一种有效的训练方案。 Zechun Liu,Zhiqiang Shen,Shichao Li,Koen Helwegen,Dong Huang,Kwang-Ting Cheng cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CV

title: Fast Simultaneous Gravitational Alignment of Multiple Point Sets
title_zh: 多点集的快速同时重力对准
comment: Project webpage: http://gvv.mpi-inf.mpg.de/projects/MBGA/
comments: Project webpage: http://gvv.mpi-inf.mpg.de/projects/MBGA/
abstract: The problem of simultaneous rigid alignment of multiple unordered point sets which is unbiased towards any of the inputs has recently attracted increasing interest, and several reliable methods have been newly proposed. While being remarkably robust towards noise and clustered outliers, current approaches require sophisticated initialisation schemes and do not scale well to large point sets. This paper proposes a new resilient technique for simultaneous registration of multiple point sets by interpreting the latter as particle swarms rigidly moving in the mutually induced force fields. Thanks to the improved simulation with altered physical laws and acceleration of globally multiply-linked point interactions with a 2^D-tree (D is the space dimensionality), our Multi-Body Gravitational Approach (MBGA) is robust to noise and missing data while supporting more massive point sets than previous methods (with 10^5 points and more). In various experimental settings, MBGA is shown to outperform several baseline point set alignment approaches in terms of accuracy and runtime. We make our source code available for the community to facilitate the reproducibility of the results.
summary: The problem of simultaneous rigid alignment of multiple unordered point sets which is unbiased towards any of the inputs has recently attracted increasing interest, and several reliable methods have been newly proposed. While being remarkably robust towards noise and clustered outliers, current approaches require sophisticated initialisation schemes and do not scale well to large point sets. This paper proposes a new resilient technique for simultaneous registration of multiple point sets by interpreting the latter as particle swarms rigidly moving in the mutually induced force fields. Thanks to the improved simulation with altered physical laws and acceleration of globally multiply-linked point interactions with a 2^D-tree (D is the space dimensionality), our Multi-Body Gravitational Approach (MBGA) is robust to noise and missing data while supporting more massive point sets than previous methods (with 10^5 points and more). In various experimental settings, MBGA is shown to outperform several baseline point set alignment approaches in terms of accuracy and runtime. We make our source code available for the community to facilitate the reproducibility of the results.
abstract_zh: 对任何输入无偏的多个无序点集的同时刚性对齐问题最近引起了越来越多的兴趣，并且新提出了几种可靠的方法。虽然当前的方法对于噪声和集群异常值非常稳健，但需要复杂的初始化方案，并且不能很好地扩展到大型点集。本文提出了一种新的弹性技术，用于同时注册多个点集，将后者解释为在互感力场中刚性移动的粒子群。由于改变了物理定律并加速了与 2^D 树（D 是空间维度）的全局多链接点交互的改进模拟，我们的多体引力方法 (MBGA) 对噪声和丢失数据具有鲁棒性，同时支持比以前的方法更大规模的点集（具有 10^5 点及更多）。在各种实验设置中，MBGA 在准确性和运行时间方面均优于多种基线点集对齐方法。我们向社区提供源代码，以促进结果的可重复性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为MBGA的新方法，用于同时对齐多个无序点集，通过模拟粒子群在相互作用力场中的运动实现鲁棒的多点集配准。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理大规模点集时存在初始化复杂和扩展性差的问题，且对噪声和缺失数据敏感，需改进算法效率与鲁棒性。
AI.method: 将多个点集视为受相互诱导力场影响的粒子群，通过改进的物理模拟规则和2^D树加速全局交互计算，实现高效对齐。
AI.result: 实验表明，MBGA在精度和运行时间上优于多种基线方法，支持10^5量级以上的点集规模。
AI.conclusion: MBGA通过引力模拟与数据结构优化，提供了更高效、鲁棒的多点集同时配准解决方案，适用于大规模数据场景。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为MBGA的新方法，用于同时对齐多个无序点集，通过模拟粒子群在相互作用力场中的运动实现鲁棒的多点集配准。
ai_content.motivation: 现有方法在处理大规模点集时存在初始化复杂和扩展性差的问题，且对噪声和缺失数据敏感，需改进算法效率与鲁棒性。
ai_content.method: 将多个点集视为受相互诱导力场影响的粒子群，通过改进的物理模拟规则和2^D树加速全局交互计算，实现高效对齐。
ai_content.result: 实验表明，MBGA在精度和运行时间上优于多种基线方法，支持10^5量级以上的点集规模。
ai_content.conclusion: MBGA通过引力模拟与数据结构优化，提供了更高效、鲁棒的多点集同时配准解决方案，适用于大规模数据场景。

search_text: Fast Simultaneous Gravitational Alignment of Multiple Point Sets 多点集的快速同时重力对准 The problem of simultaneous rigid alignment of multiple unordered point sets which is unbiased towards any of the inputs has recently attracted increasing interest, and several reliable methods have been newly proposed. While being remarkably robust towards noise and clustered outliers, current approaches require sophisticated initialisation schemes and do not scale well to large point sets. This paper proposes a new resilient technique for simultaneous registration of multiple point sets by interpreting the latter as particle swarms rigidly moving in the mutually induced force fields. Thanks to the improved simulation with altered physical laws and acceleration of globally multiply-linked point interactions with a 2^D-tree (D is the space dimensionality), our Multi-Body Gravitational Approach (MBGA) is robust to noise and missing data while supporting more massive point sets than previous methods (with 10^5 points and more). In various experimental settings, MBGA is shown to outperform several baseline point set alignment approaches in terms of accuracy and runtime. We make our source code available for the community to facilitate the reproducibility of the results. 对任何输入无偏的多个无序点集的同时刚性对齐问题最近引起了越来越多的兴趣，并且新提出了几种可靠的方法。虽然当前的方法对于噪声和集群异常值非常稳健，但需要复杂的初始化方案，并且不能很好地扩展到大型点集。本文提出了一种新的弹性技术，用于同时注册多个点集，将后者解释为在互感力场中刚性移动的粒子群。由于改变了物理定律并加速了与 2^D 树（D 是空间维度）的全局多链接点交互的改进模拟，我们的多体引力方法 (MBGA) 对噪声和丢失数据具有鲁棒性，同时支持比以前的方法更大规模的点集（具有 10^5 点及更多）。在各种实验设置中，MBGA 在准确性和运行时间方面均优于多种基线点集对齐方法。我们向社区提供源代码，以促进结果的可重复性。 本文提出了一种名为MBGA的新方法，用于同时对齐多个无序点集，通过模拟粒子群在相互作用力场中的运动实现鲁棒的多点集配准。 Vladislav Golyanik,Soshi Shimada,Christian Theobalt cs.CV

title: Simple Distillation Baselines for Improving Small Self-supervised Models
title_zh: 用于改进小型自监督模型的简单蒸馏基线
abstract: While large self-supervised models have rivalled the performance of their supervised counterparts, small models still struggle. In this report, we explore simple baselines for improving small self-supervised models via distillation, called SimDis. Specifically, we present an offline-distillation baseline, which establishes a new state-of-the-art, and an online-distillation baseline, which achieves similar performance with minimal computational overhead. We hope these baselines will provide useful experience for relevant future research. Code is available at: https://github.com/JindongGu/SimDis/
summary: While large self-supervised models have rivalled the performance of their supervised counterparts, small models still struggle. In this report, we explore simple baselines for improving small self-supervised models via distillation, called SimDis. Specifically, we present an offline-distillation baseline, which establishes a new state-of-the-art, and an online-distillation baseline, which achieves similar performance with minimal computational overhead. We hope these baselines will provide useful experience for relevant future research. Code is available at: https://github.com/JindongGu/SimDis/
abstract_zh: 尽管大型自监督模型的性能已可与监督模型相媲美，但小型模型仍然举步维艰。在本报告中，我们探索了通过蒸馏改进小型自监督模型的简单基线，称为 SimDis。具体来说，我们提出了一个离线蒸馏基线，它建立了一个新的最先进技术，以及一个在线蒸馏基线，它以最小的计算开销实现了类似的性能。我们希望这些基线能为未来的相关研究提供有益的经验。代码位于：https://github.com/JindongGu/SimDis/

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过蒸馏方法改进小型自监督模型的性能，称为SimDis。
AI.motivation: 尽管大型自监督模型已接近监督模型性能，但小型模型仍存在性能不足的问题，需探索有效改进方法。
AI.method: 提出两种蒸馏基线：离线蒸馏（新SOTA）和在线蒸馏（低计算开销）。
AI.result: 离线蒸馏达到新状态-of-the-art，在线蒸馏以相似性能实现低计算成本。
AI.conclusion: 希望提供未来研究的实用经验，代码已开源。

title: Understanding Object Dynamics for Interactive Image-to-Video Synthesis
title_zh: 了解交互式图像到视频合成的对象动力学
comment: CVPR 2021, project page available at https://bit.ly/3cxfA2L
comments: CVPR 2021, project page available at https://bit.ly/3cxfA2L
abstract: What would be the effect of locally poking a static scene? We present an approach that learns naturally-looking global articulations caused by a local manipulation at a pixel level. Training requires only videos of moving objects but no information of the underlying manipulation of the physical scene. Our generative model learns to infer natural object dynamics as a response to user interaction and learns about the interrelations between different object body regions. Given a static image of an object and a local poking of a pixel, the approach then predicts how the object would deform over time. In contrast to existing work on video prediction, we do not synthesize arbitrary realistic videos but enable local interactive control of the deformation. Our model is not restricted to particular object categories and can transfer dynamics onto novel unseen object instances. Extensive experiments on diverse objects demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach compared to common video prediction frameworks. Project page is available at https://bit.ly/3cxfA2L .
summary: What would be the effect of locally poking a static scene? We present an approach that learns naturally-looking global articulations caused by a local manipulation at a pixel level. Training requires only videos of moving objects but no information of the underlying manipulation of the physical scene. Our generative model learns to infer natural object dynamics as a response to user interaction and learns about the interrelations between different object body regions. Given a static image of an object and a local poking of a pixel, the approach then predicts how the object would deform over time. In contrast to existing work on video prediction, we do not synthesize arbitrary realistic videos but enable local interactive control of the deformation. Our model is not restricted to particular object categories and can transfer dynamics onto novel unseen object instances. Extensive experiments on diverse objects demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach compared to common video prediction frameworks. Project page is available at https://bit.ly/3cxfA2L .
abstract_zh: 局部戳静态场景会产生什么效果？我们提出了一种方法，可以学习由像素级局部操作引起的看起来自然的全局清晰度。训练只需要移动物体的视频，但不需要物理场景的底层操作信息。我们的生成模型学习推断自然物体动力学作为对用户交互的响应，并了解不同物体身体区域之间的相互关系。给定一个物体的静态图像和一个像素的局部戳，该方法然后预测该物体随着时间的推移将如何变形。与现有的视频预测工作相比，我们不合成任意真实的视频，而是实现变形的本地交互式控制。我们的模型不限于特定的对象类别，并且可以将动态转移到新的看不见的对象实例上。对不同对象的广泛实验证明了我们的方法与常见视频预测框架相比的有效性。项目页面位于 https://bit.ly/3cxfA2L 。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种交互式图像到视频合成方法，通过学习物体动态响应局部像素级操作，生成自然变形的视频。
AI.motivation: 现有视频预测方法难以处理局部交互控制及跨物体动态迁移，需开发能从用户交互中推断自然物体动态的模型。
AI.method: 基于仅需移动物体视频的生成模型，学习物体各部位间关联及对像素级操作的响应，实现无需物理模拟的动态预测。
AI.result: 在多种物体上验证了方法有效性，相比传统视频预测框架表现更优，支持新型未见物体的动态迁移。
AI.conclusion: 该方法实现了局部交互控制与跨物体动态迁移，为交互式视频生成提供了新思路。

authors_text: Andreas Mayr,Sebastian Lehner,Arno Mayrhofer,Christoph Kloss,Sepp Hochreiter,Johannes Brandstetter
title: Boundary Graph Neural Networks for 3D Simulations
title_zh: 用于 3D 模拟的边界图神经网络
comment: accepted for presentation at the Thirty-Seventh AAAI Conference on Artificial Intelligence (AAAI-23)
comments: accepted for presentation at the Thirty-Seventh AAAI Conference on Artificial Intelligence (AAAI-23)
abstract: The abundance of data has given machine learning considerable momentum in natural sciences and engineering, though modeling of physical processes is often difficult. A particularly tough problem is the efficient representation of geometric boundaries. Triangularized geometric boundaries are well understood and ubiquitous in engineering applications. However, it is notoriously difficult to integrate them into machine learning approaches due to their heterogeneity with respect to size and orientation. In this work, we introduce an effective theory to model particle-boundary interactions, which leads to our new Boundary Graph Neural Networks (BGNNs) that dynamically modify graph structures to obey boundary conditions. The new BGNNs are tested on complex 3D granular flow processes of hoppers, rotating drums and mixers, which are all standard components of modern industrial machinery but still have complicated geometry. BGNNs are evaluated in terms of computational efficiency as well as prediction accuracy of particle flows and mixing entropies. BGNNs are able to accurately reproduce 3D granular flows within simulation uncertainties over hundreds of thousands of simulation timesteps. Most notably, in our experiments, particles stay within the geometric objects without using handcrafted conditions or restrictions.
summary: The abundance of data has given machine learning considerable momentum in natural sciences and engineering, though modeling of physical processes is often difficult. A particularly tough problem is the efficient representation of geometric boundaries. Triangularized geometric boundaries are well understood and ubiquitous in engineering applications. However, it is notoriously difficult to integrate them into machine learning approaches due to their heterogeneity with respect to size and orientation. In this work, we introduce an effective theory to model particle-boundary interactions, which leads to our new Boundary Graph Neural Networks (BGNNs) that dynamically modify graph structures to obey boundary conditions. The new BGNNs are tested on complex 3D granular flow processes of hoppers, rotating drums and mixers, which are all standard components of modern industrial machinery but still have complicated geometry. BGNNs are evaluated in terms of computational efficiency as well as prediction accuracy of particle flows and mixing entropies. BGNNs are able to accurately reproduce 3D granular flows within simulation uncertainties over hundreds of thousands of simulation timesteps. Most notably, in our experiments, particles stay within the geometric objects without using handcrafted conditions or restrictions.
abstract_zh: 尽管物理过程的建模通常很困难，但丰富的数据给机器学习在自然科学和工程学领域带来了巨大的动力。一个特别棘手的问题是几何边界的有效表示。三角形几何边界在工程应用中很容易理解并且普遍存在。然而，由于它们在大小和方向方面的异质性，将它们集成到机器学习方法中是出了名的困难。在这项工作中，我们引入了一种有效的理论来模拟粒子边界相互作用，从而产生了新的边界图神经网络（BGNN），它可以动态修改图结构以服从边界条件。新的 BGNN 在料斗、转鼓和混合器的复杂 3D 颗粒流动过程中进行了测试，这些都是现代工业机械的标准组件，但仍然具有复杂的几何形状。 BGNN 根据计算效率以及粒子流和混合熵的预测精度进行评估。 BGNN 能够在数十万个模拟时间步长的模拟不确定性内准确再现 3D 颗粒流。最值得注意的是，在我们的实验中，粒子保留在几何物体内，而无需使用手工条件或限制。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的边界图神经网络（BGNNs），用于解决三维工业设备中复杂几何边界下的颗粒流模拟问题。
AI.motivation: 传统三角化几何边界因异质性难以整合到机器学习模型中，而工业设备中复杂几何结构的颗粒流模拟缺乏高效准确的解决方案。
AI.method: 通过建立粒子-边界相互作用理论，设计动态调整图结构的边界图神经网络（BGNNs），使其自动适应几何边界条件。
AI.result: BGNNs在料斗、旋转鼓等设备中准确模拟了数十万时间步的颗粒流动，无需人工约束即可保持粒子在几何体内，且计算效率高。
AI.conclusion: BGNNs为复杂几何边界下的三维颗粒流模拟提供了高效准确的机器学习方法，可应用于工业设备设计与优化。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的边界图神经网络（BGNNs），用于解决三维工业设备中复杂几何边界下的颗粒流模拟问题。
ai_content.motivation: 传统三角化几何边界因异质性难以整合到机器学习模型中，而工业设备中复杂几何结构的颗粒流模拟缺乏高效准确的解决方案。
ai_content.method: 通过建立粒子-边界相互作用理论，设计动态调整图结构的边界图神经网络（BGNNs），使其自动适应几何边界条件。
ai_content.result: BGNNs在料斗、旋转鼓等设备中准确模拟了数十万时间步的颗粒流动，无需人工约束即可保持粒子在几何体内，且计算效率高。
ai_content.conclusion: BGNNs为复杂几何边界下的三维颗粒流模拟提供了高效准确的机器学习方法，可应用于工业设备设计与优化。
