search_text: Boundary Graph Neural Networks for 3D Simulations 用于 3D 模拟的边界图神经网络 The abundance of data has given machine learning considerable momentum in natural sciences and engineering, though modeling of physical processes is often difficult. A particularly tough problem is the efficient representation of geometric boundaries. Triangularized geometric boundaries are well understood and ubiquitous in engineering applications. However, it is notoriously difficult to integrate them into machine learning approaches due to their heterogeneity with respect to size and orientation. In this work, we introduce an effective theory to model particle-boundary interactions, which leads to our new Boundary Graph Neural Networks (BGNNs) that dynamically modify graph structures to obey boundary conditions. The new BGNNs are tested on complex 3D granular flow processes of hoppers, rotating drums and mixers, which are all standard components of modern industrial machinery but still have complicated geometry. BGNNs are evaluated in terms of computational efficiency as well as prediction accuracy of particle flows and mixing entropies. BGNNs are able to accurately reproduce 3D granular flows within simulation uncertainties over hundreds of thousands of simulation timesteps. Most notably, in our experiments, particles stay within the geometric objects without using handcrafted conditions or restrictions. 尽管物理过程的建模通常很困难，但丰富的数据给机器学习在自然科学和工程学领域带来了巨大的动力。一个特别棘手的问题是几何边界的有效表示。三角形几何边界在工程应用中很容易理解并且普遍存在。然而，由于它们在大小和方向方面的异质性，将它们集成到机器学习方法中是出了名的困难。在这项工作中，我们引入了一种有效的理论来模拟粒子边界相互作用，从而产生了新的边界图神经网络（BGNN），它可以动态修改图结构以服从边界条件。新的 BGNN 在料斗、转鼓和混合器的复杂 3D 颗粒流动过程中进行了测试，这些都是现代工业机械的标准组件，但仍然具有复杂的几何形状。 BGNN 根据计算效率以及粒子流和混合熵的预测精度进行评估。 BGNN 能够在数十万个模拟时间步长的模拟不确定性内准确再现 3D 颗粒流。最值得注意的是，在我们的实验中，粒子保留在几何物体内，而无需使用手工条件或限制。 本文提出了一种新的边界图神经网络（BGNNs），用于解决三维工业设备中复杂几何边界下的颗粒流模拟问题。 Andreas Mayr,Sebastian Lehner,Arno Mayrhofer,Christoph Kloss,Sepp Hochreiter,Johannes Brandstetter cs.LG,cs.AI,stat.ML

authors_text: Michael S. Ryoo,AJ Piergiovanni,Anurag Arnab,Mostafa Dehghani,Anelia Angelova
title: TokenLearner: What Can 8 Learned Tokens Do for Images and Videos?
title_zh: TokenLearner：8 个学习代币可以为图像和视频做什么？
comment: This is the full version of the paper, extending its conference paper at NeurIPS 2021. Version 1.1 of the code is released
comments: This is the full version of the paper, extending its conference paper at NeurIPS 2021. Version 1.1 of the code is released
abstract: In this paper, we introduce a novel visual representation learning which relies on a handful of adaptively learned tokens, and which is applicable to both image and video understanding tasks. Instead of relying on hand-designed splitting strategies to obtain visual tokens and processing a large number of densely sampled patches for attention, our approach learns to mine important tokens in visual data. This results in efficiently and effectively finding a few important visual tokens and enables modeling of pairwise attention between such tokens, over a longer temporal horizon for videos, or the spatial content in images. Our experiments demonstrate strong performance on several challenging benchmarks for both image and video recognition tasks. Importantly, due to our tokens being adaptive, we accomplish competitive results at significantly reduced compute amount. We obtain comparable results to the state-of-the-arts on ImageNet while being computationally more efficient. We also confirm the effectiveness of the approach on multiple video datasets, including Kinetics-400, Kinetics-600, Charades, and AViD. The code is available at: https://github.com/google-research/scenic/tree/main/scenic/projects/token_learner
summary: In this paper, we introduce a novel visual representation learning which relies on a handful of adaptively learned tokens, and which is applicable to both image and video understanding tasks. Instead of relying on hand-designed splitting strategies to obtain visual tokens and processing a large number of densely sampled patches for attention, our approach learns to mine important tokens in visual data. This results in efficiently and effectively finding a few important visual tokens and enables modeling of pairwise attention between such tokens, over a longer temporal horizon for videos, or the spatial content in images. Our experiments demonstrate strong performance on several challenging benchmarks for both image and video recognition tasks. Importantly, due to our tokens being adaptive, we accomplish competitive results at significantly reduced compute amount. We obtain comparable results to the state-of-the-arts on ImageNet while being computationally more efficient. We also confirm the effectiveness of the approach on multiple video datasets, including Kinetics-400, Kinetics-600, Charades, and AViD. The code is available at: https://github.com/google-research/scenic/tree/main/scenic/projects/token_learner
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们介绍了一种新颖的视觉表示学习，它依赖于一些自适应学习的标记，并且适用于图像和视频理解任务。我们的方法不是依靠手工设计的分割策略来获取视觉标记并处理大量密集采样的补丁以引起注意，而是学习挖掘视觉数据中的重要标记。这导致高效且有效地找到一些重要的视觉标记，并能够在视频的较长时间范围内或图像中的空间内容上对这些标记之间的成对注意力进行建模。我们的实验证明了在图像和视频识别任务的几个具有挑战性的基准上的强大性能。重要的是，由于我们的代币具有适应性，我们可以在显着减少计算量的情况下实现有竞争力的结果。我们获得了与 ImageNet 上最先进的结果相当的结果，同时计算效率更高。我们还确认了该方法在多个视频数据集上的有效性，包括 Kinetics-400、Kinetics-600、Charades 和 AViD。该代码位于：https://github.com/google-research/scenic/tree/main/scenic/projects/token_learner

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于自适应学习token的视觉表示方法，通过挖掘少量关键token提升图像和视频理解任务的效率。
AI.motivation: 传统视觉模型依赖手工设计的token分割策略和密集采样patch，导致计算成本高且冗余。
AI.method: 通过自适应学习机制从视觉数据中挖掘少量关键token，替代密集采样patch，并在长时序视频或图像空间中建立token间注意力模型。
AI.result: 在ImageNet及Kinetics-400/600等视频数据集上达到与SOTA相当的性能，同时显著降低计算量。
AI.conclusion: TokenLearner在保持模型性能的前提下实现了更高效的计算，适用于图像和视频任务，代码已开源。

search_text: TokenLearner: What Can 8 Learned Tokens Do for Images and Videos? TokenLearner：8 个学习代币可以为图像和视频做什么？ In this paper, we introduce a novel visual representation learning which relies on a handful of adaptively learned tokens, and which is applicable to both image and video understanding tasks. Instead of relying on hand-designed splitting strategies to obtain visual tokens and processing a large number of densely sampled patches for attention, our approach learns to mine important tokens in visual data. This results in efficiently and effectively finding a few important visual tokens and enables modeling of pairwise attention between such tokens, over a longer temporal horizon for videos, or the spatial content in images. Our experiments demonstrate strong performance on several challenging benchmarks for both image and video recognition tasks. Importantly, due to our tokens being adaptive, we accomplish competitive results at significantly reduced compute amount. We obtain comparable results to the state-of-the-arts on ImageNet while being computationally more efficient. We also confirm the effectiveness of the approach on multiple video datasets, including Kinetics-400, Kinetics-600, Charades, and AViD. The code is available at: https://github.com/google-research/scenic/tree/main/scenic/projects/token_learner 在本文中，我们介绍了一种新颖的视觉表示学习，它依赖于一些自适应学习的标记，并且适用于图像和视频理解任务。我们的方法不是依靠手工设计的分割策略来获取视觉标记并处理大量密集采样的补丁以引起注意，而是学习挖掘视觉数据中的重要标记。这导致高效且有效地找到一些重要的视觉标记，并能够在视频的较长时间范围内或图像中的空间内容上对这些标记之间的成对注意力进行建模。我们的实验证明了在图像和视频识别任务的几个具有挑战性的基准上的强大性能。重要的是，由于我们的代币具有适应性，我们可以在显着减少计算量的情况下实现有竞争力的结果。我们获得了与 ImageNet 上最先进的结果相当的结果，同时计算效率更高。我们还确认了该方法在多个视频数据集上的有效性，包括 Kinetics-400、Kinetics-600、Charades 和 AViD。该代码位于：https://github.com/google-research/scenic/tree/main/scenic/projects/token_learner 本文提出一种基于自适应学习token的视觉表示方法，通过挖掘少量关键token提升图像和视频理解任务的效率。 Michael S. authors_text: Nader Aldoj,Federico Biavati,Marc Dewey,Anja Hennemuth,Patrick Asbach,Ingolf Sack
title: Fully automated quantification of in vivo viscoelasticity of prostate zones using magnetic resonance elastography with Dense U-net segmentation
title_zh: 使用磁共振弹性成像和密集 U 网分割对前列腺区域的体内粘弹性进行全自动量化
abstract: Magnetic resonance elastography (MRE) for measuring viscoelasticity heavily depends on proper tissue segmentation, especially in heterogeneous organs such as the prostate. Using trained network-based image segmentation, we investigated if MRE data suffice to extract anatomical and viscoelastic information for automatic tabulation of zonal mechanical properties of the prostate. Overall, 40 patients with benign prostatic hyperplasia (BPH) or prostate cancer (PCa) were examined with three magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) sequences: T2-weighted MRI (T2w), diffusion-weighted imaging (DWI), and MRE-based tomoelastography yielding six independent sets of imaging data per patient (T2w, DWI, apparent diffusion coefficient (ADC), MRE magnitude, shear wave speed, and loss angle maps). Combinations of these data were used to train Dense U-nets with manually segmented masks of the entire prostate gland (PG), central zone (CZ), and peripheral zone (PZ) in 30 patients and to validate them in 10 patients. Dice score (DS), sensitivity, specificity, and Hausdorff distance were determined. We found that segmentation based on MRE magnitude maps alone (DS, PG: 0.93$\pm$0.04, CZ: 0.95$\pm$0.03, PZ: 0.77$\pm$0.05) was more accurate than magnitude maps combined with T2w and DWI_b (DS, PG: 0.91$\pm$0.04, CZ: 0.91$\pm$0.06, PZ: 0.63$\pm$0.16) or T2w alone (DS, PG: 0.92$\pm$0.03, CZ: 0.91$\pm$0.04, PZ: 0.65$\pm$0.08). Automatically tabulated MRE values were not different from ground-truth values (P>0.05). In conclusion: MRE combined with Dense U-net segmentation allows tabulation of quantitative imaging markers without manual analysis and independent of other MRI sequences and can thus contribute to PCa detection and classification.
summary: Magnetic resonance elastography (MRE) for measuring viscoelasticity heavily depends on proper tissue segmentation, especially in heterogeneous organs such as the prostate. Using trained network-based image segmentation, we investigated if MRE data suffice to extract anatomical and viscoelastic information for automatic tabulation of zonal mechanical properties of the prostate. Overall, 40 patients with benign prostatic hyperplasia (BPH) or prostate cancer (PCa) were examined with three magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) sequences: T2-weighted MRI (T2w), diffusion-weighted imaging (DWI), and MRE-based tomoelastography yielding six independent sets of imaging data per patient (T2w, DWI, apparent diffusion coefficient (ADC), MRE magnitude, shear wave speed, and loss angle maps). Combinations of these data were used to train Dense U-nets with manually segmented masks of the entire prostate gland (PG), central zone (CZ), and peripheral zone (PZ) in 30 patients and to validate them in 10 patients. Dice score (DS), sensitivity, specificity, and Hausdorff distance were determined. We found that segmentation based on MRE magnitude maps alone (DS, PG: 0.93$\pm$0.04, CZ: 0.95$\pm$0.03, PZ: 0.77$\pm$0.05) was more accurate than magnitude maps combined with T2w and DWI_b (DS, PG: 0.91$\pm$0.04, CZ: 0.91$\pm$0.06, PZ: 0.63$\pm$0.16) or T2w alone (DS, PG: 0.92$\pm$0.03, CZ: 0.91$\pm$0.04, PZ: 0.65$\pm$0.08). Automatically tabulated MRE values were not different from ground-truth values (P>0.05). In conclusion: MRE combined with Dense U-net segmentation allows tabulation of quantitative imaging markers without manual analysis and independent of other MRI sequences and can thus contribute to PCa detection and classification.
abstract_zh: 用于测量粘弹性的磁共振弹性成像（MRE）在很大程度上取决于正确的组织分割，尤其是在前列腺等异质器官中。使用经过训练的基于网络的图像分割，我们研究了 MRE 数据是否足以提取解剖和粘弹性信息，以自动制表前列腺的分区机械特性。总体而言，使用三种磁共振成像 (MRI) 序列对 40 名良性前列腺增生 (BPH) 或前列腺癌 (PCa) 患者进行了检查：T2 加权 MRI (T2w)、扩散加权成像 (DWI) 和基于 MRE 的断层弹性成像，为每位患者生成六组独立的成像数据（T2w、DWI、表观扩散系数 (ADC)、MRE 幅度、剪切波速度和损失角图）。这些数据的组合用于在 30 名患者中训练具有整个前列腺 (PG)、中央区 (CZ) 和外周区 (PZ) 手动分段掩模的密集 U 网，并在 10 名患者中进行验证。确定骰子评分（DS）、敏感性、特异性和豪斯多夫距离。我们发现，单独基于 MRE 震级图的分割（DS，PG：0.93$\pm$0.04，CZ：0.95$\pm$0.03，PZ：0.77$\pm$0.05）比结合 T2w 和 DWI_b 的震级图（DS，PG：0.91$\pm$0.04，CZ：0.91$\pm$0.04，CZ： 0.91$\pm$0.06，PZ：0.63$\pm$0.16）或单独 T2w（DS、PG：0.92$\pm$0.03，CZ：0.91$\pm$0.04，PZ：0.65$\pm$0.08）。自动制表的 MRE 值与真实值没有差异 (P>0.05)。结论：MRE 与密集 U 网分割相结合，无需手动分析即可对定量成像标记进行制表，并且独立于其他 MRI 序列，从而有助于 PCa 检测和分类。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合磁共振弹性成像（MRE）与Dense U-net分割的全自动方法，用于定量分析前列腺各区域的粘弹性特性。
AI.motivation: 传统MRE技术依赖手动分割，耗时且难以处理前列腺等异质性器官。研究旨在探索是否可通过MRE数据自动提取解剖与粘弹性信息，减少对其他MRI序列的依赖，提升前列腺癌检测效率。
AI.method: 使用40例患者（含良性前列腺增生与前列腺癌）的T2加权MRI、弥散加权成像（DWI）及MRE数据，训练Dense U-net网络进行前列腺整体及分区（中央区、外周区）分割，并对比不同数据组合（如仅MRE幅度图、结合T2w/DWI等）的分割效果。
AI.result: 仅基于MRE幅度图的分割Dice系数（PG: 0.93±0.04, CZ: 0.95±0.03, PZ: 0.77±0.05）优于结合T2w/DWI或单独T2w的方案；自动计算的MRE值与真实值无显著差异（P>0.05）。
AI.conclusion: MRE联合Dense U-net分割可无需人工干预及额外MRI序列，实现前列腺粘弹性定量分析，为前列腺癌检测与分类提供新工具。

search_text: Fully automated quantification of in vivo viscoelasticity of prostate zones using magnetic resonance elastography with Dense U-net segmentation 使用磁共振弹性成像和密集 U 网分割对前列腺区域的体内粘弹性进行全自动量化 Magnetic resonance elastography (MRE) for measuring viscoelasticity heavily depends on proper tissue segmentation, especially in heterogeneous organs such as the prostate. Using trained network-based image segmentation, we investigated if MRE data suffice to extract anatomical and viscoelastic information for automatic tabulation of zonal mechanical properties of the prostate. Overall, 40 patients with benign prostatic hyperplasia (BPH) or prostate cancer (PCa) were examined with three magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) sequences: T2-weighted MRI (T2w), diffusion-weighted imaging (DWI), and MRE-based tomoelastography yielding six independent sets of imaging data per patient (T2w, DWI, apparent diffusion coefficient (ADC), MRE magnitude, shear wave speed, and loss angle maps). Combinations of these data were used to train Dense U-nets with manually segmented masks of the entire prostate gland (PG), central zone (CZ), and peripheral zone (PZ) in 30 patients and to validate them in 10 patients. Dice score (DS), sensitivity, specificity, and Hausdorff distance were determined. We found that segmentation based on MRE magnitude maps alone (DS, PG: 0.93$\pm$0.04, CZ: 0.95$\pm$0.03, PZ: 0.77$\pm$0.05) was more accurate than magnitude maps combined with T2w and DWI_b (DS, PG: 0.91$\pm$0.04, CZ: 0.91$\pm$0.06, PZ: 0.63$\pm$0.16) or T2w alone (DS, PG: 0.92$\pm$0.03, CZ: 0.91$\pm$0.04, PZ: 0.65$\pm$0.08). Automatically tabulated MRE values were not different from ground-truth values (P>0.05). In conclusion: MRE combined with Dense U-net segmentation allows tabulation of quantitative imaging markers without manual analysis and independent of other MRI sequences and can thus contribute to PCa detection and classification. 用于测量粘弹性的磁共振弹性成像（MRE）在很大程度上取决于正确的组织分割，尤其是在前列腺等异质器官中。使用经过训练的基于网络的图像分割，我们研究了 MRE 数据是否足以提取解剖和粘弹性信息，以自动制表前列腺的分区机械特性。总体而言，使用三种磁共振成像 (MRI) 序列对 40 名良性前列腺增生 (BPH) 或前列腺癌 (PCa) 患者进行了检查：T2 加权 MRI (T2w)、扩散加权成像 (DWI) 和基于 MRE 的断层弹性成像，为每位患者生成六组独立的成像数据（T2w、DWI、表观扩散系数 (ADC)、MRE 幅度、剪切波速度和损失角图）。这些数据的组合用于在 30 名患者中训练具有整个前列腺 (PG)、中央区 (CZ) 和外周区 (PZ) 手动分段掩模的密集 U 网，并在 10 名患者中进行验证。确定骰子评分（DS）、敏感性、特异性和豪斯多夫距离。我们发现，单独基于 MRE 震级图的分割（DS，PG：0.93$\pm$0.04，CZ：0.95$\pm$0.03，PZ：0.77$\pm$0.05）比结合 T2w 和 DWI_b 的震级图（DS，PG：0.91$\pm$0.04，CZ：0.91$\pm$0.04，CZ： 0.91$\pm$0.06，PZ：0.63$\pm$0.16）或单独 T2w（DS、PG：0.92$\pm$0.03，CZ：0.91$\pm$0.04，PZ：0.65$\pm$0.08）。自动制表的 MRE 值与真实值没有差异 (P>0.05)。结论：MRE 与密集 U 网分割相结合，无需手动分析即可对定量成像标记进行制表，并且独立于其他 MRI 序列，从而有助于 PCa 检测和分类。 本文提出了一种结合磁共振弹性成像（MRE）与Dense U-net分割的全自动方法，用于定量分析前列腺各区域的粘弹性特性。 Nader Aldoj,Federico Biavati,Marc Dewey,Anja Hennemuth,Patrick Asbach,Ingolf Sack eess.IV,cs.LG

authors_text: Yapkan Choi,Yeshwanth Napolean,Jan C. van Gemert
title: The Arm-Swing Is Discriminative in Video Gait Recognition for Athlete Re-Identification
title_zh: 手臂摆动在运动员重新识别的视频步态识别中具有辨别力
comment: ICIP 2021
comments: ICIP 2021
abstract: In this paper we evaluate running gait as an attribute for video person re-identification in a long-distance running event. We show that running gait recognition achieves competitive performance compared to appearance-based approaches in the cross-camera retrieval task and that gait and appearance features are complementary to each other. For gait, the arm swing during running is less distinguishable when using binary gait silhouettes, due to ambiguity in the torso region. We propose to use human semantic parsing to create partial gait silhouettes where the torso is left out. Leaving out the torso improves recognition results by allowing the arm swing to be more visible in the frontal and oblique viewing angles, which offers hints that arm swings are somewhat personal. Experiments show an increase of 3.2% mAP on the CampusRun and increased accuracy with 4.8% in the frontal and rear view on CASIA-B, compared to using the full body silhouettes.
summary: In this paper we evaluate running gait as an attribute for video person re-identification in a long-distance running event. We show that running gait recognition achieves competitive performance compared to appearance-based approaches in the cross-camera retrieval task and that gait and appearance features are complementary to each other. For gait, the arm swing during running is less distinguishable when using binary gait silhouettes, due to ambiguity in the torso region. We propose to use human semantic parsing to create partial gait silhouettes where the torso is left out. Leaving out the torso improves recognition results by allowing the arm swing to be more visible in the frontal and oblique viewing angles, which offers hints that arm swings are somewhat personal. Experiments show an increase of 3.2% mAP on the CampusRun and increased accuracy with 4.8% in the frontal and rear view on CASIA-B, compared to using the full body silhouettes.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们评估跑步步态作为长距离跑步赛事中视频人物重新识别的属性。我们表明，在跨摄像机检索任务中，与基于外观的方法相比，跑步步态识别实现了有竞争力的性能，并且步态和外观特征是相互补充的。对于步态，由于躯干区域的模糊性，当使用二元步态轮廓时，跑步期间的手臂摆动不太容易区分。我们建议使用人类语义解析来创建遗漏躯干的部分步态轮廓。忽略躯干可以让手臂摆动在正面和倾斜视角中更加明显，从而提高识别结果，这暗示手臂摆动在某种程度上是个人化的。实验表明，与使用全身轮廓相比，CampusRun 上的 mAP 提高了 3.2%，CASIA-B 上的正面和后视图的准确度提高了 4.8%。

AI.tldr: 本文研究通过视频步态识别中的手臂摆动特征来提高长跑赛事中运动员的跨摄像头重识别性能。
AI.motivation: 传统全身体素步态识别在躯干区域存在歧义，导致手臂摆动特征难以区分，而手臂摆动具有个人独特性。
AI.method: 采用人体语义分割技术生成不含躯干的局部步态体素，通过增强正面和侧面视角下手臂摆动的可见性提升识别效果。
AI.result: 在CampusRun数据集上mAP提升3.2%，在CASIA-B数据集正面和背面视角准确率分别提升4.8%。
AI.conclusion: 局部步态特征（去除躯干）能有效挖掘手臂摆动的个体差异性，为视频步态识别提供互补性特征方案。

title: Attention-based Neural Network for Driving Environment Complexity Perception
title_zh: 基于注意力的神经网络用于驾驶环境复杂性感知
comment: Accepted by 2021 IEEE Intelligent Transportation Systems Conference
comments: Accepted by 2021 IEEE Intelligent Transportation Systems Conference
abstract: Environment perception is crucial for autonomous vehicle (AV) safety. Most existing AV perception algorithms have not studied the surrounding environment complexity and failed to include the environment complexity parameter. This paper proposes a novel attention-based neural network model to predict the complexity level of the surrounding driving environment. The proposed model takes naturalistic driving videos and corresponding vehicle dynamics parameters as input. It consists of a Yolo-v3 object detection algorithm, a heat map generation algorithm, CNN-based feature extractors, and attention-based feature extractors for both video and time-series vehicle dynamics data inputs to extract features. The output from the proposed algorithm is a surrounding environment complexity parameter. The Berkeley DeepDrive dataset (BDD Dataset) and subjectively labeled surrounding environment complexity levels are used for model training and validation to evaluate the algorithm. The proposed attention-based network achieves 91.22% average classification accuracy to classify the surrounding environment complexity. It proves that the environment complexity level can be accurately predicted and applied for future AVs' environment perception studies.
summary: Environment perception is crucial for autonomous vehicle (AV) safety. Most existing AV perception algorithms have not studied the surrounding environment complexity and failed to include the environment complexity parameter. This paper proposes a novel attention-based neural network model to predict the complexity level of the surrounding driving environment. The proposed model takes naturalistic driving videos and corresponding vehicle dynamics parameters as input. It consists of a Yolo-v3 object detection algorithm, a heat map generation algorithm, CNN-based feature extractors, and attention-based feature extractors for both video and time-series vehicle dynamics data inputs to extract features. The output from the proposed algorithm is a surrounding environment complexity parameter. The Berkeley DeepDrive dataset (BDD Dataset) and subjectively labeled surrounding environment complexity levels are used for model training and validation to evaluate the algorithm. The proposed attention-based network achieves 91.22% average classification accuracy to classify the surrounding environment complexity. It proves that the environment complexity level can be accurately predicted and applied for future AVs' environment perception studies.
abstract_zh: 环境感知对于自动驾驶汽车 (AV) 的安全至关重要。现有的自动驾驶感知算法大多没有研究周围环境的复杂性，也未能包含环境复杂性参数。本文提出了一种新颖的基于注意力的神经网络模型来预测周围驾驶环境的复杂程度。该模型以自然驾驶视频和相应的车辆动力学参数作为输入。它由 Yolo-v3 对象检测算法、热图生成算法、基于 CNN 的特征提取器和基于注意力的特征提取器组成，用于视频和时间序列车辆动力学数据输入以提取特征。该算法的输出是周围环境复杂性参数。 Berkeley DeepDrive 数据集（BDD 数据集）和主观标记的周围环境复杂程度用于模型训练和验证，以评估算法。所提出的基于注意力的网络对周围环境复杂性进行分类的平均分类精度达到 91.22%。它证明了环境复杂程度可以准确预测并应用于未来自动驾驶汽车的环境感知研究。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于注意力的神经网络模型，用于预测自动驾驶车辆周围环境的复杂度级别。
AI.motivation: 现有自动驾驶感知算法未考虑环境复杂度参数，而环境复杂度对车辆安全至关重要，需通过模型量化该参数以提升感知能力。
AI.method: 结合Yolo-v3目标检测、热图生成、CNN及注意力机制提取视频与车辆动态数据特征，输出环境复杂度参数。
AI.result: 在BDD数据集上实现91.22%的环境复杂度分类准确率，验证了模型有效性。
AI.conclusion: 所提模型可准确预测环境复杂度，为自动驾驶环境感知研究提供新方向。

search_text: Attention-based Neural Network for Driving Environment Complexity Perception 基于注意力的神经网络用于驾驶环境复杂性感知 Environment perception is crucial for autonomous vehicle (AV) safety. Most existing AV perception algorithms have not studied the surrounding environment complexity and failed to include the environment complexity parameter. This paper proposes a novel attention-based neural network model to predict the complexity level of the surrounding driving environment. The proposed model takes naturalistic driving videos and corresponding vehicle dynamics parameters as input. It consists of a Yolo-v3 object detection algorithm, a heat map generation algorithm, CNN-based feature extractors, and attention-based feature extractors for both video and time-series vehicle dynamics data inputs to extract features. The output from the proposed algorithm is a surrounding environment complexity parameter. The Berkeley DeepDrive dataset (BDD Dataset) and subjectively labeled surrounding environment complexity levels are used for model training and validation to evaluate the algorithm. The proposed attention-based network achieves 91.22% average classification accuracy to classify the surrounding environment complexity. It proves that the environment complexity level can be accurately predicted and applied for future AVs' environment perception studies. 环境感知对于自动驾驶汽车 (AV) 的安全至关重要。现有的自动驾驶感知算法大多没有研究周围环境的复杂性，也未能包含环境复杂性参数。本文提出了一种新颖的基于注意力的神经网络模型来预测周围驾驶环境的复杂程度。该模型以自然驾驶视频和相应的车辆动力学参数作为输入。它由 Yolo-v3 对象检测算法、热图生成算法、基于 CNN 的特征提取器和基于注意力的特征提取器组成，用于视频和时间序列车辆动力学数据输入以提取特征。该算法的输出是周围环境复杂性参数。 Berkeley DeepDrive 数据集（BDD 数据集）和主观标记的周围环境复杂程度用于模型训练和验证，以评估算法。所提出的基于注意力的网络对周围环境复杂性进行分类的平均分类精度达到 91.22%。它证明了环境复杂程度可以准确预测并应用于未来自动驾驶汽车的环境感知研究。 本文提出一种基于注意力的神经网络模型，用于预测自动驾驶车辆周围环境的复杂度级别。 Ce Zhang,Azim Eskandarian,Xuelai Du cs.LG,cs.CV,cs.RO,eess.IV

title: Neural Marching Cubes
title_zh: 神经行进立方体
comment: Accepted to SIGGRAPH Asia 2021. Code: https://github.com/czq142857/NMC, supplementary material: https://www.sfu.ca/~zhiqinc/nmc/NMC_supplementary.zip
comments: Accepted to SIGGRAPH Asia 2021. Code: https://github.com/czq142857/NMC, supplementary material: https://www.sfu.ca/~zhiqinc/nmc/NMC_supplementary.zip
abstract: We introduce Neural Marching Cubes (NMC), a data-driven approach for extracting a triangle mesh from a discretized implicit field. Classical MC is defined by coarse tessellation templates isolated to individual cubes. While more refined tessellations have been proposed, they all make heuristic assumptions, such as trilinearity, when determining the vertex positions and local mesh topologies in each cube. In principle, none of these approaches can reconstruct geometric features that reveal coherence or dependencies between nearby cubes (e.g., a sharp edge), as such information is unaccounted for, resulting in poor estimates of the true underlying implicit field. To tackle these challenges, we re-cast MC from a deep learning perspective, by designing tessellation templates more apt at preserving geometric features, and learning the vertex positions and mesh topologies from training meshes, to account for contextual information from nearby cubes. We develop a compact per-cube parameterization to represent the output triangle mesh, while being compatible with neural processing, so that a simple 3D convolutional network can be employed for the training. We show that all topological cases in each cube that are applicable to our design can be easily derived using our representation, and the resulting tessellations can also be obtained naturally and efficiently by following a few design guidelines. In addition, our network learns local features with limited receptive fields, hence it generalizes well to new shapes and new datasets. We evaluate our neural MC approach by quantitative and qualitative comparisons to all well-known MC variants. In particular, we demonstrate the ability of our network to recover sharp features such as edges and corners, a long-standing issue of MC and its variants. Our network also reconstructs local mesh topologies more accurately than previous approaches.
summary: We introduce Neural Marching Cubes (NMC), a data-driven approach for extracting a triangle mesh from a discretized implicit field. Classical MC is defined by coarse tessellation templates isolated to individual cubes. While more refined tessellations have been proposed, they all make heuristic assumptions, such as trilinearity, when determining the vertex positions and local mesh topologies in each cube. In principle, none of these approaches can reconstruct geometric features that reveal coherence or dependencies between nearby cubes (e.g., a sharp edge), as such information is unaccounted for, resulting in poor estimates of the true underlying implicit field. To tackle these challenges, we re-cast MC from a deep learning perspective, by designing tessellation templates more apt at preserving geometric features, and learning the vertex positions and mesh topologies from training meshes, to account for contextual information from nearby cubes. We develop a compact per-cube parameterization to represent the output triangle mesh, while being compatible with neural processing, so that a simple 3D convolutional network can be employed for the training. We show that all topological cases in each cube that are applicable to our design can be easily derived using our representation, and the resulting tessellations can also be obtained naturally and efficiently by following a few design guidelines. In addition, our network learns local features with limited receptive fields, hence it generalizes well to new shapes and new datasets. We evaluate our neural MC approach by quantitative and qualitative comparisons to all well-known MC variants. In particular, we demonstrate the ability of our network to recover sharp features such as edges and corners, a long-standing issue of MC and its variants. Our network also reconstructs local mesh topologies more accurately than previous approaches.
abstract_zh: 我们引入神经行进立方体（NMC），这是一种数据驱动的方法，用于从离散隐式场中提取三角形网格。经典 MC 由隔离到各个立方体的粗细分模板定义。虽然已经提出了更精细的曲面细分，但在确定每个立方体中的顶点位置和局部网格拓扑时，它们都做出启发式假设，例如三线性。原则上，这些方法都无法重建揭示附近立方体之间的一致性或依赖性（例如，锐边）的几何特征，因为此类信息未被考虑在内，导致对真正的底层隐式场的估计很差。为了应对这些挑战，我们从深度学习的角度重新构建了 MC，通过设计更适合保留几何特征的曲面细分模板，并从训练网格中学习顶点位置和网格拓扑，以考虑附近立方体的上下文信息。我们开发了一种紧凑的每立方体参数化来表示输出三角形网格，同时与神经处理兼容，以便可以采用简单的 3D 卷积网络进行训练。我们表明，每个立方体中适用于我们设计的所有拓扑情况都可以使用我们的表示轻松导出，并且通过遵循一些设计指南也可以自然而有效地获得所得的镶嵌。此外，我们的网络学习感受野有限的局部特征，因此它可以很好地推广到新形状和新数据集。我们通过与所有众所周知的 MC 变体进行定量和定性比较来评估我们的神经 MC 方法。特别是，我们展示了我们的网络恢复边缘和角落等尖锐特征的能力，这是 MC 及其变体长期存在的问题。我们的网络还比以前的方法更准确地重建局部网状拓扑。

AI.tldr: 本文提出神经网格立方体（NMC）方法，通过数据驱动方式从离散隐式场中提取三角网格。
AI.motivation: 传统网格立方体方法因独立处理每个立方体而无法捕捉相邻区域几何特征，导致尖锐特征重建效果差。
AI.method: 设计新型网格模板并利用深度学习从训练数据中学习顶点位置与拓扑结构，结合3D卷积网络实现上下文感知的网格生成。
AI.result: 在定量与定性实验中优于所有经典变体，成功恢复尖锐边缘与角点等长期存在的重建难题。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过局部特征学习和紧凑参数化表示，在保持计算效率的同时显著提升了几何细节重建精度。

authors_text: Sayali Kate,Michael Chinn,Hongjun Choi,Xiangyu Zhang,Sebastian Elbaum
title: PHYSFRAME: Type Checking Physical Frames of Reference for Robotic Systems
title_zh: PHYSFRAME：机器人系统物理参考系的类型检查
abstract: A robotic system continuously measures its own motions and the external world during operation. Such measurements are with respect to some frame of reference, i.e., a coordinate system. A nontrivial robotic system has a large number of different frames and data have to be translated back-and-forth from a frame to another. The onus is on the developers to get such translation right. However, this is very challenging and error-prone, evidenced by the large number of questions and issues related to frame uses on developers' forum. Since any state variable can be associated with some frame, reference frames can be naturally modeled as variable types. We hence develop a novel type system that can automatically infer variables' frame types and in turn detect any type inconsistencies and violations of frame conventions. The evaluation on a set of 180 publicly available ROS projects shows that our system can detect 190 inconsistencies with 154 true positives. We reported 52 to developers and received 18 responses so far, with 15 fixed/acknowledged. Our technique also finds 45 violations of common practices.
summary: A robotic system continuously measures its own motions and the external world during operation. Such measurements are with respect to some frame of reference, i.e., a coordinate system. A nontrivial robotic system has a large number of different frames and data have to be translated back-and-forth from a frame to another. The onus is on the developers to get such translation right. However, this is very challenging and error-prone, evidenced by the large number of questions and issues related to frame uses on developers' forum. Since any state variable can be associated with some frame, reference frames can be naturally modeled as variable types. We hence develop a novel type system that can automatically infer variables' frame types and in turn detect any type inconsistencies and violations of frame conventions. The evaluation on a set of 180 publicly available ROS projects shows that our system can detect 190 inconsistencies with 154 true positives. We reported 52 to developers and received 18 responses so far, with 15 fixed/acknowledged. Our technique also finds 45 violations of common practices.
abstract_zh: 机器人系统在运行过程中不断测量自身的运动和外部世界。这种测量是相对于某个参考系，即坐标系。一个重要的机器人系统具有大量不同的框架，并且数据必须从一个框架来回转换到另一个框架。开发人员有责任正确翻译。然而，这是非常具有挑战性且容易出错的，开发者论坛上大量与框架使用相关的疑问和问题就证明了这一点。由于任何状态变量都可以与某个框架相关联，因此参考框架可以自然地建模为变量类型。因此，我们开发了一种新颖的类型系统，可以自动推断变量的框架类型，进而检测任何类型不一致和违反框架约定的情况。对 180 个公开可用的 ROS 项目的评估表明，我们的系统可以检测到 190 个不一致之处和 154 个真实阳性。到目前为止，我们向开发人员报告了 52 个问题，收到了 18 个回复，其中 15 个已修复/确认。我们的技术还发现了 45 处违反常见做法的行为。

AI.tldr: 本文提出PHYSFRAME类型系统，用于自动推断机器人系统中变量的物理参考系类型并检测不一致问题。
AI.motivation: 机器人系统中多参考系的数据转换容易出错，开发者手动处理易导致错误，且开发者论坛存在大量相关问题。
AI.method: 将参考系建模为变量类型，设计类型系统自动推断变量的参考系类型并检测类型不一致及惯例违反。
AI.result: 在180个ROS项目中检测到190处不一致（154真阳性），报告52个问题获18次响应（15已修复），发现45处常见实践违反。
AI.conclusion: 该方法能有效检测参考系相关错误，提升机器人系统代码可靠性，促进开发实践规范化。

title: Applying VertexShuffle Toward 360-Degree Video Super-Resolution on Focused-Icosahedral-Mesh
title_zh: 在聚焦二十面体网格上应用 VertexShuffle 实现 360 度视频超分辨率
comment: This paper introduce a new mesh representation and a new upsampling method on a mesh
comments: This paper introduce a new mesh representation and a new upsampling method on a mesh
abstract: With the emerging of 360-degree image/video, augmented reality (AR) and virtual reality (VR), the demand for analysing and processing spherical signals get tremendous increase. However, plenty of effort paid on planar signals that projected from spherical signals, which leading to some problems, e.g. waste of pixels, distortion. Recent advances in spherical CNN have opened up the possibility of directly analysing spherical signals. However, they pay attention to the full mesh which makes it infeasible to deal with situations in real-world application due to the extremely large bandwidth requirement. To address the bandwidth waste problem associated with 360-degree video streaming and save computation, we exploit Focused Icosahedral Mesh to represent a small area and construct matrices to rotate spherical content to the focused mesh area. We also proposed a novel VertexShuffle operation that can significantly improve both the performance and the efficiency compared to the original MeshConv Transpose operation introduced in UGSCNN. We further apply our proposed methods on super resolution model, which is the first to propose a spherical super-resolution model that directly operates on a mesh representation of spherical pixels of 360-degree data. To evaluate our model, we also collect a set of high-resolution 360-degree videos to generate a spherical image dataset. Our experiments indicate that our proposed spherical super-resolution model achieves significant benefits in terms of both performance and inference time compared to the baseline spherical super-resolution model that uses the simple MeshConv Transpose operation. In summary, our model achieves great super-resolution performance on 360-degree inputs, achieving 32.79 dB PSNR on average when super-resoluting 16x vertices on the mesh.
summary: With the emerging of 360-degree image/video, augmented reality (AR) and virtual reality (VR), the demand for analysing and processing spherical signals get tremendous increase. However, plenty of effort paid on planar signals that projected from spherical signals, which leading to some problems, e.g. waste of pixels, distortion. Recent advances in spherical CNN have opened up the possibility of directly analysing spherical signals. However, they pay attention to the full mesh which makes it infeasible to deal with situations in real-world application due to the extremely large bandwidth requirement. To address the bandwidth waste problem associated with 360-degree video streaming and save computation, we exploit Focused Icosahedral Mesh to represent a small area and construct matrices to rotate spherical content to the focused mesh area. We also proposed a novel VertexShuffle operation that can significantly improve both the performance and the efficiency compared to the original MeshConv Transpose operation introduced in UGSCNN. We further apply our proposed methods on super resolution model, which is the first to propose a spherical super-resolution model that directly operates on a mesh representation of spherical pixels of 360-degree data. To evaluate our model, we also collect a set of high-resolution 360-degree videos to generate a spherical image dataset. Our experiments indicate that our proposed spherical super-resolution model achieves significant benefits in terms of both performance and inference time compared to the baseline spherical super-resolution model that uses the simple MeshConv Transpose operation. In summary, our model achieves great super-resolution performance on 360-degree inputs, achieving 32.79 dB PSNR on average when super-resoluting 16x vertices on the mesh.
abstract_zh: 随着360度图像/视频、增强现实（AR）和虚拟现实（VR）的兴起，对球面信号分析和处理的需求急剧增加。然而，人们在从球形信号投射的平面信号上付出了大量的努力，这导致了一些问题，例如像素浪费、失真。球形 CNN 的最新进展开启了直接分析球形信号的可能性。然而，他们关注的是全网格，这使得由于极大的带宽需求而无法处理实际应用中的情况。为了解决与 360 度视频流相关的带宽浪费问题并节省计算量，我们利用聚焦二十面体网格来表示小区域并构造矩阵以将球形内容旋转到聚焦网格区域。我们还提出了一种新颖的 VertexShuffle 操作，与 UGSCNN 中引入的原始 MeshConv Transpose 操作相比，它可以显着提高性能和效率。我们进一步将我们提出的方法应用于超分辨率模型，这是第一个提出直接对 360 度数据的球形像素的网格表示进行操作的球形超分辨率模型。为了评估我们的模型，我们还收集了一组高分辨率 360 度视频来生成球形图像数据集。我们的实验表明，与使用简单 MeshConv Transpose 操作的基线球形超分辨率模型相比，我们提出的球形超分辨率模型在性能和推理时间方面都取得了显着的优势。总之，我们的模型在 360 度输入上实现了出色的超分辨率性能，在网格上超分辨率 16x 顶点时平均实现 32.79 dB PSNR。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于聚焦二十面体网格和VertexShuffle操作的360度视频超分辨率方法，直接在网格表示上处理球面信号。
AI.motivation: 传统方法通过平面投影处理球面信号导致像素浪费和失真，而现有球面CNN因全网格带宽需求过高难以实际应用，需更高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 采用聚焦二十面体网格表示局部区域，构建旋转矩阵将球面内容映射至网格，并提出VertexShuffle操作替代MeshConv Transpose，提升性能与效率。首次将该方法应用于网格表示的球面超分辨率模型。
AI.result: 在16x顶点超分辨率任务中，模型平均PSNR达32.79 dB，相较基线模型在性能和推理时间上均有显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 本文方法通过聚焦网格与VertexShuffle操作，在保证超分辨率效果的同时大幅降低计算带宽需求，为360度视频处理提供了高效方案。

However, plenty of effort paid on planar signals that projected from spherical signals, which leading to some problems, e.g. waste of pixels, distortion. Recent advances in spherical CNN have opened up the possibility of directly analysing spherical signals. However, they pay attention to the full mesh which makes it infeasible to deal with situations in real-world application due to the extremely large bandwidth requirement. We also proposed a novel VertexShuffle operation that can significantly improve both the performance and the efficiency compared to the original MeshConv Transpose operation introduced in UGSCNN. We further apply our proposed methods on super resolution model, which is the first to propose a spherical super-resolution model that directly operates on a mesh representation of spherical pixels of 360-degree data. To evaluate our model, we also collect a set of high-resolution 360-degree videos to generate a spherical image dataset. Our experiments indicate that our proposed spherical super-resolution model achieves significant benefits in terms of both performance and inference time compared to the baseline spherical super-resolution model that uses the simple MeshConv Transpose operation. title: VIMPAC: Video Pre-Training via Masked Token Prediction and Contrastive Learning
title_zh: VIMPAC：通过屏蔽令牌预测和对比学习进行视频预训练
comment: Under review, 23 Pages
comments: Under review, 23 Pages
abstract: Video understanding relies on perceiving the global content and modeling its internal connections (e.g., causality, movement, and spatio-temporal correspondence). To learn these interactions, we apply a mask-then-predict pre-training task on discretized video tokens generated via VQ-VAE. Unlike language, where the text tokens are more independent, neighboring video tokens typically have strong correlations (e.g., consecutive video frames usually look very similar), and hence uniformly masking individual tokens will make the task too trivial to learn useful representations. To deal with this issue, we propose a block-wise masking strategy where we mask neighboring video tokens in both spatial and temporal domains. We also add an augmentation-free contrastive learning method to further capture the global content by predicting whether the video clips are sampled from the same video. We pre-train our model on uncurated videos and show that our pre-trained model can reach state-of-the-art results on several video understanding datasets (e.g., SSV2, Diving48). Lastly, we provide detailed analyses on model scalability and pre-training method design. Code is released at https://github.com/airsplay/vimpac.
summary: Video understanding relies on perceiving the global content and modeling its internal connections (e.g., causality, movement, and spatio-temporal correspondence). To learn these interactions, we apply a mask-then-predict pre-training task on discretized video tokens generated via VQ-VAE. Unlike language, where the text tokens are more independent, neighboring video tokens typically have strong correlations (e.g., consecutive video frames usually look very similar), and hence uniformly masking individual tokens will make the task too trivial to learn useful representations. To deal with this issue, we propose a block-wise masking strategy where we mask neighboring video tokens in both spatial and temporal domains. We also add an augmentation-free contrastive learning method to further capture the global content by predicting whether the video clips are sampled from the same video. We pre-train our model on uncurated videos and show that our pre-trained model can reach state-of-the-art results on several video understanding datasets (e.g., SSV2, Diving48). Lastly, we provide detailed analyses on model scalability and pre-training method design. Code is released at https://github.com/airsplay/vimpac.
abstract_zh: 视频理解依赖于感知全局内容并对其内部联系进行建模（例如因果关系、运动和时空对应）。为了学习这些交互，我们对通过 VQ-VAE 生成的离散视频标记应用了 mask-then-predict 预训练任务。与文本标记更加独立的语言不同，相邻的视频标记通常具有很强的相关性（例如，连续的视频帧通常看起来非常相似），因此统一屏蔽各个标记将使任务变得过于琐碎而无法学习有用的表示。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种分块屏蔽策略，在空间和时间域中屏蔽相邻的视频标记。我们还添加了一种无增强对比学习方法，通过预测视频剪辑是否是从同一视频中采样来进一步捕获全局内容。我们在未策划的视频上预训练我们的模型，并表明我们的预训练模型可以在多个视频理解数据集（例如 SSV2、Diving48）上达到最先进的结果。最后，我们对模型可扩展性和预训练方法设计进行了详细分析。代码发布于 https://github.com/airsplay/vimpac。

AI.tldr: 本文提出VIMPAC视频预训练方法，通过掩码标记预测和对比学习提升视频理解能力。
AI.motivation: 视频理解需捕捉全局内容与时空关联，但传统方法难以处理视频帧间强相关性导致的预训练任务简单化问题。
AI.method: 基于VQ-VAE生成离散视频标记，采用空间-时域块级掩码策略，并设计无增强对比学习任务预测视频片段是否来自同一视频。
AI.result: 在SSV2、Diving48等数据集达到SOTA性能，验证了方法在可扩展性与预训练设计上的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 块级掩码与对比学习协同捕捉视频结构与动态特征，为视频预训练提供新思路。

authors_text: Ethan Smith,Marc G. Davis,Jeffrey Larson,Ed Younis,Costin Iancu,Wim Lavrijsen
title: LEAP: Scaling Numerical Optimization Based Synthesis Using an Incremental Approach
title_zh: LEAP：使用增量方法扩展基于数值优化的综合
comment: 21 pages
comments: 21 pages
abstract: While showing great promise, circuit synthesis techniques that combine numerical optimization with search over circuit structures face scalability challenges due to a large number of parameters, exponential search spaces, and complex objective functions. The LEAP algorithm improves scaling across these dimensions using iterative circuit synthesis, incremental re-optimization, dimensionality reduction, and improved numerical optimization. LEAP draws on the design of the optimal synthesis algorithm QSearch by extending it with an incremental approach to determine constant prefix solutions for a circuit. By narrowing the search space, LEAP improves scalability from four to six qubit circuits. LEAP was evaluated with known quantum circuits such as QFT and physical simulation circuits like the VQE, TFIM, and QITE. LEAP can compile four qubit unitaries up to $59\times$ faster than QSearch and five and six qubit unitaries with up to $1.2\times$ fewer CNOTs compared to the QFAST package. LEAP can reduce the CNOT count by up to $36\times$, or $7\times$ on average, compared to the CQC Tket compiler. Despite its heuristics, LEAP has generated optimal circuits for many test cases with a priori known solutions. The techniques introduced by LEAP are applicable to other numerical-optimization-based synthesis approaches.

Despite its heuristics, LEAP has generated optimal circuits for many test cases with a priori known solutions. The techniques introduced by LEAP are applicable to other numerical-optimization-based synthesis approaches.
abstract_zh: 虽然显示出巨大的前景，但将数值优化与电路结构搜索相结合的电路综合技术由于大量参数、指数搜索空间和复杂的目标函数而面临可扩展性挑战。 LEAP 算法使用迭代电路综合、增量重新优化、降维和改进的数值优化来改进这些维度的缩放。 LEAP 借鉴了最佳综合算法 QSearch 的设计，通过增量方法对其进行扩展，以确定电路的恒定前缀解决方案。通过缩小搜索空间，LEAP 将可扩展性从 4 个量子位电路提高到 6 个量子位电路。使用 QFT 等已知量子电路和 VQE、TFIM 和 QITE 等物理模拟电路对 LEAP 进行了评估。 LEAP 可以编译四个量子位酉，比 QSearch 快 59 倍；与 QFAST 包相比，编译 5 个和 6 个量子位酉，CNOT 少 1.2 倍。与 CQC Tket 编译器相比，LEAP 可以将 CNOT 计数减少高达 $36\times$，平均减少 $7\times$。尽管采用启发式方法，LEAP 仍然使用先验已知的解决方案为许多测试用例生成了最佳电路。 LEAP 引入的技术适用于其他基于数值优化的综合方法。

search_text: LEAP: Scaling Numerical Optimization Based Synthesis Using an Incremental Approach LEAP：使用增量方法扩展基于数值优化的综合 While showing great promise, circuit synthesis techniques that combine numerical optimization with search over circuit structures face scalability challenges due to a large number of parameters, exponential search spaces, and complex objective functions. The LEAP algorithm improves scaling across these dimensions using iterative circuit synthesis, incremental re-optimization, dimensionality reduction, and improved numerical optimization. LEAP draws on the design of the optimal synthesis algorithm QSearch by extending it with an incremental approach to determine constant prefix solutions for a circuit. By narrowing the search space, LEAP improves scalability from four to six qubit circuits. LEAP was evaluated with known quantum circuits such as QFT and physical simulation circuits like the VQE, TFIM, and QITE. LEAP can compile four qubit unitaries up to $59\times$ faster than QSearch and five and six qubit unitaries with up to $1.2\times$ fewer CNOTs compared to the QFAST package. LEAP can reduce the CNOT count by up to $36\times$, or $7\times$ on average, compared to the CQC Tket compiler. Despite its heuristics, LEAP has generated optimal circuits for many test cases with a priori known solutions. The techniques introduced by LEAP are applicable to other numerical-optimization-based synthesis approaches. 虽然显示出巨大的前景，但将数值优化与电路结构搜索相结合的电路综合技术由于大量参数、指数搜索空间和复杂的目标函数而面临可扩展性挑战。 LEAP 算法使用迭代电路综合、增量重新优化、降维和改进的数值优化来改进这些维度的缩放。 LEAP 借鉴了最佳综合算法 QSearch 的设计，通过增量方法对其进行扩展，以确定电路的恒定前缀解决方案。通过缩小搜索空间，LEAP 将可扩展性从 4 个量子位电路提高到 6 个量子位电路。使用 QFT 等已知量子电路和 VQE、TFIM 和 QITE 等物理模拟电路对 LEAP 进行了评估。 LEAP 可以编译四个量子位酉，比 QSearch 快 59 倍；与 QFAST 包相比，编译 5 个和 6 个量子位酉，CNOT 少 1.2 倍。与 CQC Tket 编译器相比，LEAP 可以将 CNOT 计数减少高达 $36\times$，平均减少 $7\times$。尽管采用启发式方法，LEAP 仍然使用先验已知的解决方案为许多测试用例生成了最佳电路。 LEAP 引入的技术适用于其他基于数值优化的综合方法。 本文提出了一种名为LEAP的算法，用于解决基于数值优化的电路合成中的可扩展性问题。 Ethan Smith,Marc G. Davis,Jeffrey Larson,Ed Younis,Costin Iancu,Wim Lavrijsen quant-ph,cs.ET
